mapper.select:
SELECT A.CNTNT AS CODE ,A.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'A003' AND A.USE_F = 'Y'
AND A.GRP_CD = 'Y'
AND A.GRP_CD = 'N'
ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ, A.CD_NM

WITH AML_APPR_INFO AS ( SELECT I.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,I.NUM_SQ --,I.APP_DT ,I.APP_NO ,I.WLR_SQ ,I.REG_DT ,I.SN_CCD ,CASE WHEN I.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN I.MAX_SNO ELSE I.MIN_SNO END AS SNO FROM ( SELECT R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,R.NUM_SQ ,MIN(R.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD --,R.APP_DT ,R.APP_NO ,R.WLR_SQ ,MIN(R.REG_DT) AS REG_DT ,MIN(D.SNO) AS MIN_SNO ,MAX(D.SNO) AS MAX_SNO FROM ( SELECT A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C --,A.APP_DT ,A.APP_NO ,A.WLR_SQ ,MAX(A.NUM_SQ) AS NUM_SQ FROM AML_APPR A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C --,A.APP_DT ,A.APP_NO ,A.WLR_SQ ) B ,AML_APPR R ,C_GYLJ_M M ,C_GYLJ_D D WHERE R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND R.NUM_SQ = B.NUM_SQ --AND R.APP_DT = B.APP_DT AND R.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND R.WLR_SQ = B.WLR_SQ AND M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = CASE WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN R.APPR_ROLE_ID ELSE R.TARGET_ROLE_ID END AND 1 = CASE WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'R' AND D.SNO < R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'S' AND D.SNO > R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'E' AND D.SNO = R.SNO THEN 1 ELSE 0 END GROUP BY R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C, R.NUM_SQ, R.APP_DT, R.APP_NO, R.WLR_SQ ) I ) SELECT NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WLL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS WLL_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WLR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS WLR_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'LAP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS LAP_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'KYE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS KYE_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WHL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS WHL_CNT FROM AML_APPR_INFO F ,AML_APPR G ,C_GYLJ_M H ,C_GYLJ_D J ,NIC19B_APPR_CNT K WHERE 1=1 AND G.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = F.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = G.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND G.NUM_SQ = F.NUM_SQ AND J.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND J.SNO = F.SNO AND F.APP_NO = K.APP_NO(+) AND G.SN_CCD IN ('S','R') AND G.TARGET_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} GROUP BY H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C

WITH AML_APPR_INFO AS ( SELECT I.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,I.NUM_SQ ,I.APP_NO ,I.REG_DT ,I.SN_CCD ,CASE WHEN I.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN I.MAX_SNO ELSE I.MIN_SNO END AS SNO FROM ( SELECT R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,R.NUM_SQ ,MIN(R.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD ,R.APP_NO ,MIN(R.REG_DT) AS REG_DT ,MIN(D.SNO) AS MIN_SNO ,MAX(D.SNO) AS MAX_SNO FROM ( SELECT A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,A.APP_NO ,A.WLR_SQ ,MAX(A.NUM_SQ) AS NUM_SQ FROM AML_APPR A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,A.APP_NO ,A.WLR_SQ ) B ,AML_APPR R ,C_GYLJ_M M ,C_GYLJ_D D WHERE R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND R.NUM_SQ = B.NUM_SQ AND R.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = CASE WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN R.APPR_ROLE_ID ELSE R.TARGET_ROLE_ID END AND 1 = CASE WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'R' AND D.SNO < R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'RR' AND D.SNO < R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'RS' AND D.SNO < R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'S' AND D.SNO > R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'SS' AND D.SNO > R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'DS' AND D.SNO > R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'S1' AND D.SNO > R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'S2' AND D.SNO > R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'S3' AND D.SNO > R.SNO THEN 1 WHEN R.SN_CCD = 'E' AND D.SNO = R.SNO THEN 1 ELSE 0 END GROUP BY R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C, R.NUM_SQ, R.APP_DT, R.APP_NO, R.WLR_SQ ) I ) SELECT NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS RAITEM1_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS RAITEM2_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS RAITEM3_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS RAITEM4_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS RAITEM5_CNT ,NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) + NVL(MAX(SUM(CASE WHEN H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) AS RAITEM6_CNT FROM AML_APPR_INFO F ,AML_APPR G ,C_GYLJ_M H ,C_GYLJ_D J WHERE 1=1 AND G.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = F.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = G.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND G.NUM_SQ = F.NUM_SQ AND J.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND J.SNO = F.SNO AND G.SN_CCD IN ('S','S1','S2','S3','R','RR','SS','DS','RS') AND G.TARGET_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} GROUP BY H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C

SELECT A.RLT_CD -- WLF고객구분코드(01.본인,02.대리인,03.대표자,04.실제소유자) ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'A915' AND E.CNTNT = A.RLT_CD ) AS RLT_NM ,A.RLT_SQ -- 고객구분일련번호 ,A.SQ ,A.CS_NM AS CS_NM_V -- WLF대상명 한글 ,A.ENG_CS_NM AS ENG_WLF_CS_NM -- WLF대상명 영문 ,A.NTN_CD -- 국가코드 ,A.NTN_NM -- 국가명 ,A.DOB ,A.SEX ,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = 'M013' AND F.CNTNT = A.SEX) AS SEX_NM ,A.ACCURACY ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.SRCH_RQS_CCD ,A.SRCH_RSLT_DT -- 검색결과일자 ,B.CS_NM -- 고객명 ,B.ENG_CS_NM AS ENG_CS_NM -- 영문고객명 ,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD='M002' AND G.CNTNT=A.RNM_CCD) AS RNM_CCD -- 실명구분코드 ,A.AML_CUST_ID -- 실명번호 ,A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO_ORG -- 실명번호 ,A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO -- 실명번호 ,A.WC_LIST_CCD -- W/L 구분 ,NVL(A.PSBL_F,'N') AS PSBL_F -- 가능여부 ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,A.WLF_DCD AS WLF_DCD -- WLF결과코드_A505 ,(SELECT H.CD_NM FROM NIC92B H WHERE H.CD='M012' AND H.CNTNT=B.CS_TYP_CD) AS CUST_G_C -- 고객구분(01.개인,02.개인사업자 ,03.법인,04.비영리법인 ) ,(SELECT I.CD_NM FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD='A915' AND I.CNTNT=A.RLT_CD ) AS RLT_NM -- WLF고객구분코드(01.본인,02.대리인,03.대표자,04.실제소유자) ,A.APP_NO AS APP_NO -- 결재번호 ,A.WL_OPEN_DATA_YN ,A.WC_LIST_GRP_CD FROM NIC21B A ,NIC01B B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = #{SRCH_RSLT_DT} AND A.SRCH_RQS_REG_NO = #{SRCH_RQS_REG_NO} AND (A.SRCH_RSLT_DT, A.SQ) IN (SELECT /*+ INDEX(D PK_NIC22B)*/ D.SRCH_RSLT_DT, D.SQ FROM NIC22B D WHERE D.SRCH_RSLT_DT = A.SRCH_RSLT_DT AND D.SQ = A.SQ GROUP BY D.SRCH_RSLT_DT, D.SQ ) ORDER BY A.SRCH_RSLT_DT DESC, A.SQ

WITH WL_REG AS ( SELECT WL_REG_DT , SUM(CASE WHEN WL_REG_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WL_REG_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN WL_REG_DT IS NOT NULL AND APP_NO IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOT_APPL_CNT FROM NIC19B GROUP BY WL_REG_DT ), WL_DEL AS ( SELECT WL_DEL_DT , SUM(CASE WHEN WL_DEL_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WL_DEL_CNT FROM NIC19B GROUP BY WL_DEL_DT ), WL_APP AS ( SELECT WL_REG_DT , SUM(CASE WHEN APPL_DT IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOT_APPL_CNT FROM NIC19B GROUP BY WL_REG_DT ), WL_ALL AS ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN NORM_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NORM_YN_CNT , MAX(GREATEST(WL_REG_DT, WL_DEL_DT)) AS GREATEST_MAX , COUNT(*) AS WL_ALL_CNT FROM NIC19B ) SELECT X1.WL_BASE_DT -- WATCHLIST 배포일자 , X1.TOTAL_NORM_CNT -- WATCHLIST 총정상건수(NIC19B전체 정상) , X1.WL_REG_CNT -- WATCHLIST 정상(추가)건수 , X1.WL_DEL_CNT -- WATCHLIST 삭제건수 , X1.INDE_CNT -- WATCHLIST 증감건수 (실제 추가 및 삭제된 건수) , X1.NOT_APPL_CNT -- WATCHLIST 미적용건수(INDEX파일 미반영건수) , X1.GREATEST_MAX , CASE WHEN X1.NOT_APPL_CNT = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS APPL_YN -- WATCHLIST 배포일자 기준 적용여부(INDEX파일에 반영여부) FROM ( SELECT T1.WL_BASE_DT , T1.WL_REG_CNT , T1.WL_DEL_CNT , T1.WL_REG_CNT - T1.WL_DEL_CNT AS INDE_CNT , T2.GREATEST_MAX , T2.NORM_YN_CNT - (SUM(T1.WL_REG_CNT-T1.WL_DEL_CNT) OVER (ORDER BY T1.WL_BASE_DT)) AS PRE_INDE_CNT , CASE WHEN T1.WL_BASE_DT = T2.GREATEST_MAX THEN T2.NORM_YN_CNT ELSE (SUM(T1.WL_REG_CNT - T1.WL_DEL_CNT) OVER (ORDER BY T1.WL_BASE_DT)) END AS TOTAL_NORM_CNT , T3.NOT_APPL_CNT , T2.WL_ALL_CNT AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( SELECT NVL(L1.WL_REG_DT, L2.WL_DEL_DT) AS WL_BASE_DT -- 등록 및 삭제일자 , NVL(L1.WL_REG_CNT, '0') AS WL_REG_CNT , NVL(L2.WL_DEL_CNT, '0') AS WL_DEL_CNT FROM WL_REG L1 LEFT JOIN WL_DEL L2 ON L1.WL_REG_DT = L2.WL_DEL_DT UNION SELECT NVL(R1.WL_REG_DT, R2.WL_DEL_DT) AS WL_BASE_DT , NVL(R1.WL_REG_CNT, '0') AS WL_REG_CNT , NVL(R2.WL_DEL_CNT, '0') AS WL_DEL_CNT FROM WL_REG R1 RIGHT JOIN WL_DEL R2 ON R1.WL_REG_DT = R2.WL_DEL_DT WHERE (R1.WL_REG_DT IS NOT NULL OR R2.WL_DEL_DT IS NOT NULL) ) T1 INNER JOIN WL_ALL T2 ON 1=1 LEFT OUTER JOIN WL_APP T3 ON T1.WL_BASE_DT = T3.WL_REG_DT ) X1 WHERE X1.WL_BASE_DT BETWEEN #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_SD} AND #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_ED} ORDER BY X1.WL_BASE_DT DESC

SELECT E.MNG_SNO ,E.WC_LIST_CCD AS WC_LIST_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A003', E.WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,E.NTV_FGNR_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A008', E.NTV_FGNR_CCD) AS NTV_FGNR_CCD_NM ,E.CS_NM ,E.WL_BIRTHDAY ,E.NTN_CD ,E.NTN_NM ,E.ADDR ,CASE WHEN #{WL_BASE_DT} != E.WL_DEL_DT THEN '' ELSE E.WL_DEL_DT END AS WL_DEL_DT ,CASE WHEN #{WL_BASE_DT} != E.WL_DEL_DT THEN 'Y' ELSE E.NORM_YN END AS NORM_YN -- ,E.APPL_YN /* 적용여부 삭제 */ ,E.WL_REG_DT ,E.HNDL_DY_TM FROM ( WITH BASE_DT AS ( SELECT #{WL_BASE_DT} AS WL_BASE_DT FROM DUAL) SELECT * FROM NIC19B A, BASE_DT B WHERE A.WL_REG_DT = B.WL_BASE_DT UNION SELECT * FROM NIC19B C, BASE_DT D WHERE C.WL_DEL_DT = D.WL_BASE_DT ) E WHERE 1=1
AND E.WC_LIST_CCD = #{WC_LIST_CCD}

SELECT NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(X.CNT),'999,999,999') ), 0) TOT_COUNT ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) H_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) H_RATE ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) M_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) M_RATE ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) L_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) L_RATE ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'R' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) R_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.RSK_GRD_CD = 'R' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) R_RATE ,NVL(TO_CHAR(MAX((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC01B K)),'999,999,999'), 0) AS T_COUNT FROM ( SELECT B.RSK_GRD_CD, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC01B A, NIC35B B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND B.RSK_GRD_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.RSK_GRD_CD ) X

SELECT NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CNT),'999,999,999')),0) TOT_COUNT ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) H_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) H_RATE ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) M_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) M_RATE ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) L_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) L_RATE ,NVL(TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'R' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999')),0) R_COUNT ,NVL(TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN RSK_GRD_CD = 'R' THEN CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(CNT)*100.0,'990.00'),0) R_RATE ,NVL(TO_CHAR(MAX((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC01B)),'999,999,999'),0) AS T_COUNT FROM (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4)*/ B.RSK_GRD_CD, COUNT(*) CNT FROM NIC01B A, NIC35B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO GROUP BY B.RSK_GRD_CD )

SELECT TO_CHAR(SUM(X.CNT),'999,999,999') TOT_CNT ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'A' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999') CNT1 ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'A' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00') RATE1 ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'B' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999') CNT2 ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'B' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00') RATE2 ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'C' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999') CNT3 ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'C' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00') RATE3 ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'D' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END),'999,999,999') CNT4 ,TO_CHAR(SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_EDD_ST_CD = 'D' THEN X.CNT ELSE 0 END)/SUM(X.CNT)*100.0,'990.00') RATE4 FROM ( SELECT B.CS_EDD_ST_CD, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NIC01B A, NIC35B B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND B.CS_EDD_MNG_F = '1' GROUP BY B.CS_EDD_ST_CD ) X

SELECT M.CNTNT ,M.CD_NM ,NVL(N.TOT_CNT,0) TOT_CNT ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(N.TOT_CNT,0)/SUM(N.TOT_CNT) OVER ()*100,'990.00')) RATET ,NVL(N.CNT1,0) CNT1 ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(N.CNT1,0)/SUM(N.TOT_CNT) OVER ()*100,'990.00')) RATE1 ,NVL(N.CNT2,0) CNT2 ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(N.CNT2,0)/SUM(N.TOT_CNT) OVER ()*100,'990.00')) RATE2 ,NVL(N.CNT3,0) CNT3 ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(N.CNT3,0)/SUM(N.TOT_CNT) OVER ()*100,'990.00')) RATE3 ,NVL(N.CNT4,0) CNT4 ,TRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(N.CNT4,0)/SUM(N.TOT_CNT) OVER ()*100,'990.00')) RATE4 FROM NIC92B M ,(SELECT A.CS_EDD_MNG_CD ,COUNT(*) TOT_CNT ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_STS_CD='A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) CNT1 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_STS_CD='B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) CNT2 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_STS_CD='C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) CNT3 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_STS_CD='D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) CNT4 FROM VIC01B A, NIC10B B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID=B.AML_CUST_ID AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD LIKE #{CS_TYPE}||'%' -- 개인 법인 구분 AND B.BRN_CD LIKE #{CS_EDD_ST_UPT_BRN_CD}||'%' -- 지점코드 GROUP BY A.CS_EDD_MNG_CD ) N WHERE M.CNTNT = A.CS_EDD_MNG_CD(+) AND M.CD='A029' ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC10B (AML_CUST_ID -- 실명확인번호 ,CS_EDD_RGST_CCD -- 고객EDD등록구분코드 ,TSK_CD -- 직종코드 ,OCPTN_CD -- 직업코드 ,WP_CMPNY_NM -- 직장회사명 ,INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD -- 업종코드 ,WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO -- 직장회사전화번호 ,BSMN_RNO -- 사업자등록번호 ,DPRT_NM -- 부점명 ,PSTN_NM -- 직위명 ,WP_CMPNY_ADDR -- 직장회사주소 --,WP_CMPNY_PST_NO -- 직장회사우편번호 ,BSNSG_FNDTN_DT -- 사업체설립일자 ,FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD -- 자금원천및출처코드 ,DL_OBJ_CD -- 거래목적코드 ,DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD -- 거래목적계좌신규코드 ,EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD -- 예상거래입금횟수 ,EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD -- 예상거래출금횟수 ,DL_GDS_CD -- 거래상품코드 ,EMAIL -- 이메일 ,INVST_I_AMT_CD -- 예상거래입금액 ,INVST_O_AMT_CD -- 예상거래출금액 ,MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD -- 추정동산자산금액 ,RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD -- 추정부동산자산금액 ,HNDL_DY_TM -- 처리일시 ,HNDL_P_ENO -- 처리자사번 ,EDD_REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{AML_CUST_ID_HIDDEN}, #{CS_EDD_RGST_CCD}, #{TSK_CD}, #{OCPTN_CD}, #{WP_CMPNY_NM} ,#{INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD}, #{WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO}, #{BSMN_RNO}, #{DPRT_NM}, #{PSTN_NM} ,#{WP_CMPNY_ADDR}, #{BSNSG_FNDTN_DT}, #{FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD}, #{DL_OBJ_CD}, #{DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD}, #{EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD}, #{EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD}, #{DL_GDS_CD} ,#{EMAIL}, #{INVST_I_AMT_CD}, #{INVST_O_AMT_CD}, #{MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD} ,#{RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD}, SYSDATE, #{USER_ID}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') )

INSERT INTO NIC11B (AML_CUST_ID -- 실명확인번호 ,PRXY_NM -- 대리인명 ,PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD -- 대리인실명번호구분코드 ,PRXY_RNM_NO -- 대리인실명번호 ,PRXY_ADDR_CCD -- 대리인주소구분코드 ,PRXY_NTNLT_CD -- 대리인국적코드 ,PRXY_RLTNS_CD -- 대리인관계코드 ,PRXY_ADDR -- 대리인주소 ,PRXY_PST_NO -- 대리인우편번호 ,PRXY_HSE_TEL_NO -- 대리인자택전화번호 ,PRXY_MBL_TEL_NO -- 대리인휴대전화번호 ,PRXY_EMAIL -- 대리인이메일 ,FGNR_SEX_CD -- 외국인성별코드 ,FGNR_BRTDY -- 외국인생년월일 ,FGNR_NTNLT_CD -- 외국인국적코드 ,RGST_IND_TYP_CD -- 업종 ,FNDTN_OBJ_NM -- 설립목적 ,RPRST_P_NM -- 대표자명 ,RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD -- 대표자실명번호구분코드 ,RPRST_P_RNM_NO -- 대표자실명번호 ,RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD -- 대표자국적코드 ,RPRST_P_TEL_NO -- 대표자전화번호 ) VALUES ( #{AML_CUST_ID_HIDDEN}, #{PRXY_NM}, #{PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD}, #{PRXY_RNM_NO}, #{PRXY_ADDR_CCD} ,#{PRXY_NTNLT_CD}, #{PRXY_RLTNS_CD}, #{PRXY_ADDR}, #{PRXY_PST_NO}, #{PRXY_HSE_TEL_NO} ,#{PRXY_MBL_TEL_NO}, #{PRXY_EMAIL}, #{FGNR_SEX_CD}, #{FGNR_BRTDY}, #{FGNR_NTNLT_CD} ,#{RGST_IND_TYP_CD}, #{PRXY_FDTN_OBJ_NM}, #{RPRST_P_NM}, #{RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD}, #{RPRST_P_RNM_NO} ,#{RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD}, #{RPRST_P_TEL_NO} )
mapper.select:
SELECT GET_CODE_NAME( 'M002',A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'M005',A.RSDNC_F) RSDNC_F_NM ,A.AML_CUST_ID AS AML_CUST_ID ,A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO_VIEW ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'M001' ,A.CS_ST_CD) CS_ST_CD -- 고객상태 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.CS_RGST_DT) CS_RGST_DT -- 고객등록일자 ,CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_MNG_F='1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CS_EDD_MNG_F_NM -- EDD 대상 여부 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A002', A.CS_EDD_STS_CD) AS CS_EDD_ST_CD_NM -- EDD 등록 상태 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.AML_CRT_DT) AML_CRT_DT1 -- AML 생성일자 ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'A004', A.RSK_GRD_CD) RSK_GRD_CD -- 위험등급 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT( SUBSTR(A.CS_EDD_MK_DT, 1, 8) ) CS_EDD_MK_DT -- EDD 승인일자 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.RSK_GRD_RGST_DT) RSK_GRD_RGST_DT -- 위험등급등록일 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.CS_EDD_RFSL_DT) CS_EDD_RFSL_DT -- EDD거부일자 ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'A006', A.WL_TRD_CON_F) AS WL_TRD_CON_F_NM -- 거래여부 ,(SELECT I.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B I WHERE I.DPRT_CD = A.CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD) CS_EXCTN_BRN_CD_NM -- 개설지점 ,(SELECT J.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B J WHERE J.DPRT_CD = A.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD) CS_MANAG_BRN_CD_NM -- 관리지점 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.CS_EDD_REG_DT) CS_EDD_RGST_DT -- EDD 등록일자 ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'M004', A.NTN_CD) NTN_NM -- 국가 ,A.RSDNC_F ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'M044', A.DL_CHNNL_CD) DL_CHNNL_CD_NM -- 거래채널 ,CASE A.AC_OPN_PRXY_F WHEN 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AGT_YN -- 대리인여부 ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'M008', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) INDST_RSK_DVD_CD -- 업종코드 ,DECODE(A.INDV_CORP_CCD, '1', GET_CODE_NAME('M009', A.AML_JOB_GUBN), GET_CODE_NAME( 'M008', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) ) OCPTN_CD -- 직업/업종 ,(SELECT TRIM(Y.TEL_NO) FROM NIC04B Y WHERE Y.AML_CUST_ID = A.AML_CUST_ID AND Y.CNTC_TYP_CD = DECODE(A.INDV_CORP_CCD, '1', '1', '2') ) TEL_NO ,(SELECT RTRIM(Z.ADDR||' '|| Z.DNG_FLWG_ADDR) FROM NIC05B Z WHERE Z.AML_CUST_ID = A.AML_CUST_ID AND Z.ADDR_TYP_CD= DECODE(A.INDV_CORP_CCD, '1', '1', '2') ) ADDR ,FN_DATE_FORMAT( (SELECT MIN(C.AC_OPN_DT ) AS AC_OPN_DT FROM NIC17B C WHERE C.AML_CUST_ID=A.AML_CUST_ID) ) AS AC_OPN_DT ,A.* FROM VIC01B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{INPUT_AML_CUST_ID}
AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD}

SELECT A.* ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT) BSNSG_FNDTN_DT_1 ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A013' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A014' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A015' ELSE '' END) AND B.CNTNT = A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD) FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD_NM -- 자금원천명
,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A016' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A017' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A018' ELSE 'A019' END) AND C.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_CD) DL_OBJ_CD_NM -- 거래목적명
,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD='A020' AND D.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD) DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드
,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD='A021' AND E.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD) DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드
,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD=(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND F.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD) EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금횟수코드
,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND G.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD) EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금횟수코드
,(SELECT H.CD_NM FROM NIC92B H WHERE H.CD=(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END) AND H.CNTNT=A.INVST_I_AMT_CD) INVST_I_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금액
,(SELECT I.CD_NM FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END) AND I.CNTNT = A.INVST_O_AMT_CD) INVST_O_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금액
,(SELECT J.CD_NM FROM NIC92B J WHERE J.CD='A026' AND J.CNTNT = A.MVAB_AMT) MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM
,(SELECT K.CD_NM FROM NIC92B K WHERE K.CD='A027' AND K.CNTNT = A.ESTT_AMT) RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM FROM VIC02B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID= #{AML_CUST_ID}
SELECT A.MN_DL_DPRT_CD FROM NIC17B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID}

SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID -- aml 고객id ,A.PRXY_NM -- 대리인명 ,A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD -- 대리인실명번호구분코드 ,(SELECT I.CD_NM FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD='M002' AND I.CNTNT = A.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM -- 실명번호구분명 ,A.PRXY_RNM_NO -- 대리인실명번호 ,A.PRXY_ADDR_CCD -- 대리인주소구분코드 ,(SELECT J.CD_NM FROM NIC92B J WHERE J.CD='M016' AND J.CNTNT = A.PRXY_ADDR_CCD) PRXY_ADDR_CCD_NM -- 주소구분명 ,A.PRXY_NTNLT_CD -- 대리인국적코드 ,(SELECT K.CD_NM FROM NIC92B K WHERE K.CD='M004' AND K.CNTNT = A.PRXY_NTNLT_CD) PRXY_NTNLT_CD_NM -- 국적명 ,A.PRXY_RLTNS_CD -- 대리인관계코드 ,A.PRXY_ADDR -- 대리인주소 ,A.PRXY_PST_NO -- 대리인우편번호 ,A.PRXY_HSE_TEL_NO -- 대리인자택전화번호 ,A.PRXY_MBL_TEL_NO -- 대리인휴대전화번호 ,A.PRXY_EMAIL -- 대리인이메일 ,A.FGNR_SEX_CD -- 외국인성별코드 ,(SELECT L.CD_NM FROM NIC92B L WHERE L.CD='M013' AND L.CNTNT = A.FGNR_SEX_CD) FGNR_SEX_CD_NM -- 성별명 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.FGNR_BRTDY) FGNR_BRTDY -- 외국인생년월일 ,A.FGNR_NTNLT_CD -- 외국인국적코드 ,(SELECT M.CD_NM FROM NIC92B M WHERE M.CD='M004' AND M.CNTNT = A.FGNR_NTNLT_CD) FGNR_NTNLT_CD -- 국적명 ,A.RGST_IND_TYP_CD -- 등록업종코드 ,(SELECT N.CD_NM FROM NIC92B N WHERE N.CD='M008' AND N.CNTNT = A.RGST_IND_TYP_CD) RGST_IND_TYP_CD_NM -- 업종 ,A.FNDTN_OBJ_NM AS PRXY_FDTN_OBJ_NM -- 설립목적명 ,A.RPRST_P_NM -- 대표자명 ,A.RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD -- 대표자실명번호구분코드 ,A.RPRST_P_RNM_NO -- 대표자실명번호 ,A.RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD -- 대표자국적코드 ,A.RPRST_P_TEL_NO -- 대표자전화번호 FROM NIC11B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID}

SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID -- 실명확인번호 ,A.MAIN_ACTN_ZONE_NM -- 주요활동지역 ,A.CMPNY_ORGNZTN_AND_STRCT_CNTNT -- 회사체계및구조내용 ,A.FNDTN_OBJ_NM -- 설립목적명 ,A.OTR_NPRFT_OGN_CNCT_RLTNS_CNTNT -- 타비영리기관협력관계내용 ,A.CRNBTN_P_INFO -- 기부자정보 ,A.BNFCR_INFO -- 수익자정보 ,A.FNDS_FND_OPRT_EXCT_INFO -- 자금펀드운영집행정보 FROM NIC12B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID}

SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID -- 실명확인번호 ,A.PEP_RLTNS_P_CCD -- 정치적인물관계자구분코드 ,A.SQ -- 일련번호 ,A.PEP_NM -- 정치적인물성명 ,A.PEP_RNM_NO -- 정치적인물실명번호 ,A.PEP_RLTNS_CD -- 정치적인물관계코드 ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD = 'A028' AND B.CNTNT = A.PEP_RLTNS_CD) PEP_RLTNS_CD_NM -- 정치적인물관계코드명 ,A.PEP_ADDR -- 정치적인물주소 ,A.PEP_CNTC_NO -- 정치적인물연락번호 FROM NIC13B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID}

SELECT A.* ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT) BSNSG_FNDTN_DT_1 ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD='M030' AND B.CNTNT = A.CORP_CCD) CORP_CCD_NM -- 법인구분
,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD='M031' AND C.CNTNT = A.LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD) LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD_NM -- 상장구분-국내
,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD='M032' AND D.CNTNT = A.LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD) LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD_NM -- 상장구분-국외 ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND E.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD) EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금횟수코드
,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND F.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD) EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금횟수코드 ,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A016' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A017' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A018' ELSE 'A019' END) AND G.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_CD) DL_OBJ_CD_NM -- 거래목적명 ,(SELECT H.CD_NM FROM NIC92B H WHERE H.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A013' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A014' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A015' ELSE '' END) AND H.CNTNT = A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD) FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD_NM FROM VIC03B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID}

SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID -- 실명확인번호 ,A.STKHD_CCD -- 주주구분코드 ,A.SQ -- 일련번호 ,A.STKHD_NM -- 주주명 ,A.QTA_R -- 지분율 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD STKHD_RNM_CNFR_CCD -- 실명확인구분코드 ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD='M002' AND B.CNTNT = A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) STKHD_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM -- 실명번호구분명 ,A.STKHD_RNMCNO -- 주주실명확인번호 ,A.PST_NO -- 우편번호 ,A.ADDR AS STKHD_ADDR -- 주소 ,A.TEL_NO AS STKHD_TEL_NO -- 연락처 ,A.NTNLT_CD -- 국적코드 ,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD='M004' AND C.CNTNT = A.NTNLT_CD) STKHD_NTNLT_CD_NM -- 국적명 FROM NIC15B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID}

SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD -- 고객EDD등록구분코드 ,A.TSK_CD -- 직종코드 ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD='M008' AND B.CNTNT = A.TSK_CD) TSK_CD_NM -- 직종 ,TRIM(A.OCPTN_CD) OCPTN_CD -- 직업코드 ,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD='M009' AND C.CNTNT = TRIM(A.OCPTN_CD) ) OCPTN_CD_NM -- 직업 ,A.WP_CMPNY_NM -- 회사명 ,A.INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD AS INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD -- 업종 ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD='M008' AND D.CNTNT = A.INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD) INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD_NM -- 업종 ,A.WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO -- 직장회사전화번호 ,A.BSMN_RNO -- 사업자번호 ,A.DPRT_NM -- 부서 ,A.PSTN_NM -- 직위 ,A.WP_CMPNY_ADDR -- 회사주소 ,FN_GDS_NAME(A.AML_CUST_ID, A.DL_GDS_CD) AS GDS_OPRT_CCD_NM -- goods ,A.EMAIL -- 이메일 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT) BSNSG_FNDTN_DT-- 사업체 설립일 ,A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD -- 자금원천 및 출처 ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A013' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A014' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A015' ELSE '' END) AND E.CNTNT = A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD) FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD_NM -- 자금원천명 ,A.DL_OBJ_CD -- 거래목적 ,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A016' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A017' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A018' ELSE 'A019' END) AND F.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_CD) DL_OBJ_CD_NM -- 거래목적명 ,A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD = 'A020' AND G.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD) DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD -- 거래목적계좌신규 ,(SELECT H.CD_NM FROM NIC92B H WHERE H.CD = 'A021' AND H.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD) DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,A.DL_GDS_CD -- 거래상품 ,(SELECT I.CD_NM FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD = 'M037' AND I.CNTNT = A.DL_GDS_CD) DL_GDS_CD_NM -- 거래상품명 ,A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD -- 예상거래입금횟수코드 ,(SELECT J.CD_NM FROM NIC92B J WHERE J.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND J.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD) EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금횟수코드 ,A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD -- 예상거래출금횟수코드 ,(SELECT K.CD_NM FROM NIC92B K WHERE K.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND K.CNTNT = A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD) EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금횟수코드 ,A.INVST_I_AMT_CD -- 예상거래입금액 ,(SELECT L.CD_NM FROM NIC92B L WHERE L.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END) AND L.CNTNT = A.INVST_I_AMT_CD) INVST_I_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금액 ,A.INVST_O_AMT_CD -- 예상거래입금액 ,(SELECT M.CD_NM FROM NIC92B M WHERE M.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END) AND M.CNTNT = A.INVST_O_AMT_CD) INVST_O_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금액 ,A.MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD -- 동산자산현황코드 ,(SELECT N.CD_NM FROM NIC92B N WHERE N.CD = 'A026' AND N.CNTNT = A.MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD) MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM ,A.RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD -- 부동산자산현황코드 ,(SELECT P.CD_NM FROM NIC92B P WHERE P.CD = 'A027' AND P.CNTNT = A.RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD) RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM FROM NIC10B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID= #{AML_CUST_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC26B (AML_CUST_ID ,RGST_TRGT_CCD ,RNM_CNFR_CCD ,WC_LIST_CCD ,EDD_SCRN_CCD ,EDD_ITEM_APRV_TRGT_CD ,CS_CDD_RGST_F ,CS_EDD_RGST_F ,UPT_DY_TM ,L_HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT D.AML_CUST_ID ,CASE WHEN D.RSK_GRD_CD='R' THEN '1' -- 거래거절 WHEN D.CS_EDD_MNG_F='1' AND D.CDD_CNT=0 AND D.EDD_CNT=0 THEN '4' WHEN D.CS_EDD_MNG_F='1' AND D.EDD_CNT=0 THEN '3' WHEN D.CS_EDD_MNG_F='1' THEN '3' WHEN D.CDD_F='1' AND D.CDD_CNT=0 THEN '2' ELSE '2' END RGST -- 등록구분 ,D.RNM_CNFR_CCD ,D.WC_LIST_CCD ,CASE WHEN D.INDV_CORP_CCD='1' THEN '0001' WHEN D.INDV_CORP_CCD='2' THEN '0002' WHEN D.CS_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','05','10') THEN '0001' WHEN D.CS_TYP_CD IN ('02','03','06','07','08','09','11') THEN '0002' ELSE '' END SCRN -- 화면번호 ,CASE WHEN D.CS_EDD_MNG_F='1' AND D.CS_EDD_MNG_CD IN ('1','2','3','4') THEN D.CS_EDD_MNG_CD ELSE '' END APRV ,CASE WHEN D.CDD_CNT=0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END CDD_F ,CASE WHEN D.EDD_CNT=0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END EDD_F ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} EMP FROM ( SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID ,'1' CDD_F ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD ,A.RSK_GRD_CD -- 위험등급 ,A.WC_LIST_CCD -- Watch ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD -- 개인 법인구분 ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.CS_EDD_MNG_F ,A.CS_EDD_MNG_CD ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC03B B WHERE B.AML_CUST_ID = A.AML_CUST_ID) AS CDD_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC10B C WHERE C.AML_CUST_ID = A.AML_CUST_ID) AS EDD_CNT FROM VIC01B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID= #{AML_CUST_ID} ) D

INSERT INTO NIC10B_LOG ( REG_LOG_DT ,AML_CUST_ID ,CS_EDD_RGST_CCD ,TSK_CD ,OCPTN_CD ,WP_CMPNY_NM ,INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD ,WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO ,BSMN_RNO ,DPRT_NM ,PSTN_NM ,WP_CMPNY_ADDR ,WP_CMPNY_PST_NO ,FGNR_SEX_CD ,FGNR_BRTDY ,FGNR_NTNLT_CD ,FGNR_PSPT_NO ,BSNSG_FNDTN_DT ,FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD ,DL_OBJ_CD ,DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD ,DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD ,EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD ,EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD ,DL_GDS_CD ,EMAIL ,INVST_I_AMT_CD ,INVST_O_AMT_CD ,MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD ,RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD ,RPRST_P_NM ,RPRST_P_RNM_NO ,RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD ,RPRST_P_ADDR ,RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO ,RPRST_P_TEL_NO ,HD_BRNCH_PST_NO ,HD_BRNCH_TEL_NO ,HD_BRNCH_ADDR ,EDD_REG_DT ,EDD_REP_DT ,BRN_CD ,HNDL_P_ENO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,CORP_CCD ,LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD ,LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD ,HMPG_ADDR ,FNDTN_OBJ_NM ,MAIN_ACTN_ZONE_NM ,CMPNY_ORGNZTN_AND_STRCT_CNTNT ,OTR_NPRFT_OGN_CNCT_RLTNS_CNTNT ,CRNBTN_P_INFO ,BNFCR_INFO ,FNDS_FND_OPRT_EXCT_INFO ) VALUES ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD ,A.TSK_CD ,A.OCPTN_CD ,A.WP_CMPNY_NM ,A.INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD ,A.WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO ,A.BSMN_RNO ,A.DPRT_NM ,A.PSTN_NM ,A.WP_CMPNY_ADDR ,A.WP_CMPNY_PST_NO ,A.FGNR_SEX_CD ,A.FGNR_BRTDY ,A.FGNR_NTNLT_CD ,A.FGNR_PSPT_NO ,A.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT ,A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD ,A.DL_OBJ_CD ,A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD ,A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD ,A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD ,A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD ,A.DL_GDS_CD ,A.EMAIL ,A.INVST_I_AMT_CD ,A.INVST_O_AMT_CD ,A.MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD ,A.RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD ,A.RPRST_P_NM ,A.RPRST_P_RNM_NO ,A.RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,A.RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD ,A.RPRST_P_ADDR ,A.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO ,A.RPRST_P_TEL_NO ,A.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO ,A.HD_BRNCH_TEL_NO ,A.HD_BRNCH_ADDR ,A.EDD_REG_DT ,A.EDD_REP_DT ,A.BRN_CD ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,C.CORP_CCD ,C.LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD ,C.LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD ,C.HMPG_ADDR ,B.FNDTN_OBJ_NM ,B.MAIN_ACTN_ZONE_NM ,B.CMPNY_ORGNZTN_AND_STRCT_CNTNT ,B.OTR_NPRFT_OGN_CNCT_RLTNS_CNTNT ,B.CRNBTN_P_INFO ,B.BNFCR_INFO ,B.FNDS_FND_OPRT_EXCT_INFO FROM NIC10B A, NIC12B B, NIC14B C WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID_HIDDEN} AND A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID(+) AND A.AML_CUST_ID = C.AML_CUST_ID(+) )
mapper.select: SELECT B.CS_NM, B.RNM_CNFR_CCD, B.INDV_CORP_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'M002', B.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM ,CASE B.RNM_CNFR_CCD WHEN '01' THEN SUBSTR(B.RNMCNO, 0,6) || '-' ||SUBSTR(B.RNMCNO, 7,7) WHEN '02' THEN SUBSTR(B.RNMCNO, 0,3) || '-' ||SUBSTR(B.RNMCNO, 4,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.RNMCNO, 6,5) ELSE B.RNMCNO END AS RNMCNO_VIEW ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(B.CS_RGST_DT) AS CS_RGST_DT -- 고객등록일자 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(B.AML_CRT_DT) AS AML_CRT_DT ,GET_CODE_NAME('A002', B.CS_EDD_STS_CD) AS CS_EDD_ST_CD_NM -- EDD 등록 상태 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(B.CS_EDD_REG_DT) AS CS_EDD_RGST_DT -- EDD 등록일자 ,CASE WHEN B.CS_EDD_MNG_F = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CS_EDD_MNG_F_NM -- EDD 대상 여부 ,B.CS_EDD_MNG_CD_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME( 'A004' , B.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_CD -- 위험등급 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(B.RSK_GRD_RGST_DT) AS RSK_GRD_RGST_DT -- 위험등급등록일 ,(SELECT RTRIM(Z.ADDR||' '|| Z.DNG_FLWG_ADDR) FROM NIC05B Z WHERE Z.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND Z.ADDR_TYP_CD = DECODE(B.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1','1','2') ) AS ADDR ,(SELECT TRIM(Y.TEL_NO) FROM NIC04B Y WHERE Y.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND Y.CNTC_TYP_CD = DECODE(B.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1','1','2') ) AS TEL_NO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('USER', TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_P_ENO),'') AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD='M008' AND D.CNTNT = A.TSK_CD) AS TSK_CD_NM -- 직종 ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD='M009' AND E.CNTNT = TRIM(A.OCPTN_CD) ) AS OCPTN_CD_NM -- 직업 ,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD='M008' AND F.CNTNT = A.INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD) AS INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD_NM -- 업종 ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT) AS BSNSG_FNDTN_DT-- 사업체 설립일 ,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A013' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A014' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A015' ELSE '' END) AND G.CNTNT = A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD) AS FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD_NM -- 자금원천명 ,(SELECT H.CD_NM FROM NIC92B H WHERE H.CD = (CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='1' THEN 'A016' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='2' THEN 'A017' WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD='3' THEN 'A018' ELSE 'A019' END) AND H.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_CD) AS DL_OBJ_CD_NM -- 거래목적명 ,(SELECT I.CD_NM FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD='A020' AND I.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD) AS DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,(SELECT J.CD_NM FROM NIC92B J WHERE J.CD='A021' AND J.CNTNT = A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD) AS DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD_NM -- 거래목적입출금코드 ,(SELECT K.CD_NM FROM NIC92B K WHERE K.CD='M037' AND K.CNTNT = A.DL_GDS_CD) AS DL_GDS_CD_NM -- 거래상품명 ,(SELECT L.CD_NM FROM NIC92B L WHERE L.CD=(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND L.CNTNT=A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD) AS EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금횟수코드 ,(SELECT M.CD_NM FROM NIC92B M WHERE M.CD=(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A022' ELSE 'A023' END) AND M.CNTNT=A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD) AS EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금횟수코드 ,(SELECT N.CD_NM FROM NIC92B N WHERE N.CD=(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END) AND N.CNTNT=A.INVST_I_AMT_CD) AS INVST_I_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래입금액 ,(SELECT P.CD_NM FROM NIC92B P WHERE P.CD=(CASE WHEN A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD IN ('1','2') THEN 'A024' ELSE 'A025' END) AND P.CNTNT=A.INVST_O_AMT_CD) AS INVST_O_AMT_CD_NM -- 예상거래출금액 ,(SELECT Q.CD_NM FROM NIC92B Q WHERE Q.CD='A026' AND Q.CNTNT=A.MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD) AS MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM ,(SELECT R.CD_NM FROM NIC92B R WHERE R.CD='A027' AND R.CNTNT=A.RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD) AS RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD_NM ,A.* FROM (SELECT FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'') AS REG_LOG_DT ,A.AML_CUST_ID, A.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD, A.TSK_CD, A.OCPTN_CD, A.WP_CMPNY_NM ,A.INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD, A.WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO, A.BSMN_RNO ,A.DPRT_NM ,A.PSTN_NM ,A.WP_CMPNY_ADDR ,A.WP_CMPNY_PST_NO ,A.FGNR_SEX_CD ,A.FGNR_NTNLT_CD, A.FGNR_PSPT_NO ,A.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT ,A.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD ,A.DL_OBJ_CD ,A.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD ,A.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD ,A.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD ,A.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD ,A.DL_GDS_CD ,A.EMAIL ,A.INVST_I_AMT_CD ,A.INVST_O_AMT_CD ,A.MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD, A.RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD ,A.RPRST_P_RNM_NO ,A.RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,A.RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD ,A.RPRST_P_ADDR ,A.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO, A.RPRST_P_TEL_NO ,A.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO ,A.HD_BRNCH_TEL_NO ,A.HD_BRNCH_ADDR ,A.EDD_REG_DT ,A.EDD_REP_DT ,A.BRN_CD ,A.HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC10B A, NIC12B B, NIC14B C WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} AND A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID(+) AND A.AML_CUST_ID = C.AML_CUST_ID(+) UNION ALL SELECT FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', TO_CHAR(S.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') ,S.AML_CUST_ID ,S.CS_EDD_RGST_CCD ,S.TSK_CD, S.OCPTN_CD ,S.WP_CMPNY_NM ,S.INDST_IND_TYP_LDVD_CD, S.WP_CMPNY_TEL_NO, S.BSMN_RNO ,S.DPRT_NM ,S.PSTN_NM ,S.WP_CMPNY_ADDR ,S.WP_CMPNY_PST_NO ,S.FGNR_SEX_CD ,S.FGNR_NTNLT_CD ,S.FGNR_PSPT_NO ,S.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT ,S.FNDS_WTHLD_AND_SRC_CD ,S.DL_OBJ_CD ,S.DL_OBJ_IO_AMT_CD ,S.DL_OBJ_AC_OPN_CD ,S.EXPCT_DL_I_AMT_TNO_CD ,S.EXPCT_DL_O_AMT_TNO_CD ,S.DL_GDS_CD ,S.EMAIL ,S.INVST_I_AMT_CD ,S.INVST_O_AMT_CD ,S.MPRPTY_ASTS_STTN_CD, S.RL_EST_ASTS_STTN_CD ,S.RPRST_P_RNM_NO ,S.RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,S.RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD ,S.RPRST_P_ADDR ,S.RPRST_P_HSE_PST_NO, S.RPRST_P_TEL_NO ,S.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO ,S.HD_BRNCH_TEL_NO ,S.HD_BRNCH_ADDR ,S.EDD_REG_DT ,S.EDD_REP_DT ,S.BRN_CD ,S.HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC10B_LOG S WHERE S.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} ) A ,VIC01B B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID ORDER BY A.REG_LOG_DT DESC

SELECT A.RQRM_DT ,A.RQRM_GRP_NO ,A.SEQ ,A.MNG_SNO ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A003', A.WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.WL_CS_NM ,A.WL_INDV_CORP_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', A.WL_INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM ,A.WL_NTNLT_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.WL_NTNLT_CD) AS WL_NTNLT_CD_NM ,A.WL_ADDR ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY ,A.WL_HIT_R ,NVL(A.WL_MAT_YN, '') AS WL_MAT_YN FROM NIC52B A WHERE A.RQRM_DT = #{RQRM_DT} AND A.RQRM_GRP_NO = #{RQRM_GRP_NO} AND A.SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT NVL((SELECT D.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B D WHERE D.DPRT_CD = A.DEAL_OGNZ_NO), A.DEAL_OGNZ_NO) AS DPRT_NM ,NVL(( SELECT C.USER_NM FROM C_USER C WHERE C.USER_ID = A.DEAL_PRAF_NO), A.DEAL_PRAF_NO) AS HNDL_P_ENO ,A.DAL_DT AS DL_DT ,CASE WHEN B.INDV_CORP_CCD = 1 THEN '개인' WHEN B.INDV_CORP_CCD = 2 THEN '법인' ELSE '' END AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('C209', A.ARB_SC_CD) AS ARB_SC_CD ,B.CS_NM AS CS_NM ,B.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO ,CASE WHEN A.KEY_SC = 'I' THEN '계약' WHEN A.KEY_SC = 'N' THEN '청약' END AS KEY_GUBUN ,CASE WHEN A.KEY_SC ='I' THEN A.GNL_AC_NO END AS GNL_AC_NO ,CASE WHEN A.KEY_SC ='N' THEN A.NWC_PPNU_NO END AS NWC_PPNU_NO ,A.RL_OWNR_YN AS RL_OWNR_YN ,B.AML_CUST_ID AS AML_CUST_ID ,A.RL_OWNR_BIRTH ,A.RL_OWNR_ENG_NM ,A.RL_OWNR_NM ,A.RL_OWNR_NNLT ,A.RL_OWNR_RDRE_NO ,A.TRA_YMD ,A.KEY_SC FROM NIC181B A ,NIC01B B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID
AND A.DEAL_OGNZ_NO = #{RL_OWNR_DPRT_CD}
AND A.TRA_YMD BETWEEN #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_SD} AND #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_ED}
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
AND A.RL_OWNR_YN = 'Y'
AND A.RL_OWNR_YN = 'N'

SELECT A.GDS_DIT_CD ,A.GDS_CD ,A.GDS_NM ,CASE WHEN A.GDS_DIT_CD = '03' THEN A.LEV1 WHEN A.LEV2 IS NULL OR A.LEV2 = '' THEN A.LEV1 ELSE A.LEV1||'_'||A.LEV2 END AS LEV ,A.LEV1 ,A.LEV2 ,TO_CHAR(A.GDS_MRK, '0.99') AS GDS_MRK ,A.RSK_GRD_CD ,A.FIU_GDS_NO ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,A.AML_CRT_DT FROM NIC45B A WHERE 1=1
AND A.GDS_DIT_CD = #{GDS_DIT_CD}
AND A.GDS_NM LIKE '%'||#{GDS_NM}||'%'
ORDER BY A.AML_CRT_DT DESC, A.GDS_CD ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC45B
mapper.select: SELECT A.CNTNT AS CODE ,A.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD IN ('GR00','M034')

SELECT A.MNG_SNO ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,( SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'A003' AND C.CNTNT = A.WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.NTV_FGNR_CCD ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD ,A.RNMCNO ,A.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO_ORG ,A.CS_NM ,A.NTN_CD ,A.NTN_NM ,A.ADDR ,A.PSPT_NO ,A.HNGL_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,'' AS COUNT ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,( SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD='M006' AND D.CNTNT = A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY ,A.ORG_NM ,CASE WHEN A.WL_REG_DT IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.WL_REG_DT,0,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_REG_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_REG_DT,7,2) ELSE A.WL_REG_DT END AS WL_REG_DT ,CASE WHEN A.WL_DEL_DT IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.WL_DEL_DT,0,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_DEL_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_DEL_DT,7,2) ELSE A.WL_DEL_DT END AS WL_DEL_DT ,A.NORM_YN ,A.APPL_YN ,A.LST_APPL_ID ,CASE WHEN A.APPL_DT IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.APPL_DT,0,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.APPL_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.APPL_DT,7,2) ELSE A.APPL_DT END AS APPL_DT ,A.APP_NO ,CASE WHEN X.APP_NO IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE X.SN_CCD END AS SN_CCD ,'WLL' AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,X.SNO ,X.WLR_SQ ,X.APP_DT -- 결재일자 ,CASE WHEN X.APP_NO IS NULL THEN '미결재' ELSE (SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'A038' AND E.CNTNT = X.SN_CCD ) -- A038 결재상태코드 END AS APP_ST -- 결재상태 ,CASE WHEN X.APP_NO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE (SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = X.TARGET_ROLE_ID) END AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재대상자 ,X.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,CASE WHEN X.APP_NO IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN #{ROLEID} = #{FIRST_APP_ID} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE CASE WHEN X.TARGET_ROLE_ID = #{FIRST_APP_ID} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS FIRST_GYLJ_ROLE_ID_YN -- 결재요청롤여부(준법 담당자 여부) FROM NIC19B A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM AML_APPR F WHERE F.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WLL' ) X ON A.APP_NO = X.APP_NO WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.AML_REF_DT = '99991231'

SELECT TO_CHAR(COUNT(*),'999,999,999') AS TOT_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999,999') AS ADD_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999,999') AS DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W010' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W010_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W020' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W020_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W030' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W030_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W040' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W040_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W010' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W010_DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W020' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W020_DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W030' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W030_DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W040' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W040_DEL_CNT FROM NIC19B A
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC19B A WHERE A.AML_REF_DT = '99991231' AND A.NORM_YN = 'Y' -- 정상
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC19B A SET A.APPL_YN = 'Y' ,A.NORM_YN = 'Y' ,A.WL_DEL_DT = NULL ,A.APP_NO = A.PRV_APP_NO ,A.AML_REF_DT = A.APPL_DT WHERE A.AML_REF_DT = '99991231' AND A.NORM_YN = 'N' -- 삭제
mapper.select: SELECT X.APP_NO -- 현재결재ID ,Y.SN_CCD -- 현재결재상태 ,Y.TARGET_ROLE_ID -- 결재대상자 FROM ( SELECT B.APP_NO FROM NIC19B B WHERE B.AML_REF_DT = '99991231' AND B.APPL_YN = 'N' AND NULLIF(TRIM(B.APP_NO), '') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.APP_NO ) X LEFT JOIN AML_APPR Y ON Y.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WLL' AND Y.APP_NO = X.APP_NO
mapper.update: INSERT INTO NIC19B(MNG_SNO, WC_LIST_CCD, NTV_FGNR_CCD, RNM_CNFR_CCD, INDV_CORP_CCD, RNMCNO, CS_NM, NTN_CD, NTN_NM, ADDR, HNGL_NM, PSPT_NO, WL_BIRTHDAY, ORG_NM, WL_REG_DT, WL_DEL_DT, NORM_YN, APPL_YN, LST_APPL_ID, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO) VALUES(#{MNG_SNO}, #{WC_LIST_CCD}, #{NTV_FGNR_CCD}, #{RNM_CNFR_CCD}, #{INDV_CORP_CCD}, #{RNMCNO}, #{CS_NM}, #{NTN_CD}, #{NTN_NM}, #{ADDR}, #{HNGL_NM}, #{PSPT_NO}, #{WL_BIRTHDAY}, #{ORG_NM}, #{WL_REG_DT}, #{WL_DEL_DT}, #{NORM_YN}, 'N', #{LST_APPL_ID}, TO_DATE(#{HNDL_DY_TM}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{HNDL_P_ENO})

UPDATE NIC19B A SET A.APPL_YN = CASE WHEN A.NORM_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN A.NORM_YN = 'N' THEN 'N' END ,A.APPL_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,A.LST_APPL_ID = #{LST_APPL_ID} ,A.AML_REF_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') WHERE A.AML_REF_DT = '99991231'
mapper.select: SELECT A.SRCH_RSLT_DT ,A.SQ ,NVL(A.WC_UID, A.MNG_SNO) AS MNG_SNO -- 관리번호 FACTIVA : WC_UID ,A.RLT_SRCH_SQ ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'A011' AND E.CNTNT = C.GRP_CD) AS WC_LIST_GRP ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,A.NTNLT_CD ,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = 'M004' AND F.CNTNT = A.NTNLT_CD) AS NTNLT_NM ,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD = 'M006' AND G.CNTNT = A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_NM ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.ADDR AS ADDR ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY ,C.CD_NM AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.CS_NM ,A.HIT_R ,A.CHC_YN ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,A.WC_UID ,A.WL_NM_FIRST ,A.WL_NM_LAST -- ,CASE WHEN CHC_YN='1' THEN 'Y' ELSE '' END CHC_YN FROM NIC22B A, NIC92B C WHERE A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = #{SRCH_RSLT_DT} AND A.SQ = #{SQ} AND C.CD IN ('A003', 'W020') AND C.CNTNT = A.WC_LIST_CCD ORDER BY A.HIT_R DESC, A.MNG_SNO, A.WC_LIST_CCD

SELECT NIC22.MNG_SNO /* 관리번호 */ , CASE WHEN NIC92.GRP_CD = '1' THEN '금융거래거절대상' WHEN NIC92.GRP_CD = '2' THEN 'EDD수행/거래대상' ELSE NULL END AS WC_LIST_FLG_NM /* 조치 */ , NIC92.CD_NM /* 적출기준 */ , NIC22.HIT_R /* 정확도 */ , NIC22.CS_NM /* 영문명 */ , NULL AS PSPT_NO /* 여권번호 */ , NIC22.WL_BIRTHDAY /* 생년월일 */ , NULL AS SEX_NM /* 성별 */ , (SELECT NIC92.CD_NM FROM NIC92B NIC92 WHERE NIC92.CD = 'S004' AND NIC92.CNTNT = NIC22.NTNLT_CD) AS NTN_NM /* 소속국가 */ , NIC22.SRCH_RSLT_DT , NIC22.SQ FROM NIC22B NIC22 , NIC92B NIC92 WHERE NIC22.SRCH_RSLT_DT = #{SRCH_RSLT_DT } AND NIC22.SQ = #{SQ } AND NIC92.CD(+) = 'A003' AND NIC92.CNTNT(+) = NIC22.WC_LIST_CCD ORDER BY NIC22.MNG_SNO

SELECT DISTINCT NIC21.RNMCNO , NIC22.MNG_SNO /* 관리번호 */ , CASE WHEN NIC92.GRP_CD = '1' THEN '금융거래거절대상' WHEN NIC92.GRP_CD = '2' THEN 'EDD수행/거래대상' ELSE NULL END AS WC_LIST_FLG_NM /* 조치 */ , NIC92.CD_NM /* 적출기준 */ , NIC22.HIT_R /* 정확도 */ , NIC22.CS_NM /* 영문명 */ , NULL AS PSPT_NO /* 여권번호 */ , NIC22.WL_BIRTHDAY /* 생년월일 */ , NIC22.SEX , CASE WHEN NIC22.SEX = '1' THEN '남' WHEN NIC22.SEX = '2' THEN '여' ELSE NULL END AS SEX_NM /* 성별 */ , (SELECT NIC92.CD_NM FROM NIC92B NIC92 WHERE NIC92.CD = 'S004' AND NIC92.CNTNT = NIC22.NTNLT_CD) AS NTN_NM /* 소속국가 */ , NIC22.SRCH_RSLT_DT , NIC22.SQ FROM NIC22B NIC22 , NIC92B NIC92 , NIC21B NIC21 WHERE NIC92.CNTNT(+) = NIC22.WC_LIST_CCD AND NIC22.SQ = NIC21.SQ AND NIC22.SRCH_RSLT_DT = NIC21.SRCH_RSLT_DT AND NIC22.RNMCNO = NIC21.RNMCNO AND NIC92.CD(+) = 'A003' AND NIC22.SRCH_RSLT_DT = #{SRCH_RSLT_DT} AND NIC22.SQ = #{SQ} AND NIC21.RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ORDER BY NIC22.MNG_SNO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WL_INDEX_LOG(EXEC_DT, EXEC_YN, REG_CNT, DESC_CTNT) VALUES (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'Y', #{REG_CNT}, #{DESC_CTNT})
mapper.select:
SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,A.CD -- 코드 ,A.CD_NM -- 코드명 ,A.CD_LNGTH -- 코드길이 ,A.CCD -- 구분코드 ,A.STND_CD_NM -- 표준코드명 ,A.TBL_NM -- 테이블명 ,A.MDFY_F -- 수정여부 ,A.CD_EXPL -- 코드설명 ,A.HNDL_DY_TM -- 처리일시 ,GET_USER_NAME(A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_ENO -- 처리자사번 ,'N' AS ISNEW ,'' AS CCD_O ,'' AS CD_O FROM NIC91B A WHERE 1=1
AND A.CCD = #{CCD}
AND (UPPER(A.CD) LIKE UPPER(#{CDN})||'%' OR UPPER(A.CD_NM) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#{CDN})||'%')
ORDER BY A.CD
SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR(A.CD, 1, 1) AS CODE ,SUBSTR(A.CD, 1, 1) AS NAME FROM NIC91B A
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC92B ( CD , CNTNT , CD_NM , USE_F, CD_RNK_SQ ,GRP_CD , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{CD} AS CD ,A.CNTNT -- 국가2자리 ,A.CD_NM -- 국가명 ,A.USE_F -- 사용여부 ,(SELECT MAX(B.CD_RNK_SQ)+1 FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD = 'S002' ) AS CD_RNK_SQ -- 순번 ,A.GRP_CD ,TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} AS HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'M004' AND A.CNTNT = #{CNTNT}

INSERT INTO AML_APPR( APP_NO, GYLJ_LINE_G_C, NUM_SQ, APP_DT, WLR_SQ ,REG_DT, SNO, APPR_ROLE_ID, TARGET_ROLE_ID ,SN_CCD, BRN_CD, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( #{APP_NO } -- APP_NO ,#{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} -- GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,( SELECT DECODE(MAX(A.NUM_SQ) + 1, NULL, 1, MAX(A.NUM_SQ) + 1 ) FROM AML_APPR A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} ) -- NUM_SQ ,REPLACE( #{APP_DT} , '-', '' ) -- APP_DT ,#{WLR_SQ} -- WLR_SQ ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') --REG_DT ,DECODE(#{SN_CCD}, 'S', (SELECT MAX(B.SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D B WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C}) ,(SELECT MIN(C.SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D C WHERE C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C}) ) -- SNO ,#{APPR_ROLE_ID} -- APPR_ROLE_ID 결재한사람 ,( SELECT DECODE(#{SN_CCD} ,'R' , D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID, D.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID) FROM C_GYLJ_D D WHERE D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND D.SNO = DECODE(#{SN_CCD}, 'S', (SELECT MAX(E.SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D E WHERE E.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C}) ,(SELECT MIN(F.SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D F WHERE F.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C}) ) ) -- TARGET_ROLE_ID 결제대상자 ,( SELECT DECODE(#{SN_CCD}, 'R', 'R', DECODE(G.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID , 0 , 'E', #{SN_CCD}) ) FROM C_GYLJ_D G WHERE G.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND G.SNO = DECODE(#{SN_CCD}, 'S', (SELECT MAX(H.SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D H WHERE H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C}) ,(SELECT MIN(I.SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D I WHERE I.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C}) ) ) -- SN_CCD ,#{BRN_CD} -- BRN_CD ,SYSDATE -- HNDL_DY_TM ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} -- HNDL_P_ENO )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC19B_APPR_CNT A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} AND A.APP_DT = REPLACE( #{APP_DT } , '-', '' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC19B_APPR_CNT ( APP_NO ,APP_DT ,WL_TOTAL_CNT ,WL_REG_CNT ,WL_DEL_CNT ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{APP_NO} ,REPLACE( #{APP_DT } , '-', '' ) ,COUNT(*) AS WL_TOTAL_CNT ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.NORM_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WL_REG_CNT ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.NORM_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WL_DEL_CNT ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC19B A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

INSERT INTO NIC19B_APPR_HISTORY (APP_NO ,MNG_SNO ,WC_LIST_CCD ,NTV_FGNR_CCD ,RNM_CNFR_CCD ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,RNMCNO ,CS_NM ,NTN_CD ,NTN_NM ,ADDR ,HNGL_NM ,PSPT_NO ,WL_BIRTHDAY ,ORG_NM ,WL_REG_DT ,WL_DEL_DT ,NORM_YN ,APPL_YN ,APPL_DT ,LST_APPL_ID ,PRV_APP_NO ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{APP_NO} ,A.MNG_SNO ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,A.NTV_FGNR_CCD ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.RNMCNO ,A.CS_NM ,A.NTN_CD ,A.NTN_NM ,A.ADDR ,A.HNGL_NM ,A.PSPT_NO ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY ,A.ORG_NM ,A.WL_REG_DT ,A.WL_DEL_DT ,A.NORM_YN ,A.APPL_YN ,A.APPL_DT ,A.LST_APPL_ID ,A.PRV_APP_NO ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC19B A WHERE A.AML_REF_DT = '99991231'
mapper.select: SELECT (CONCAT(#{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } , NULLIF( LPAD( NVL( MAX( REPLACE(R.APP_NO, #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C},'') ) + 1, 1), 7, 0), '' ) ) ) AS APP_NO FROM AML_APPR R WHERE 1 = 1 AND R.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C }
SELECT AML_APPR_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS APP_NO FROM DUAL

SELECT #{APP_NO} AS APP_NO -- APP_NO ,#{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C -- GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,( AML_APPR_HIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL ) AS NUM_SQ -- NUM_SQ ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APP_DT -- APP_DT ,#{WLR_SQ} AS WLR_SQ -- WLR_SQ ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT -- REG_DT ,CASE WHEN #{FIRST_SNO} IS NOT NULL THEN #{FIRST_SNO} ELSE ( SELECT NVL(MAX(A.SNO), 0) + 1 ||'' FROM AML_APPR A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) END AS SNO -- SNO END ,( SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD} = 'R' THEN 'R' WHEN #{SN_CCD} = 'RR' THEN 'RR' WHEN #{SN_CCD} = 'RS' THEN 'RS' WHEN #{SN_CCD} = 'DD' THEN 'DD' WHEN B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID = 0 THEN 'E' ELSE #{SN_CCD} END FROM C_GYLJ_D B WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND B.SNO = CASE WHEN #{FIRST_SNO} IS NOT NULL THEN #{FIRST_SNO} ELSE ( SELECT NVL(MAX(C.SNO), 0) + 1 ||'' FROM AML_APPR C WHERE C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND C.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) END ) AS SN_CCD ,#{BRN_CD} AS BRN_CD -- BRN_CD ,#{APPR_ROLE_ID} AS APPR_ROLE_ID -- APPR_ROLE_ID ,( SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD } = 'R' THEN D.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE D.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_D D WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } AND D.SNO = CASE WHEN #{FIRST_SNO} IS NOT NULL THEN #{FIRST_SNO} ELSE ( SELECT NVL(MAX(E.SNO), 0) + 1 ||'' FROM AML_APPR E WHERE E.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND E.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) END ) AS TARGET_ROLE_ID -- TARGET_ROLE_ID ,#{RSN_CNTNT} AS RSN_CNTNT -- RSN_CNTNT ,#{PRV_APP_NO, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS PRV_APP_NO -- PRV_APP_NO ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} AS HNDL_P_ENO -- HNDL_P_ENO FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AML_APPR ( GYLJ_LINE_G_C, NUM_SQ, SNO ,APP_DT, WLR_SQ, APP_NO ,REG_DT ,APPR_ROLE_ID, TARGET_ROLE_ID, SN_CCD ,BRN_CD, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } -- GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,( SELECT NVL(MAX(A.NUM_SQ) + 1, 1) FROM AML_APPR A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } ) -- NUM_SQ ,( SELECT NVL(MAX(B.SNO),0) + 1 FROM AML_APPR B WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } AND B.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) -- SNO ,REPLACE( #{APP_DT } , '-', '' ) -- APP_DT ,#{WLR_SQ } -- WLR_SQ ,#{APP_NO } -- APP_NO ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- REG_DT ,#{APPR_ROLE_ID } -- APPR_ROLE_ID 결재한사람 ,(SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD } = 'R' THEN C.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE C.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_D C WHERE C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } AND C.SNO = #{SNO} ) -- TARGET_ROLE_ID 결제대상자 ,(SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD } = 'R' THEN 'R' WHEN D.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID = 0 THEN 'E' ELSE #{SN_CCD } END FROM C_GYLJ_D D WHERE D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } AND D.SNO = #{SNO} ) -- SN_CCD ,#{BRN_CD} -- BRN_CD ,SYSDATE -- HNDL_DY_TM ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} -- HNDL_P_ENO )

INSERT INTO AML_APPR ( GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,NUM_SQ ,SNO ,APP_DT ,WLR_SQ ,APP_NO ,REG_DT ,APPR_ROLE_ID ,TARGET_ROLE_ID ,SN_CCD ,BRN_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } -- GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,( SELECT NVL(MAX(A.NUM_SQ) + 1, 1) FROM AML_APPR A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } ) -- NUM_SQ , NVL(#{SNO }, 0) -- SNO , REPLACE( #{APP_DT } , '-', '' ) -- APP_DT , #{WLR_SQ } -- WLR_SQ , #{APP_NO } -- APP_NO , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- REG_DT , #{APPR_ROLE_ID } -- APPR_ROLE_ID 결재한사람 , (SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD } = 'R' THEN B.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_D B WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } AND B.SNO = #{SNO } ) -- TARGET_ROLE_ID 결제대상자 , #{SN_CCD } -- SN_CCD , #{BRN_CD} -- BRN_CD , SYSDATE -- HNDL_DY_TM , #{HNDL_P_ENO} -- HNDL_P_ENO )
mapper.select:
WITH AML_APPR_INFO AS ( SELECT E.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,E.NUM_SQ ,E.APP_DT ,E.APP_NO ,E.WLR_SQ ,E.REG_DT ,E.SN_CCD ,CASE WHEN E.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN E.MAX_SNO ELSE E.MIN_SNO END AS SNO FROM ( SELECT X.GYLJ_LINE_G_C, X.NUM_SQ ,MIN(X.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD ,X.APP_DT, X.APP_NO, X.WLR_SQ ,MIN(X.REG_DT) AS REG_DT ,MIN(D.SNO) AS MIN_SNO ,MAX(D.SNO) AS MAX_SNO FROM ( SELECT A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,A.APP_DT, A.APP_NO, A.WLR_SQ ,MAX(A.NUM_SQ) AS NUM_SQ FROM AML_APPR A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C, A.APP_DT, A.APP_NO, A.WLR_SQ ) B ,AML_APPR X ,C_GYLJ_M C ,C_GYLJ_D D WHERE X.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND X.NUM_SQ = B.NUM_SQ AND X.APP_DT = B.APP_DT AND X.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND X.WLR_SQ = B.WLR_SQ AND C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = X.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = CASE WHEN X.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN X.APPR_ROLE_ID ELSE X.TARGET_ROLE_ID END AND 1 = CASE WHEN X.SN_CCD = 'R' AND D.SNO < X.SNO THEN 1 WHEN X.SN_CCD = 'S' AND D.SNO > X.SNO THEN 1 WHEN X.SN_CCD = 'E' AND D.SNO = X.SNO THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
AND X.REG_DT BETWEEN #{REG_DT_SD} AND #{REG_DT_ED}
GROUP BY X.GYLJ_LINE_G_C, X.NUM_SQ, X.APP_DT, X.APP_NO, X.WLR_SQ ) E ) SELECT G.GYLJ_LINE_NM AS GUBUN -- WLL_WATCHLIST목록__WLR_WATCHLIST검색결과 ,Y.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,Y.NUM_SQ -- 등록번호(순차적순번) ,Y.APP_DT -- 최초결제일자(FKEY_WLL_WL_REG_DT__WLR_SRCH_RSLT_DT) ,Y.WLR_SQ -- WATCHLSIT검색결과_순번(FKEY) ,Y.APP_NO -- 고액자산가 리스트 조회_결재번호(FKEY) ,Y.REG_DT -- 등록/수정일자(최종결제일자) ,H.SNO -- 결재순번 C_GYLJ_D.SNO(FKEY) ,CONCAT(H.SNO , '단계') AS SNO_NM ,H.GYLJ_ROLE_ID AS ROLE_ID -- 결재대상자 ,( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = H.GYLJ_ROLE_ID ) AS ROLE_NM -- 결제대상자 ,H.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID -- 다음결재자 ,( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = H.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_NM -- 다음결제자 ,H.RTN_ROLE_ID -- 반려결재자 ,( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = H.RTN_ROLE_ID ) AS RTN_ROLE_NM -- 반려자 ,( SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A038' AND D.CNTNT = Y.SN_CCD ) AS SN_CCD_NM -- A038 결재상태코드 ,Y.SN_CCD ,Y.BRN_CD -- 등록점 ,TO_CHAR(Y.HNDL_DY_TM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS HNDL_DY_TM -- 처리일시 ,Y.HNDL_P_ENO -- 처리자사번 ,NVL(T.WL_TOTAL_CNT, '1') AS TOTCNT -- 총건수 ,NVL(T.WL_REG_CNT, '1') AS INSCNT -- 등록건수 ,NVL(T.WL_DEL_CNT, '0') AS DELCNT -- 삭제건수 ,P.TASK_DVCD --파견/겸임 구분값 ,P.ROLE_ID AS P_ROLE_ID --파견/겸임 부여된 롤 ,P.CHRG_P_ID --담당자 ,P.TGT_DEP_ID --파견에 부여된 부서 ,P.SEQ FROM AML_APPR_INFO F ,AML_APPR Y ,C_GYLJ_M G ,C_GYLJ_D H ,NIC19B_APPR_CNT T ,C_MULTI_POSITION P
,(SELECT DISTINCT L.ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE L ,( SELECT DISTINCT K.USER_ID FROM ( SELECT I.OFF_USER_ID AS USER_ID FROM C_OFF_DUTY_USER I WHERE 1 = 1 AND I.AGENT_USER_ID = #{USERID } AND I.DEL_YN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '000000' BETWEEN I.OFF_DUTY_START_DT AND I.OFF_DUTY_EXPECT_DT UNION ALL SELECT J.USER_ID FROM C_USER J WHERE 1 = 1 AND J.USER_ID = #{USERID } ) K ) M WHERE 1 = 1 AND L.USER_ID = M.USER_ID AND L.ROLE_ID = #{ROLEID } ) N
WHERE 1=1 AND Y.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = F.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND Y.NUM_SQ = F.NUM_SQ AND G.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = Y.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND H.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = G.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND H.SNO = F.SNO AND Y.APP_NO = P.APP_NO(+)
AND H.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = N.ROLE_ID
AND F.APP_NO = T.APP_NO(+)
AND Y.SN_CCD IN ('R','S')
AND Y.SN_CCD = #{SN_CCD}
AND Y.REG_DT BETWEEN #{REG_DT_SD} AND #{REG_DT_ED}
ORDER BY Y.REG_DT DESC

SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM_SQ ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = A.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A038' AND D.CNTNT = A.SN_CCD ) AS SN_CCD_NM -- A038 결재상태코드 ,(SELECT E.USER_NM FROM C_USER E WHERE E.USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM FROM AML_APPR_HIST A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT '' AS SELECTED ,ROWNUM AS SEQ ,X.* FROM ( SELECT /*AML_10_17_01_01.getSearch*/ A.MNG_SNO ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD = 'A003' AND B.CNTNT = A.WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.NTV_FGNR_CCD ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD ,A.RNMCNO ,A.CS_NM ,TRIM(A.NTN_CD) AS NTN_CD ,A.NTN_NM ,A.ADDR ,A.PSPT_NO ,A.HNGL_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,'' AS COUNT ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD='M006' AND B.CNTNT = A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY ,A.ORG_NM ,CASE WHEN A.WL_REG_DT IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.WL_REG_DT,0,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_REG_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_REG_DT,7,2) ELSE A.WL_REG_DT END AS WL_REG_DT ,CASE WHEN A.WL_DEL_DT IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.WL_DEL_DT,0,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_DEL_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.WL_DEL_DT,7,2) ELSE A.WL_DEL_DT END AS WL_DEL_DT ,A.NORM_YN ,A.APPL_YN ,A.LST_APPL_ID ,CASE WHEN A.APPL_DT IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(A.APPL_DT,0,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.APPL_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.APPL_DT,7,2) ELSE A.APPL_DT END AS APPL_DT ,(SELECT B.CD_NM FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD = 'A038' AND B.CNTNT = A.SN_CCD ) AS SN_CCD_NM -- A038 결재상태코드 ,DECODE(S.SN_CCD, NULL, '', CONCAT(CONCAT(S.SN_CCD,'||'), S.APPR_ROLE_ID) ) AS SN_CCD -- 결재상태 ,S.APPR_ROLE_ID FROM NIC19B_APPR_HISTORY A ,( SELECT D.NUM_SQ AS NUM_SQ, D.APP_DT, D.REG_DT, D.SNO, D.APPR_ROLE_ID, D.SN_CCD FROM AML_APPR D WHERE 1=1 AND D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND ( D.APP_DT, D.SNO ) IN ( SELECT E.APP_DT, MAX(E.SNO) FROM AML_APPR E WHERE 1=1 AND E.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} GROUP BY E.APP_DT ) ) S WHERE A.APPL_DT = S.APP_DT AND A.APPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.WC_LIST_CCD, A.NTV_FGNR_CCD, A.NTN_CD ) X

SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS RQRM_DT ,CASE WHEN MAX(A.RQRM_GRP_NO) IS NULL THEN 'KYE' || LPAD(NVL(MAX(A.RQRM_GRP_NO), 0) + 1, 7, 0) ELSE 'KYE' || LPAD(MAX(TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.RQRM_GRP_NO, 'KYE', ''), '0', '') ) ) + 1, 7, 0) END AS RQRM_GRP_NO FROM NIC51B A WHERE A.RQRM_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')

SELECT ROWNUM AS NO ,'1' AS CK_VAL ,A.RQRM_DT ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.RQRM_DT) AS RQRM_DT_F ,A.RQRM_GRP_NO ,A.SEQ ,A.RQRM_DEP_CD ,(SELECT D.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B D WHERE D.DPRT_CD = A.RQRM_DEP_CD) AS RQRM_DEP_CD_NM ,A.CS_NM ,A.ENG_NM ,A.NTNLT_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.NTNLT_CD) AS NTNLT_CD_NM ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.BIRTHDAY) AS BIRTHDAY ,A.RQRM_ID ,A.WL_CRT_DT ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.WL_CRT_DT) AS WL_CRT_DT_F ,A.EMP_NO FROM NIC51B A WHERE A.WL_CRT_DT IS NULL

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.RLT_CD ,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'A915' AND C.CNTNT = A.RLT_CD) AS RLT_NM ,A.RLT_SQ ,A.CS_NM ,A.ENG_CS_NM ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'M006' AND C.CNTNT = A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM ,A.NTN_CD ,A.NTN_NM ,A.SEX ,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'M013' AND C.CNTNT = A.SEX) AS SEX_NM ,A.DOB ,A.APPL_YN ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,A.APP_NO ,A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC27B A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} ORDER BY A.RLT_CD

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ ,A.RLT_CD ,A.RLT_SQ ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A003' AND D.CNTNT = A.WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.MNG_SNO ,A.CS_NM ,A.HIT_R ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'M006' AND D.CNTNT = A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_NM ,A.NTNLT_CD ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'M004' AND D.CNTNT = A.NTNLT_CD) AS NTNLT_NM ,A.ADDR ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY ,A.CHC_YN_TM ,A.WC_UID ,A.SEX ,A.WL_NM_FIRST ,A.WL_NM_MIDDLE ,A.WL_NM_LAST ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('USER', TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_P_ENO), '') AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM ,A.APPL_YN ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,A.START_DT ,A.END_DT ,P.SN_CCD ,P.APP_NO ,SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,7,2) AS APP_DT ,CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN '미결재' ELSE (SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A038' AND D.CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) -- A038 결재상태코드 END AS APP_ST ,P.GYLJ_ROLE_NM AS APP_NM ,P.APPR_ROLE_NM ,P.TARGET_ROLE_NM ,P.SNO ,P.NUM_SQ ,'WHL' AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,P.WLR_SQ FROM NIC27B_RSLT A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.SNO ,M.APP_DT ,M.WLR_SQ ,M.REG_DT ,M.SN_CCD ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결제한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결제할사람 ,S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID -- 결재한 사람ID ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID) AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM ,M.NUM_SQ ,M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,M.APP_NO FROM AML_APPR M, C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WHL' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND (M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ) IN ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(T PK_AML_APPR)*/ T.APP_NO, MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WHL' GROUP BY T.APP_NO ) ) P ON (A.APP_NO = P.APP_NO) WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} AND A.RLT_CD = #{RLT_CD} AND A.RLT_SQ = #{RLT_SQ} ORDER BY A.HNDL_DY_TM

SELECT TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.RLT_CD ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A915' AND D.CNTNT = A.RLT_CD) AS RLT_NM ,A.RLT_SQ ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'A003' AND C.CNTNT = A.WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.MNG_SNO ,A.CS_NM ,A.SEQ ,A.DEL_YN FROM NIC27B_LOG A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} AND A.RLT_CD = #{RLT_CD} AND A.RLT_SQ = #{RLT_SQ} AND A.DEL_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SEQ
mapper.update: MERGE INTO NIC27B T USING DUAL ON ( T.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.APPL_YN = 'N' ,T.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE ,T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{USER_ID} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.AML_CUST_ID ,T.APPL_YN ,T.HNDL_DY_TM ,T.HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( #{AML_CUST_ID} ,'N' ,SYSDATE ,#{USER_ID} )
mapper.select: SELECT T1.* , CASE WHEN T1.TOTALCOUNT-T1.Y_CNT-T1.N_CNT= 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS COMP_YN FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT , SUM(CASE WHEN C.CHC_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS Y_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN C.CHC_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS N_CNT FROM NIC21B_APPR A INNER JOIN NIC21B B ON A.SRCH_RQS_REG_NO = B.SRCH_RQS_REG_NO AND A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = B.SRCH_RSLT_DT INNER JOIN NIC22B C ON B.SRCH_RSLT_DT = C.SRCH_RSLT_DT AND B.SQ = C.SQ WHERE A.SRCH_RQS_REG_NO = #{SRCH_RQS_REG_NO} ) T1

SELECT A.ID ,A.CS_NM ,A.CORP_RGST_NO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', A.CORP_RGST_NO, '') AS CORP_RGST_NO_VIEW ,A.EXG_NM ,A.BNK_CD ,C.TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL AS BNK_CD_NM ,A.KWRD ,A.ETC_INFO ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,B.USER_NM AS ENO_NM FROM NIC28B A LEFT JOIN C_USER B ON A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN NIC95B C ON A.BNK_CD = C.TRNSFRM_CD WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(A.CS_NM) LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(UPPER(#{CS_NM}), '%') )
AND UPPER(A.KWRD) LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(UPPER(#{KWRD}), '%') )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC28B ( ID, CORP_RGST_NO, CS_NM, EXG_NM, BNK_CD, KWRD, ETC_INFO, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( NIC28B_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{CORP_RGST_NO_VIEW, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{CS_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{EXG_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{BNK_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{KWRD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ETC_INFO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{HNDL_P_ENO} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NIC28B
mapper.select: SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID FROM NIC27B A INNER JOIN NIC27B_RSLT B ON A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND A.RLT_CD = B.RLT_CD AND A.RLT_SQ = B.RLT_SQ WHERE 1=1 AND (B.AML_CUST_ID, B.RLT_CD, B.RLT_SQ, B.WC_LIST_CCD, B.MNG_SNO, B.CS_NM) IN ( SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID, B.RLT_CD, B.RLT_SQ, B.WC_LIST_CCD, B.MNG_SNO, B.CS_NM FROM NIC21B A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC22B B ON A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = B.SRCH_RSLT_DT AND A.SQ = B.SQ WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} AND A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = #{SRCH_RSLT_DT} AND A.SRCH_RQS_REG_NO = #{SRCH_RQS_REG_NO} )

SELECT A.AML_CUST_ID AS AML_CUST_ID ,A.CS_NM ,A.ENG_CS_NM ,A.NTN_CD ,A.RLT_CD ,A.RLT_SQ ,B.WC_LIST_CCD ,B.MNG_SNO ,B.CS_NM AS WATCHLIST_NM ,B.HIT_R ,B.INDV_CORP_CCD ,B.NTNLT_CD ,B.ADDR ,B.WL_BIRTHDAY ,TO_CHAR(B.CHC_YN_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHC_YN_TM ,B.WC_UID ,B.SEX ,B.WL_NM_FIRST ,B.WL_NM_MIDDLE ,B.WL_NM_LAST FROM NIC21B A, NIC22B B WHERE A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = B.SRCH_RSLT_DT AND A.SQ = B.SQ AND A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = #{SRCH_RSLT_DT} AND A.SRCH_RQS_REG_NO = #{SRCH_RQS_REG_NO} AND (A.AML_CUST_ID, A.RLT_CD, A.RLT_SQ, B.WC_LIST_CCD, B.MNG_SNO, B.CS_NM) NOT IN (SELECT X.AML_CUST_ID, X.RLT_CD, X.RLT_SQ, X.WC_LIST_CCD, X.MNG_SNO, X.CS_NM FROM NIC27B_RSLT X WHERE X.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC27B_RSLT ( AML_CUST_ID, RLT_CD, RLT_SQ, MNG_SNO, CS_NM ,WC_LIST_CCD, HIT_R, INDV_CORP_CCD, NTNLT_CD, ADDR ,WL_BIRTHDAY, CHC_YN_TM, WC_UID, SEX, WL_NM_FIRST ,WL_NM_MIDDLE, WL_NM_LAST, START_DT, END_DT, HNDL_DY_TM, HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( #{AML_CUST_ID}, #{RLT_CD}, #{RLT_SQ}, #{MNG_SNO}, #{WATCHLIST_NM}, #{WC_LIST_CCD}, #{HIT_R}, #{INDV_CORP_CCD}, #{NTNLT_CD}, #{ADDR}, #{WL_BIRTHDAY}, TO_DATE(#{CHC_YN_TM}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{WC_UID}, #{SEX}, #{WL_NM_FIRST}, #{WL_NM_MIDDLE}, #{WL_NM_LAST}, #{START_DT}, #{END_DT}, SYSDATE, #{USER_ID} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.NTN_CD ,A.HIGH_RISK_YN ,A.FATF_ACT_YN ,A.FATF_MNTR_YN ,A.FATF_MEM_YN ,A.OECD_AVOID_YN ,A.TICPI_CORR_IDX ,A.TICPI_CORR_IDX_SCR ,A.OFAC_SDN_YN ,A.INCSR_YN ,A.CSTM_AVOID_YN ,A.TOTAL_SCR ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,(SELECT NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N') AS SN_CCD FROM RA_ITEM A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.LST_APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001') AS RS31_U FROM AML_NTN_SCR A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.NTN_CD
SELECT A.NTN_CD AS C1 ,TO_CHAR(A.TOTAL_SCR, 'FM9990.99') AS R1 FROM AML_NTN_SCR A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.NTN_CD
SELECT A.CNTNT AS NTN_CD FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'M004' ORDER BY A.CNTNT

SELECT X.REG_LOG_DT -- 변경일자 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.REG_LOG_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_LOG_DT_DATE ,X.FILE_NAME -- 파일명 ,X.WC_LIST_CCD -- WATCHLIST 데이터 구분 ,X.NTV_FGNR_CCD -- 내외국인구분 ,(SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'A008' AND A.CNTNT = X.NTV_FGNR_CCD) AS NTV_FGNR_CCD_NM -- 내외국인구분명 ,X.CATEGORY -- 적재 구분 ,CASE WHEN X.CATEGORY IN ('Init') THEN '초기적재' WHEN X.CATEGORY IN ('Add') THEN '변경분추가' ELSE '' END AS CATEGORY_NM -- 적재 카테고리명 ,X.UPLOAD_CNT -- 업로드 건수 ,X.DEL_CNT -- 삭제건수 ,X.ADD_CNT -- 추가건수 ,X.CHG_CNT -- 수정건수 ,X.ACTIVE_CNT -- 활성 건수 ,X.INACTIVE_CNT -- 비활성 건수 FROM NIC19B_LOG X WHERE X.REG_LOG_DT BETWEEN #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_SD}||'000000' AND #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_ED}||'235959'
ORDER BY X.REG_LOG_DT DESC

SELECT B.MNG_SNO -- 관리번호 ,NVL(B.WC_LIST_CCD, 'WPEP01') AS WC_LIST_CCD -- 카테고리 ,B.CS_NM -- 요주의인물명 ,B.NTN_CD -- 국가코드 ,B.NTN_NM -- 국가명 ,B.ADDR -- 주소 ,B.INDV_CORP_CCD -- 개인법인구분코드 ,(SELECT T.CD_NM FROM NIC92B T WHERE T.CD = 'M006' AND T.CNTNT = B.INDV_CORP_CCD ) AS INDV_CORP_NM -- 개인법인구분코드명 ,B.ACTION_TYPE -- 변경구분 ,CASE WHEN B.ACTION_TYPE IN ('chg') THEN '수정' WHEN B.ACTION_TYPE IN ('add') THEN '추가' WHEN B.ACTION_TYPE IN ('del') THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END AS ACTION_TYPE_NM -- 변경구분병 추후 코드등록 필요 FROM NIC19B_LOG A, WAL_BAS_HISTORY B WHERE A.FILE_NAME = B.FILE_NM AND A.FILE_NAME = #{FILE_NAME} ORDER BY B.INDV_CORP_CCD, B.MNG_SNO

WITH REPORT AS ( SELECT A.CATEGORY ,A.ACTIVE_CNT ,A.INACTIVE_CNT ,A.T_CNT ,A.SEQ FROM NIC19B_REPORT A WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset2' AND A.SEQ BETWEEN 1 AND 10 ) SELECT M.CATEGORY ,NVL(M.ACTIVE_CNT, 0) AS ACTIVE_CNT ,NVL(M.INACTIVE_CNT, 0) AS INACTIVE_CNT ,NVL(M.T_CNT, 0) AS TOTAL_CNT ,M.SEQ FROM ( SELECT B.CATEGORY ,B.ACTIVE_CNT ,B.INACTIVE_CNT ,B.T_CNT ,B.SEQ FROM REPORT B UNION SELECT 'Total' AS CATEGORY ,SUM(C.ACTIVE_CNT) AS ACTIVE_CNT ,SUM(C.INACTIVE_CNT) AS INACTIVE_CNT ,SUM(C.T_CNT) AS T_CNT ,11 AS SEQ FROM REPORT C ) M WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY M.SEQ

SELECT M.CATEGORY ,NVL(M.ACTIVE_CNT, 0) AS ACTIVE_CNT ,NVL(M.INACTIVE_CNT, 0) AS INACTIVE_CNT ,NVL(M.T_CNT, 0) AS TOTAL_CNT ,M.SEQ FROM ( SELECT A.CATEGORY ,A.ACTIVE_CNT ,A.INACTIVE_CNT ,A.T_CNT ,A.SEQ FROM NIC19B_REPORT A WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset2' AND A.CATEGORY IN ( 'Politically Exposed Person (PEP)','Relative or Close Associate (RCA)' ,'Special Interest Entity (SIE)','Special Interest Person (SIP)' ) UNION ALL SELECT 'Total' AS CATEGORY ,SUM(B.ACTIVE_CNT) AS ACTIVE_CNT ,SUM(B.INACTIVE_CNT) AS INACTIVE_CNT ,SUM(B.T_CNT) AS T_CNT ,11 AS SEQ FROM NIC19B_REPORT B WHERE B.TYPE = 'Dataset2' AND B.SEQ BETWEEN 20 AND 30) M WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY M.SEQ

SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) AS REG_DT_F ,CASE WHEN MAX(A.REG_NO) IS NULL THEN 'AE' || LPAD(NVL(MAX(A.REG_NO), 0) + 1, 8, 0) ELSE 'AE' || LPAD(MAX(TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.REG_NO, 'AE', ''), '0', '') ) ) + 1, 8, 0) END AS REG_NO FROM NIC20B_AE A WHERE A.REG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')

SELECT /*AML_10_30_07_01.getSearch*/ ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SQ ASC) AS SEQ ,A.WC_LIST_CCD -- WATCH 목록 구분코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A003', A.WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM -- W050: 회사가정한 요주의 인물 ,A.SQ ,A.WC_UID ,A.WC_LIST_GRP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('W010', A.WC_LIST_GRP_CD) AS WC_LIST_GRP_CD_NM ,A.CS_NM ,A.CS_NM_ORG ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM ,A.NTN_CD -- 국가코드 - WL국가코드 ,A.NTN_NM -- 국적 ,A.SEX -- 성별 1: 남자, 2: 여자 ,A.DOB -- WL생년월일 ,A.ADDR_DESC -- WL주소상세 ,A.ADDR_CITY -- WL주소City ,A.ADDR_STATE -- WL주소State ,A.ADDR_NTN_CD -- WL주소Country ,A.REG_REASON -- 등록사유 ,A.START_DT -- 적용시작일 ,A.END_DT -- 적용종료일 ,A.USE_YN -- 사용여부 ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS HNDL_DY_TM -- 등록일자 ,A.HNDL_P_ENO -- 등록자사번 ,A.GYLJ_S_C AS SN_CCD -- 결재상태 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.GYLJ_S_C) AS APP_ST -- 결재상태명 ,A.APPL_YN -- 적용여부 ,A.APPL_DT ,A.APP_NO ,A.PRV_APP_NO ,A.REQ_GUBN ,B.REG_DT AS APP_DT -- 결재일자 ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID -- 결재자ID ,C.ROLE_NM AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재자명 ,B.TARGET_ROLE_ID -- 다음 결재자ID ,D.ROLE_NM AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 다음 결재자명 ,B.SNO ,B.WLR_SQ FROM NIC19B_LOCAL_HIST A LEFT OUTER JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'WLO' LEFT OUTER JOIN C_ROLE C ON B.APPR_ROLE_ID = C.ROLE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN C_ROLE D ON B.TARGET_ROLE_ID = C.ROLE_ID WHERE A.WC_UID = #{WC_UID} AND A.WC_LIST_CCD = #{WC_LIST_CCD}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC19B_LOCAL ( WC_LIST_CCD ,WC_UID ,WC_LIST_GRP_CD ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,CS_NM_ORG ,CS_NM ,SEX ,NTN_NM ,NTN_CD ,ADDR_NTN_CD ,ADDR_STATE ,ADDR_CITY ,ADDR_DESC ,DOB ,REG_REASON ,HNDL_DY_TM ,USE_YN ,SQ ,START_DT ,END_DT ,HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( #{WC_LIST_CCD} ,#{WC_UID} -- VARCHAR2 (100) ,#{WC_LIST_GRP_CD} -- VARCHAR2 (20) ,#{INDV_CORP_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) ,#{CS_NM_ORG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{CS_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{SEX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) ,#{NTN_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{NTN_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (2) ,#{ADDR_NTN_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (2) ,#{ADDR_STATE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{ADDR_CITY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{ADDR_DESC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{DOB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{REG_REASON, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (4000) ,SYSDATE -- DATE ,#{USE_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) ,#{SQ} -- NUMBER (10,0) ,#{START_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{END_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT #{WC_LIST_CCD} AS WC_LIST_CCD ,(SELECT (NVL(MAX(A.SQ), 0) + 1) FROM NIC19B_LOCAL A ) AS SQ ,(SELECT CONCAT(#{WC_LIST_CCD}, LPAD(X.SQ, 7, '0')) AS WC_UID FROM (SELECT NVL(MAX(B.SQ), 0) + 1 AS SQ FROM NIC19B_LOCAL B ) X ) AS WC_UID -- VARCHAR2 (100) ,#{WC_LIST_GRP_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS WC_LIST_GRP_CD -- VARCHAR2 (20) ,#{INDV_CORP_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INDV_CORP_CCD -- CHAR (1) ,#{CS_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CS_NM -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{SEX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS SEX -- CHAR (1) ,#{NTN_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS NTN_CD -- CHAR (2) ,#{DOB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DOB -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{REG_REASON, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS REG_REASON -- VARCHAR2 (4000) ,#{USE_YN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS USE_YN -- CHAR (1) ,#{START_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS START_DT -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{END_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS END_DT -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{USER_ID} AS USER_ID ,#{APPL_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS APPL_YN ,#{APP_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS APP_NO ,#{PRV_APP_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS PRV_APP_NO FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC19B_LOCAL ( WC_LIST_CCD ,WC_UID ,WC_LIST_GRP_CD ,INDV_CORP_CCD ,CS_NM ,SEX ,NTN_CD ,DOB ,REG_REASON ,HNDL_DY_TM ,USE_YN ,APPL_YN ,SQ ,START_DT ,END_DT ,HNDL_P_ENO ,GYLJ_S_C ) VALUES ( #{WC_LIST_CCD} ,#{WC_UID} -- VARCHAR2 (100) ,#{WC_LIST_GRP_CD} -- VARCHAR2 (20) ,#{INDV_CORP_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) ,#{CS_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,#{SEX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) ,#{NTN_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (2) ,#{DOB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{REG_REASON, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (4000) ,SYSDATE -- DATE ,#{USE_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1) ,#{APPL_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1) ,#{SQ} -- NUMBER (10,0) ,#{START_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{END_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,#{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO NIC19B_LOCAL_HIST ( REQ_GUBN , WC_LIST_CCD , WC_UID , WC_LIST_GRP_CD , INDV_CORP_CCD , CS_NM , SEX , NTN_CD , DOB , REG_REASON , HNDL_DY_TM , USE_YN , APPL_YN , SQ , START_DT , END_DT , HNDL_P_ENO , GYLJ_S_C , APP_NO , PRV_APP_NO ) SELECT #{REQ_GUBN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1) , #{WC_LIST_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{WC_UID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (100) , #{WC_LIST_GRP_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (20) , #{INDV_CORP_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) , #{CS_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) , #{SEX, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) , #{NTN_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (2) , #{DOB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) , #{REG_REASON, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (4000) , SYSDATE -- DATE , #{USE_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) , #{APPL_YN jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1) , (SELECT NVL(MAX(A.SQ), 0) + 1 FROM NIC19B_LOCAL_HIST A WHERE A.WC_LIST_CCD = #{WC_LIST_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.WC_UID = #{WC_UID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) -- NUMBER (10,0) , #{START_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) , #{END_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{APP_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (100) , #{PRV_APP_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (100) FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO NIC19B_LOCAL_HIST ( REQ_GUBN , WC_LIST_CCD , WC_UID , WC_LIST_GRP_CD , INDV_CORP_CCD , CS_NM , SEX , NTN_CD , DOB , REG_REASON , HNDL_DY_TM , USE_YN , APPL_YN , SQ , START_DT , END_DT , HNDL_P_ENO , GYLJ_S_C , APP_NO , PRV_APP_NO ) SELECT #{REQ_GUBN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1) , A.WC_LIST_CCD , A.WC_UID , A.WC_LIST_GRP_CD , A.INDV_CORP_CCD , A.CS_NM , A.SEX , A.NTN_CD , A.DOB , A.REG_REASON , SYSDATE -- DATE , #{USE_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- CHAR (1) , A.APPL_YN , 2 -- NUMBER (10,0) , A.START_DT , A.END_DT , #{HNDL_P_ENO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{GYLJ_S_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{APP_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (100) , #{PRV_APP_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (100) FROM NIC19B_LOCAL_HIST A WHERE A.WC_UID = #{WC_UID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.WC_LIST_CCD = #{WC_LIST_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SQ = 1
mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ ,B.* FROM ( SELECT A.HNDL_DY_TM ,A.APPR_ROLE_ID ,A.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,A.SN_CCD FROM AML_APPR A WHERE A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ ) B
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC19B_LOCAL A SET A.WC_UID = #{WC_UID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (100) NOT NULL ,A.WC_LIST_GRP_CD = #{WC_LIST_GRP_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (20) NOT NULL ,A.CS_NM = #{CS_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) NOT NULL ,A.CS_NM_ORG = #{CS_NM_ORG, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD, jdbcType=CHAR} -- CHAR (1) ,A.NTN_CD = #{NTN_CD, jdbcType=CHAR} -- CHAR (2) ,A.NTN_NM = #{NTN_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,A.SEX = #{SEX, jdbcType=CHAR} -- CHAR (1) ,A.DOB = #{DOB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (8) ,A.ADDR_DESC = #{ADDR_DESC, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,A.ADDR_CITY = #{ADDR_CITY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,A.ADDR_STATE = #{ADDR_STATE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- VARCHAR2 (1000) ,A.ADDR_NTN_CD = #{ADDR_NTN_CD, jdbcType=CHAR} ,A.REG_REASON = #{REG_REASON, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,A.HNDL_P_ENO = TO_NUMBER(#{HNDL_P_ENO, jdbcType=INTEGER}) -- NUMBER (22) ,A.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.WC_LIST_CCD = #{WC_LIST_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SQ = #{SQ, jdbcType=DOUBLE}
mapper.select: SELECT A.WC_LIST_CCD ,A.SQ ,A.WC_UID ,A.WC_LIST_GRP_CD ,A.CS_NM ,A.CS_NM_ORG ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.NTN_CD ,A.NTN_NM ,A.SEX ,A.DOB ,A.ADDR_DESC ,A.ADDR_CITY ,A.ADDR_STATE ,A.ADDR_NTN_CD ,A.RNMCNO ,A.REG_REASON ,A.START_DT ,A.END_DT ,A.USE_YN ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC19B_LOCAL_HIST A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.WC_LIST_CCD = #{WC_LIST_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SQ = TO_NUMBER(#{SQ, jdbcType=DOUBLE}) AND A.WC_UID = #{WC_UID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC27B_LOG ( AML_CUST_ID ,DEL_YN ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,SEQ ) VALUES ( #{AML_CUST_ID} ,'N' ,SYSDATE ,#{USER_ID} ,( SELECT NVL(MAX(A.SEQ) + 1, 1) FROM NIC27B_LOG A WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID } ) -- SEQ )
mapper.select: SELECT A.SRCH_RSLT_DT ,A.SQ ,A.MNG_SNO ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A011' AND D.CNTNT = C.GRP_CD) AS WC_LIST_GRP ,A.WC_LIST_CCD ,A.NTNLT_CD ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'M004' AND E.CNTNT = A.NTNLT_CD) AS NTNLT_NM ,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = 'M006' AND F.CNTNT = A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD ,A.ADDR AS ADDR ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY ,C.CD_NM WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.CS_NM ,A.HIT_R ,A.CHC_YN ,A.HNDL_DY_TM ,A.HNDL_P_ENO ,A.WL_BIRTHDAY --,CASE WHEN CHC_YN='1' THEN 'Y' ELSE '' END CHC_YN FROM NIC22B A INNER JOIN NIC92B C ON A.WC_LIST_CCD = C.CNTNT AND C.CD='A003' WHERE A.SRCH_RSLT_DT = #{SRCH_RSLT_DT} AND A.SQ = #{SQ}

SELECT DECODE(A.ACTIVE_STATUS, 'Y', 'Active', 'Inactive') AS ACTION ,A.NM_TYPE AS TYPE ,DECODE(A.INDV_CORP_CCD, 2, A.ENTITY_NM, A.FIRST_NM ||' '|| A.MIDDLE_NM ||' '|| A.SUR_NM) AS CS_NM ,A.FIRST_NM AS CS_NM_FIRST ,A.MIDDLE_NM AS CS_NM_MIDDLE ,A.SUR_NM AS CS_NM_LAST ,A.FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT FROM WAL_NM A WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY A.SEQ

SELECT B.EU_DATE_FORM AS BIRTHDATE ,A.NTN_NM_1 AS NATIONALITY ,A.NTN_NM AS RESIDENCE ,A.PLACE_OF_BIRTH AS BIRTHPLACE ,A.PROFILE AS FURTHER_INFORMATION1 FROM WAL_BAS A LEFT OUTER JOIN WAL_DT B ON A.DJ_UID = B.DJ_UID WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND B.DATE_TYPE IN ('Date of Birth','Date of Registration')
SELECT NVL(A.PROFILE,'test') AS PROFILE FROM WAL_BAS A WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID}

SELECT DECODE(M.ACTIVE_STATUS, 'Y', 'Active', 'Inactive') AS ACTION ,M.ROLE_TYPE AS TYPE ,M.OCC_TITLE AS JOB_NM ,M.FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT FROM WAL_ROLE M WHERE 1=1 AND M.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY M.SEQ

SELECT M.ASSOCIATE_ID AS FAM_UID ,(SELECT D.CNTNT_NM FROM WAL_CD_BODY D WHERE D.CNTNT = M.ASSOCIATE_CD AND D.CD ='W003') AS TYPE ,M.FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT ,A.CS_NM AS FAM_NM FROM WAL_RELATION M ,( SELECT MAX(B.SQ) AS SQ, MAX(B.CS_NM) AS CS_NM, B.WC_UID FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA B -- WHERE WC_LIST_CCD = 'WPEP01' WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.NM_TYPE = 'Primary Name' GROUP BY B.WC_UID ) A WHERE M.ASSOCIATE_ID = A.WC_UID(+) AND M.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY M.SEQ

/* D1. Politically Exposed Person (PEP) */ SELECT Z.DJ_UID AS WC_UID, Z.WC_LIST_CCD, (SELECT V.CD_NM FROM NIC92B V WHERE V.CD = 'A003' AND V.CNTNT = Z.WC_LIST_CCD) AS CATEGORY FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.DJ_UID, 'F010' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS A, WAL_DESC B WHERE A.DJ_UID = B.DJ_UID AND B.DESC1_CD = '1' AND A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D2. Sanctions Lists (SAN) */ SELECT DISTINCT C.DJ_UID, 'F020' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS C, WAL_DESC D WHERE C.DJ_UID = D.DJ_UID AND D.DESC2_CD IN ('1', '3') AND C.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D3. Sanctions Ownership Research (SOR)*/ SELECT DISTINCT E.DJ_UID, 'F030' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS E, WAL_DESC F WHERE E.DJ_UID = F.DJ_UID AND F.DESC2_CD = '34' AND F.DESC3_CD IN ('92', '93', '94', '95', '96', '97', '105', '106') AND E.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D4. Other Official Lists (OOL)*/ SELECT DISTINCT G.DJ_UID, 'F040' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS G, WAL_DESC H WHERE G.DJ_UID = H.DJ_UID AND H.DESC2_CD IN ('2', '4') AND G.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D5. Other Exclusion Lists (OEL)*/ SELECT DISTINCT I.DJ_UID, 'F050' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS I, WAL_DESC J WHERE I.DJ_UID = J.DJ_UID AND J.DESC2_CD IN ('25', '26') AND I.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D6. Enhanced Country Risk (ECR) - Ship*/ SELECT DISTINCT K.DJ_UID, 'F060' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS K, WAL_DESC L WHERE K.DJ_UID = L.DJ_UID AND L.DESC2_CD = '23' AND L.DESC3_CD = '47' AND K.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D7. Special Interest Person (SIP)*/ SELECT DISTINCT M.DJ_UID, 'F070' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS M, WAL_DESC N WHERE M.DJ_UID = N.DJ_UID AND N.DESC1_CD = '3' AND M.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D8. Special Interest Person ? Lower Threshold (SIP LT) */ SELECT DISTINCT P.DJ_UID, 'F080' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS P, WAL_DESC Q WHERE P.DJ_UID = Q.DJ_UID AND Q.DESC1_CD = '3' AND (Q.DESC2_CD IN ('7', '8', '9', '10', '31') AND Q.DESC3_CD IN ('79', '80', '81', '82', '83')) AND P.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D9. Relative or Close Associate (RCA) */ SELECT DISTINCT R.DJ_UID, 'F090' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS R, WAL_DESC S WHERE R.DJ_UID = S.DJ_UID AND S.DESC1_CD = '2' AND R.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} UNION /* D10. Special Interest Entity (SIE) */ SELECT DISTINCT T.DJ_UID, 'F100' AS WC_LIST_CCD FROM WAL_BAS T, WAL_DESC U WHERE T.DJ_UID = U.DJ_UID AND U.DESC1_CD = '4' AND T.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ) Z

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.DATE_TYPE, A.SEQ) AS FIELD_SEQ ,A.DATE_TYPE AS FIELD_DESC ,A.EU_DATE_FORM AS FIELD_VALUE FROM WAL_DT A WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND A.DATE_TYPE NOT IN ('Date of Birth') ORDER BY A.DATE_TYPE, A.SEQ
