SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.NTN_TYPE, A.SEQ) AS FIELD_SEQ ,A.NTN_TYPE AS FIELD_DESC ,A.NTN_CODE AS FIELD_VALUE FROM WAL_NATION A WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} -- AND A.NTN_TYPE NOT IN ('Citizenship', 'Resident of', 'BirthPlace') ORDER BY A.NTN_TYPE, A.SEQ
SELECT * FROM CDD_WLF_INFO A WHERE A.RNNO = #{RNNO} AND A.DEL_YN ='N'
SELECT * FROM CDD_PERSON_INFO A WHERE A.RNNO = #{RNNO} AND A.DEL_YN ='N'

SELECT A.RNNO ,A.RLNR_RNNO ,A.SEQNO ,A.RLNR_BRDD ,A.RLNR_SEX_CD ,A.RLNR_ENNM ,A.RLNR_NTNT_NAT_CD ,A.RLNR_CPNO ,A.RLNR_ADDR ,A.EPPR_RLNR_RLCD FROM CDD_RLNR_INFO A WHERE A.RNNO = #{RNNO} AND A.CRPT_RLNR_RNNO IS NULL

SELECT A.RNNO ,A.SEQNO ,A.CRPT_INCORP_DT ,A.CRPT_SINDS_CD ,A.CRPT_RLNR_RNNO ,A.CRPT_RLNR_REG_SEQNO ,A.CRPT_BZPL_TLNO ,A.CRPT_BZPL_ADDR ,A.CRPT_EPPR_RLNR_RLCD ,A.CRPT_RLNR_RNNO_DVCD ,A.CRPT_RLNR_ENNM ,A.CRPT_RLNR_NTNT_NAT_CD ,A.CRPT_RLNR_CPNO ,A.CRPT_RLNR_ADDR FROM CDD_RLNR_INFO A WHERE A.RNNO = #{RNNO} AND A.CRPT_RLNR_RNNO IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = #{CD}
DELETE NIC91B A WHERE A.CD = #{CD}
mapper.select: SELECT X.CCD, X.CCD_NM, X.CD FROM ( SELECT 1 AS CCD ,(SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'A009' AND C.CNTNT = 1) AS CCD_NM ,A.CD FROM NIC92B A UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS CCD ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A009' AND D.CNTNT = 2) AS CCD_NM ,B.CD FROM NIC95B B ) X WHERE X.CD = #{CD} GROUP BY X.CCD, X.CCD_NM, X.CD ORDER BY X.CCD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC92B ( CD ,CNTNT ,CD_NM ,USE_F ,CD_RNK_SQ ,GRP_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT B.CD ,B.CNTNT ,B.CD_NM ,B.USE_F ,ROWNUM ,B.GRP_CD ,B.HNDL_DY_TM ,B.HNDL_P_ENO FROM ( SELECT A.CD ,A.TRNSFRM_CD AS CNTNT ,MAX(A.TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL) AS CD_NM ,'Y' AS USE_F ,'' AS GRP_CD ,SYSDATE AS HNDL_DY_TM ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} AS HNDL_P_ENO FROM NIC95B A WHERE A.CD = #{CD} GROUP BY A.CD, A.TRNSFRM_CD ) B
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC92B A SET A.CNTNT = #{CNTNT} -- 내용 ,A.CD_NM = #{CD_NM} -- 코드명 ,A.USE_F = #{USE_F} -- 사용여부 ,A.CD_RNK_SQ = #{CD_RNK_SQ} -- 코드순위일련번호 ,A.GRP_CD = #{GRP_CD} -- 그룹코드 ,A.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE -- 처리일시 ,A.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} -- 처리자사번 WHERE A.CD = #{CD} AND A.CNTNT = #{OLD_CD}

UPDATE NIC91B A SET A.CD_NM = #{CD_NM} -- 코드명 ,A.CD_LNGTH = #{CD_LNGTH} -- 코드길이 ,A.CCD = #{CCD} -- 구분코드 ,A.STND_CD_NM= #{STND_CD_NM} -- 표준코드명 ,A.TBL_NM = #{TBL_NM} -- 테이블명 ,A.MDFY_F = #{MDFY_F} -- 수정여부 ,A.CD_EXPL = #{CD_EXPL} -- 코드설명 ,A.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE -- 처리일시 ,A.HNDL_P_ENO= #{HNDL_P_ENO} -- 처리자사번 WHERE A.CD = #{CD}
mapper.select: SELECT B.CD ,B.CCD FROM NIC91B B WHERE 1=1 AND B.CD = #{EXT_CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.CD -- 코드그룹 ,B.CD_NM AS CDGRP_NM -- 코드그룹명 ,A.CNTNT -- 유효값 ,A.CD_NM -- 유효값명 ,A.USE_F -- 사용여부 ,A.CD_RNK_SQ -- 코드순위일련번호 FROM NIC92B A, NIC91B B WHERE 1=1 AND A.CD = #{EXT_CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CD = B.CD ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ, A.CNTNT

SELECT A.CD -- 코드그룹 ,A.CD_NM -- 코드그룹명 ,A.CD_VL9 -- 변경전유효값 ,A.CD_VL_NM -- 변경전유효값명 ,A.TRNSFRM_CD -- 변경후유효값 ,A.TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL -- 변경후유효값명 FROM NIC95B A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CD = #{EXT_CODE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.CD_VL9, A.TRNSFRM_CD

choose.when: SELECT '' AS SELECTED , A.MA04_1 AS CD_GRD_NO , A.MA04_2 AS CD_VL_NM , A.MA04_3 AS CD1_SRT_SQ , MA04_7 AS HNDL_P_ENO , GET_USER_NAME(MA04_7) AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM , MA04_8 AS HNDL_DY_TM FROM MMA040TB A WHERE A.MA04_5 = 'Y' ORDER BY A.MA04_1
choose.otherwise: SELECT '' AS SELECTED ,B.STD_ID AS CD_GRD_NO ,B.STD_NM AS CD_VL_NM ,B.STD_VAL AS CD1_SRT_SQ ,B.STD_VAL_DESC ,B.UPD_ID AS HNDL_P_ENO ,GET_USER_NAME(UPD_ID) AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM ,TO_DATE(B.UPD_DTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM FROM NIC92B_STD_VAL B WHERE B.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY B.STD_ID

mapper.select: SELECT A.RA_ID ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,A.RA_GRD_SCR ,A.RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RA_GRD_CD) AS RA_GRD_CD_NM ,A.LST_RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.LST_RA_GRD_CD) AS LST_RA_GRD_CD_NM ,A.MINOR_YN ,A.NRES_YN ,A.NFTC_YN ,A.NPRFT_GRP_YN ,A.HNW_YN ,A.HRSK_NTN_YN ,SUBSTR(A.REG_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.REG_DT, 5,2) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.REG_DT, 7,2) AS REG_DT ,B.WORK_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A042', B.WORK_GBN_CD) AS WORK_GBN_CD_NM FROM RA_CS_RA_RSLT A ,RA_WORK_INFO B WHERE A.RA_ID = B.RA_ID AND B.RA_GBN_CD ='R' AND A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} ORDER BY A.REG_DT DESC

SELECT RA_ID , RNMCNO , KYC_TMS_CCD , REG_DT , TO_DATE(REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD-HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DTN , RA_GRD_SCR , LST_RA_GRD_CD , GET_CODE_NAME('A004', LST_RA_GRD_CD) AS LST_RA_GRD_CD_NM , EDD_YN1 /* 고위험국가 */ , EDD_YN2 /* 고액자산가 */ , EDD_YN3 /* 당사지정 요주의인물 */ , EDD_YN4 /* 요주의 인물 */ , EDD_YN5 /* 혐의거래 보고자 */ , EDD_YN6 /* 가상자산사업자 */ , EDD_YN7 /* 금융범죄 연류고객 */ FROM ( SELECT RA_ID , RNMCNO , 'K' AS KYC_TMS_CCD , TO_CHAR(REG_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REG_DT , RA_GRD_SCR , LST_RA_GRD_CD , EDD_YN1 /* 고위험국가 */ , EDD_YN2 /* 고액자산가 */ , EDD_YN3 /* 당사지정 요주의인물 */ , EDD_YN4 /* 요주의 인물 */ , EDD_YN5 /* 혐의거래 보고자 */ , EDD_YN6 /* 가상자산사업자 */ , EDD_YN7 /* 금융범죄 연류고객 */ FROM RA_CS_RA_RSLT UNION SELECT 'ASIS' AS RA_ID , RNMCNO , KYC_TMS_CCD , AML_CRT_DT AS REG_DT , RSK_GRD_MRK AS RA_GRD_SCR , RSK_GRD_CD AS LST_RA_GRD_CD , 'N' AS EDD_YN1 , 'N' AS EDD_YN2 , 'N' AS EDD_YN3 , 'N' AS EDD_YN4 , 'N' AS EDD_YN5 , 'N' AS EDD_YN6 , 'N' AS EDD_YN7 FROM NIC06B ) WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND KYC_TMS_CCD = #{KYC_TMS_CCD} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC

SELECT A.RA_ID ,A.RNMCNO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_NM ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_VAL ,A.RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,A.RA_ITEM_LST_SCR ,(SELECT Y.CD_NM FROM RA_ITEM X ,NIC92B Y WHERE X.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND X.REFF_COMN_CD = Y.CD AND Y.CNTNT = A.RA_ITEM_VAL ) AS RA_ITEM_VAL_NM FROM RA_CS_RA_RSLT_DTL A ,RA_ITEM B ,RA_WORK_INFO C WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ID = C.RA_ID AND C.RA_GBN_CD ='R' /* AND B.USE_YN ='Y' */ AND A.AML_CUST_ID =#{AML_CUST_ID} AND A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ORDER BY B.SRT_SQ

SELECT RA_ID , RNMCNO , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , RA_ITEM_VAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_ITEM_WGHT , RA_ITEM_LST_SCR , REG_DT FROM ( SELECT 'ASIS' AS RA_ID , NIC06_1.RNMCNO , NIC06_1.RSK_CCD AS RA_ITEM_CD , BRS150.RS15_2 AS RA_ITEM_NM , NIC06_2.ITEM_VALUE AS RA_ITEM_VAL , NIC06_1.RSK_GRD_MRK AS RA_ITEM_SCR , NIC06_1.WGHTS AS RA_ITEM_WGHT , NIC06_1.EXCH_MRK AS RA_ITEM_LST_SCR , NIC06_1.AML_CRT_DT AS REG_DT FROM NIC06B_1 NIC06_1 , (SELECT * FROM BRS110TB BRS110 , BRS150TB BRS150 WHERE BRS150.RS11_1 = BRS110.RS11_1 AND BRS110.RS11_2 = 'BMFactor' ) BRS150 , (SELECT RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM ( SELECT 'B01' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3166' UNION ALL SELECT 'B02' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3167' UNION ALL SELECT 'B03' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3168' UNION ALL SELECT 'B04' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3169' UNION ALL SELECT 'B05' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3170' UNION ALL SELECT 'B06' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3171' UNION ALL SELECT 'B07' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3172' UNION ALL SELECT 'B08' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3173' UNION ALL SELECT 'B09' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3174' UNION ALL SELECT 'B10' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3175' UNION ALL SELECT 'B11' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3176' UNION ALL SELECT 'B12' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3177' UNION ALL SELECT 'B13' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3178' UNION ALL SELECT 'B14' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3179' UNION ALL SELECT 'B15' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3180' UNION ALL SELECT 'B16' AS RSK_CCD, RNMCNO, AML_CRT_DT, ITEM_VALUE FROM NIC06B_2 WHERE VAR_ID = '3181' ) ) NIC06_2 WHERE BRS150.RS15_1 = NIC06_1.RSK_CCD AND BRS150.RS15_1 = NIC06_2.RSK_CCD AND NIC06_1.RNMCNO = NIC06_2.RNMCNO AND NIC06_1.AML_CRT_DT = NIC06_2.AML_CRT_DT ) WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND REG_DT = #{REG_DT} AND RA_ID = 'ASIS' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC, RA_ITEM_CD ASC

SELECT A.RA_ID , A.RNMCNO , A.RA_ITEM_CD , B.RA_ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I001' THEN A.RA_ITEM_VAL || '(' ||(SELECT CNTY_CODE FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY WHERE CNTY_NO_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_VAL)|| ')' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'B020' THEN A.RA_ITEM_VAL || '(' ||(SELECT RA_ITEM_NM FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = 'B020' AND RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_VAL)|| ')' ELSE A.RA_ITEM_VAL END RA_ITEM_VAL , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_LST_SCR , TO_CHAR(A.REG_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REG_DT FROM RA_CS_RA_RSLT_DTL A , RA_ITEM B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CD ASC

SELECT A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,A.RPR_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_DL_NM ,C.GNL_AC_NO FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B C WHERE A.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = RPAD( #{AML_CUST_ID} , 13, ' ') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' AND A.RPR_DT BETWEEN #{STR_DT} AND #{END_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID
AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','PER','KYC')
AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR'
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC35B A SET A.CS_EDD_STS_CD = #{CS_EDD_STS_CD} -- 고객EDD상태코드 ,A.CS_EDD_REG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- ,A.CS_EDD_RFSL_DT= #{CS_EDD_RFSL_DT} -- 고객EDD거부일자 WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,SSPS_DL_ID ,SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,SSPS_TYP_CD ,SSPS_DL_RPR_CCD ,DL_P_RNMCNO ,RNM_PR_DL_SQ ,RPR_CCD ,RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,OK_CCD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} ,#{SSPS_DL_ID} ,#{SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD} ,#{SSPS_TYP_CD} ,'1' ,#{DL_P_RNMCNO} ,0 ,'01' ,'2' ,'0' ,SYSDATE ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} )

INSERT INTO NIC73B( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , MN_DL_BRN_CD , MN_DL_BRN_NM , RPR_PRGRS_CCD ) ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , MN_DL_DPRT_CD , MN_DL_DPRT_NM , '0' FROM NIC71B T1 WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND MN_DL_DPRT_CD NOT IN (SELECT MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = T1.SSPS_DL_ID) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS RNCNT FROM NIC66B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD != 9 AND A.OK_CCD != 2 AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO}

SELECT TRIM( TO_CHAR( NVL( SUBSTR( MAX(A.SSPS_DL_ID), 8), '00000') + 1, '00000') ) AS SSPS_DL_ID FROM NIC66B A WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID LIKE #{SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD} || #{SSPS_TYP_CD} || '%'
SELECT A.RS17_1, A.RS17_2, A.RS17_3, A.RS17_4, A.RS17_5, A.RS17_6, A.RS17_7, A.RS17_W, A.RS17_Y, A.RS17_Z FROM BRS170TB A

SELECT A.* ,B.RS11_2, B.RS11_3, B.RS11_6, B.RS11_5 ,D.RS31_1 AS CODE_RS31_1 ,CASE WHEN B.RS11_2 ='고객구분' THEN 10 ELSE D.RS3K_A END AS RS3K_A ,NVL(D.RS14_1, D.RS11_1) AS CODE ,CASE WHEN D.RS14_1 IS NOT NULL THEN 'A' WHEN D.RS11_1 IS NOT NULL THEN 'B' WHEN B.RS11_2 ='고객구분' THEN 'C' ELSE '' END AS CD_VAL ,CASE WHEN D.RS14_1 IS NOT NULL THEN 'SEARCH' WHEN D.RS11_1 IS NOT NULL THEN 'SEARCH' WHEN B.RS11_2 ='고객구분' THEN 'SEARCH' ELSE '' END AS CD_VAL_NM FROM BRS230TB A ,BRS110TB B ,(SELECT G.* ,(SELECT E.RS14_1 FROM BRS140TB E WHERE E.RS11_1 = G.RS3K_A AND ROWNUM =1 ) AS RS14_1 ,(SELECT F.RS11_1 FROM BRS150TB F WHERE F.RS11_1 = G.RS3K_A AND ROWNUM =1 ) AS RS11_1 ,I.CD_NM FROM BRS3K0TB G ,BRS340TB H ,NIC92B I WHERE G.RS31_1 = H.RS31_1 AND G.RS32_1 = H.RS32_1 AND G.RS34_1 = H.RS34_1 AND H.RS34_2 ='1' --적용버전 AND I.CD ='A999' AND TO_NUMBER(NVL(I.CNTNT,'0') ) = G.RS31_1 ) D WHERE B.RS11_1 = A.RS11_1 AND A.RS31_1 = #{RS31_1} AND A.RS32_1 = #{RS32_1} AND B.RS11_2 = D.CD_NM(+) ORDER BY A.RS23_1

SELECT A.RS43_1 ,B.RS4A_2 ,D.CD_NM ,A.RS45_2 FROM BRS450TB A ,BRS4A0TB B ,NIC92B D WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS43_1 AND A.RS43_1 = #{RS31_1} AND A.RS45_1 = B.RS45_1 AND D.CD = #{CODE_NAME} AND B.RS4A_2 = D.CNTNT
AND D.CD_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CODE_NM} ||'%'
ORDER BY D.CD_NM

SELECT A.RS43_1 ,D.RS11_2 ,B.RS4A_2 ,D.CD_NAME AS CD_NM ,A.RS45_2 FROM BRS450TB A ,BRS4A0TB B ,( SELECT X.RS11_1 ,X.RS11_2 ,Y.RS15_1 AS CD ,Y.RS15_2 AS CD_NAME FROM BRS110TB X ,BRS150TB Y WHERE X.RS11_1 = #{RS3K_A} AND X.RS11_1 = Y.RS11_1 ) D WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS43_1 AND A.RS43_1 = #{RS31_1} AND A.RS45_1 = B.RS45_1 AND B.RS4A_2 = D.CD
AND D.CD_NAME LIKE '%'|| #{CODE_NM} ||'%'

SELECT A.RS11_1 ,A.RS11_2 ,B.RS15_1 AS RS4A_2 ,B.RS15_2 AS CD_NM FROM BRS110TB A ,BRS150TB B WHERE A.RS11_1 = #{RS3K_A} AND A.RS11_1 = B.RS11_1 AND B.RS15_1 != 4
AND B.RS15_2 LIKE '%'|| #{CODE_NM} ||'%'

SELECT TO_CHAR(COUNT(*), '999,999,999') AS TOT_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), '999,999,999,999') AS ADD_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), '999,999,999,999') AS DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W010' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W010_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W020' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W020_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W030' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W030_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W040' AND A.NORM_YN ='Y') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W040_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W010' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W010_DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W020' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W020_DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W030' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W030_DEL_CNT ,TO_CHAR(NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN (A.WC_LIST_CCD = 'W040' AND A.NORM_YN ='N') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),'999,999,999') W040_DEL_CNT FROM NIC19B A

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.AML_CRT_DT ,A.CS_RGST_DT -- 고객등록일자 ,NVL(B.CS_EDD_REG_DT, B.AML_CRT_DT) AS CDD_REG_DT ,B.CS_EDD_REG_DT AS EDD_REG_DT -- EDD등록일자 ,A.AML_CUST_ID --고객관리번호 ,A.CS_NM --고객명 ,A.ENG_CS_NM --영문명 ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'M012' AND D.CNTNT = A.CS_TYP_CD ) AS CS_TYP_NM -- 고객유형 ,A.NTN_CD ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'M004' AND E.CNTNT = A.NTN_CD ) AS NTN_NM -- 국가 ,A.RSDNC_F ,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = 'M005' AND F.CNTNT = A.RSDNC_F ) AS RSDNC_F_NM -- 거주여부 ,A.RNM_CNFR_CCD ,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD = 'M002' AND G.CNTNT = A.RNM_CNFR_CCD ) AS RNM_CNFR --실명번호구분 ,A.RNMCNO --실명번호 ,A.CORP_RGST_NO --사업자등록번호 ,CASE WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD IN ('01','02') THEN (SELECT H.BRTDY FROM NIC02B H WHERE H.AML_CUST_ID = A.AML_CUST_ID ) ELSE (SELECT I.FNDTN_DT FROM NIC03B I WHERE I.AML_CUST_ID = A.AML_CUST_ID) END AS CS_BRDT -- 생년월일_설립일자 FROM NIC01B A ,NIC35B B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND A.CS_ST_CD ='Y' -- 정상고객:Y
AND A.CS_TYP_CD IN ( '01','02' ) -- 개인 선택시
AND A.CS_TYP_CD IN ( '03','04' ) -- 법인 선택시
AND A.CS_TYP_CD IN ( '01','02','03','04') -- 전체선택
AND A.AML_CUST_ID = #{CUST_CODE}
AND A.CS_NM LIKE '%' || #{CUST_NM} || '%'
) X WHERE 1 = 1
AND X.AML_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{CRE_DT_SD} AND #{CRE_DT_ED} AND NVL(X.EDD_REG_DT, '') IS NULL -- CDD선택
AND X.EDD_REG_DT BETWEEN #{CRE_DT_SD} AND #{CRE_DT_ED} -- EDD선택
AND X.AML_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{CRE_DT_SD} AND #{CRE_DT_ED} -- 전체선택

SELECT /*+INDEX(A PK_NIC01B) INDEX(C PK_NIC03B)*/ ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.CS_NM ) AS NU ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.RNMCNO ,A.CS_NM ,A.ENG_CS_NM ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD --고객구분M006 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM --고객구분 ,B.NTN_CD --국가M004 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', B.NTN_CD) AS NTN_CD_NM --국가 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN B.AML_JOB_GUBN ELSE B.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD END AS JOB_GUBN --직업_업종 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('M009', B.AML_JOB_GUBN) ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('M008', B.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) END AS JOB_GUBN_NM --직업_업종 ,CASE WHEN A.RSDNC_F ='Y' THEN '10' ELSE '10' END AS RSDNC_F --거주여부M005 ,CASE WHEN A.RSDNC_F ='Y' THEN '내국인-거주자' ELSE '외국인-거주자' END AS RSDNC_F_NM --거주여부M005 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '10' ELSE '' END AS RSDNC_GUBUN --국내외법인여부 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '국내' ELSE '' END AS RSDNC_GUBUN_NM --국내외법인여부 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN (CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN '10' --상장여부:10영리법인(상장) WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'N' THEN '40' --상장여부:40영리법인(비상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN '20' --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '30' --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '50' --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE '' END ) ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN --법인유형 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN (CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN '영리법인(상장)' --상장여부:10영리법인(상장) WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'N' THEN '영리법인(비상장)' --상장여부:40영리법인(비상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN '금융기관' --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '국가/지방자치단체' --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '비영리법인' --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE '' END ) ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN_NM --법인유형 ,B.GDS_CD AS GDS_NO --상품 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', B.GDS_CD) AS GDS_NO_NM ,CASE WHEN A.INTERVIEW_CCD ='N' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS CHNNL ,CASE WHEN A.INTERVIEW_CCD ='N' THEN '비대면' ELSE '본부 영업부서,영업점' END AS CHNNL_NM ,B.STR_RPR_CNT AS STR_CNT ,B.CTR_RPR_CNT AS CTR_CNT ,'2' AS STRCTR_YN ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.CS_RGST_DT) AS CS_RGST_DT -- 고객등록일자 FROM NIC01B A INNER JOIN NIC01B_1 B ON A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC03B C ON A.AML_CUST_ID = C.AML_CUST_ID WHERE A.CS_ST_CD ='Y' --고객상태 AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD}
AND A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%'
AND ( A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%' OR A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%')
OFFSET ((#{thisPage} - 1) * #{pageCount}) ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageCount} ROWS ONLY

SELECT /*+INDEX(A PK_NIC01B) INDEX(C PK_NIC03B)*/ ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.CS_NM ) AS NU ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.RNMCNO ,A.CS_NM ,A.ENG_CS_NM ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD --고객구분M006 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M006', A.INDV_CORP_CCD) AS INDV_CORP_CCD_NM --고객구분 ,B.NTN_CD --국가M004 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', B.NTN_CD) AS NTN_CD_NM --국가 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN B.AML_JOB_GUBN ELSE B.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD END AS JOB_GUBN --직업_업종 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('M009',B.AML_JOB_GUBN) ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('M008',B.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) END AS JOB_GUBN_NM --직업_업종 ,CASE WHEN A.RSDNC_F ='Y' THEN '10' ELSE '10' END AS RSDNC_F --거주여부M005 ,CASE WHEN A.RSDNC_F ='Y' THEN '내국인-거주자' ELSE '외국인-거주자' END AS RSDNC_F_NM --거주여부M005 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '10' ELSE '' END AS RSDNC_GUBUN --국내외법인여부 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN '국내' ELSE '' END AS RSDNC_GUBUN_NM --국내외법인여부 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN ( CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN '10' --상장여부:10영리법인(상장) WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'N' THEN '40' --상장여부:40영리법인(비상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN '20' --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '30' --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '50' --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE '' END ) ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN --법인유형 ,CASE WHEN A.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2' THEN ( CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN '영리법인(상장)' --상장여부:10영리법인(상장) WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'N' THEN '영리법인(비상장)' --상장여부:40영리법인(비상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN '금융기관' --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '국가/지방자치단체' --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '비영리법인' --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE '' END ) ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN_NM --법인유형 ,B.GDS_CD AS GDS_NO --상품 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', B.GDS_CD) AS GDS_NO_NM ,CASE WHEN A.INTERVIEW_CCD ='N' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END CHNNL ,CASE WHEN A.INTERVIEW_CCD ='N' THEN '비대면' ELSE '본부 영업부서,영업점' END CHNNL_NM ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(A.CS_RGST_DT) AS CS_RGST_DT -- 고객등록일자 FROM NIC01B A INNER JOIN NIC01B_1 B ON A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC03B C ON A.AML_CUST_ID = C.AML_CUST_ID WHERE A.CS_ST_CD ='Y' --고객상태 AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD}
AND A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%'
AND ( A.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%' OR A.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%')
OFFSET ((#{thisPage} - 1) * #{pageCount}) ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageCount} ROWS ONLY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM RA_WORK_INFO A WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}
DELETE FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT A WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}
DELETE FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT A WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}
DELETE FROM RA_CS_RA_RSLT A WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}
DELETE FROM RA_CS_RA_RSLT_DTL A WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}
mapper.update: UPDATE RA_WORK_INFO A SET A.USE_YN = #{USE_YN}, A.UPD_ID = #{USER_ID}, A.UPD_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}

UPDATE RA_ITEM_WGHT Y SET Y.RA_ITEM_WGHT = ( SELECT X.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT X WHERE X.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} AND X.CS_TYP_CD = Y.CS_TYP_CD AND X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = Y.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND X.RA_ITEM_CD = Y.RA_ITEM_CD ) ,Y.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} ,Y.UPD_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE ( Y.CS_TYP_CD, Y.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, Y.RA_ITEM_CD ) IN ( SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_ITEM_CD FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT A WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} AND A.RA_ITEM_WGHT IS NOT NULL )

UPDATE RA_CS_TYP_MNG Y SET Y.LST_RA_ID = ( SELECT DISTINCT X.RA_ID FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT X WHERE X.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} AND X.CS_TYP_CD = Y.CS_TYP_CD AND X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = Y.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ) WHERE (Y.CS_TYP_CD, Y.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT A WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.RA_ID -- 시뮬레이션ID ,A.SMUL_NM -- 시뮬레이션명 ,A.SMUL_CNTNT -- 시뮬레이션내용 ,A.RA_MDL_VER_CD -- 위험평가모델버전코드_A043 ,NVL((SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A043' AND D.CNTNT = A.RA_MDL_VER_CD), '') AS RA_MDL_VER_NM -- 위험평가모델버전명 ,A.SMUL_OBJ_CD -- 시뮬레이션목적코드_A044 ,NVL((SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'A044' AND E.CNTNT = A.SMUL_OBJ_CD), '') AS SMUL_OBJ_NM -- 시뮬레이션목적명 ,A.CS_TYP_CD -- 고객유형코드 ,NVL((SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = 'M012' AND F.CNTNT = A.CS_TYP_CD), '전체') AS CS_TYP_NM -- 고객유형명 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.TRGT_START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRGT_START_DT -- 대상시작일자 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.TRGT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRGT_END_DT -- 대상종료일자 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.BATCH_ACT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS BATCH_ACT_DT -- 배치실행일시 ,A.BATCH_ACT_ID -- 배치실행자ID ,(SELECT G.USER_NM FROM C_USER G WHERE G.USER_ID = A.BATCH_ACT_ID) AS BATCH_ACT_NM ,A.BATCH_ST_CD -- 배치상태코드 ,(SELECT H.CD_NM FROM NIC92B H WHERE H.CD = 'A039' AND H.CNTNT = A.BATCH_ST_CD) AS BATCH_ST_NM -- 배치상태명 ,A.APP_NO -- 결재번호 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.APPL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPL_DT -- 대상시작일자 ,A.USE_YN -- 사용여부 ,A.REG_ID -- 등록자ID ,(SELECT I.USER_NM FROM C_USER I WHERE I.USER_ID = A.REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DT ,A.UPD_ID -- 수정자ID ,(SELECT J.USER_NM FROM C_USER J WHERE J.USER_ID = A.UPD_ID) AS UPD_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.UPD_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_DT ,P.SN_CCD ,P.APP_NO ,SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,7,2) AS APP_DT ,CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN '미결재' ELSE (SELECT K.CD_NM FROM NIC92B K WHERE K.CD = 'A038' AND K.CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) -- A038 결재상태코드 END AS APP_ST ,P.GYLJ_ROLE_NM AS APP_NM ,P.APPR_ROLE_NM ,P.TARGET_ROLE_NM ,P.SNO ,P.NUM_SQ ,'RA4' AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,P.WLR_SQ FROM RA_WORK_INFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.SNO ,M.APP_DT ,M.WLR_SQ ,M.REG_DT ,M.SN_CCD ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결제한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결제할사람 ,S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID -- 결재한 사람ID ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID) AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM ,M.NUM_SQ ,M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,M.APP_NO FROM AML_APPR M, C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA4' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND (M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ) IN ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(T PK_AML_APPR)*/ T.APP_NO, MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA4' GROUP BY T.APP_NO ) ) P ON (A.APP_NO = P.APP_NO) WHERE 1=1
AND (A.CS_TYP_CD IS NULL OR A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD})
AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (A.APP_NO IS NULL OR P.SN_CCD NOT IN ('E')) ORDER BY A.RA_ID DESC

SELECT A.RA_ID -- 시뮬레이션ID ,A.SMUL_NM -- 시뮬레이션명 ,A.SMUL_CNTNT -- 시뮬레이션내용 ,A.RA_MDL_VER_CD -- 위험평가모델버전코드_A043 ,NVL((SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A043' AND D.CNTNT = A.RA_MDL_VER_CD), '') AS RA_MDL_VER_NM -- 위험평가모델버전명 ,A.SMUL_OBJ_CD -- 시뮬레이션목적코드_A044 ,NVL((SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'A044' AND E.CNTNT = A.SMUL_OBJ_CD), '') AS SMUL_OBJ_NM -- 시뮬레이션목적명 ,A.CS_TYP_CD -- 고객유형코드 ,NVL((SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = 'M012' AND F.CNTNT = A.CS_TYP_CD), '전체') AS CS_TYP_NM -- 고객유형명 ,A.RA_GBN_CD -- 위험평가구분코드_A041 ,(SELECT G.CD_NM FROM NIC92B G WHERE G.CD = 'A041' AND G.CNTNT = A.RA_GBN_CD) AS RA_GBN_NM -- 위험평가구분명 ,A.WORK_GBN_CD -- 작업구분코드_A042 ,(SELECT H.CD_NM FROM NIC92B H WHERE H.CD = 'A042' AND H.CNTNT = A.WORK_GBN_CD) AS WORK_GBN_NM -- 작업구분명 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.WORK_TRGT_START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WORK_TRGT_START_DT -- 작업대상시작일자 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.WORK_TRGT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WORK_TRGT_END_DT -- 작업대상종료일자 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.WORK_START_DTTM , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WORK_START_DTTM -- 배치시작일시 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.WORK_END_DTTM , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WORK_END_DTTM -- 배치종료일시 ,CASE WHEN A.WORK_START_DTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.WORK_END_DTTM IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(A.WORK_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - TO_TIMESTAMP(A.WORK_START_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))) || '시간 ' || EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(A.WORK_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - TO_TIMESTAMP(A.WORK_START_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))) || '분 ' || EXTRACT(SECOND FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(A.WORK_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - TO_TIMESTAMP(A.WORK_START_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))) || '초' ELSE '' END AS TIME_DIFF ,A.WORK_ST_CD -- 작업상태코드_A039 ,(SELECT I.CD_NM FROM NIC92B I WHERE I.CD = 'A039' AND I.CNTNT = A.WORK_ST_CD) AS WORK_ST_NM -- 작업상태 ,A.WRKR_ID -- 배치실행자ID ,(SELECT J.USER_NM FROM C_USER J WHERE J.USER_ID = A.WRKR_ID) AS WRKR_NM ,A.APP_NO -- 결재번호 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.APPL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPL_DT -- 대상시작일자 ,A.REG_ID -- 등록자ID ,(SELECT K.USER_NM FROM C_USER K WHERE K.USER_ID = A.REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DT ,A.UPD_ID -- 수정자ID ,(SELECT L.USER_NM FROM C_USER L WHERE L.USER_ID = A.UPD_ID) AS UPD_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.UPD_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_DT ,P.SN_CCD ,P.APP_NO ,SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(P.REG_DT,7,2) AS APP_DT ,CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN '미결재' ELSE (SELECT N.CD_NM FROM NIC92B N WHERE N.CD = 'A038' AND N.CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) -- A038 결재상태코드 END AS APP_ST ,P.GYLJ_ROLE_NM AS APP_NM ,P.APPR_ROLE_NM ,P.TARGET_ROLE_NM ,P.SNO ,P.NUM_SQ ,'RA4' AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,P.WLR_SQ FROM RA_WORK_INFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.SNO ,M.APP_DT ,M.WLR_SQ ,M.REG_DT ,M.SN_CCD ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결제한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결제할사람 ,S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID -- 결재한 사람ID ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID) AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM ,M.NUM_SQ ,M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,M.APP_NO FROM AML_APPR M, C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA4' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND (M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ) IN ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(T PK_AML_APPR)*/ T.APP_NO, MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA4' GROUP BY T.APP_NO ) ) P ON (A.APP_NO = P.APP_NO) WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}
AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD}

SELECT A.RA_ID ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,(SELECT E.CD_NM FROM NIC92B E WHERE E.CD = 'M012' AND E.CNTNT = A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,D.RA_ITEM_NM ,D.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,(SELECT F.CD_NM FROM NIC92B F WHERE F.CD = 'A040' AND F.CNTNT = D.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_NM ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,TO_CHAR(B.RA_ITEM_WGHT, '0.00') AS RA_ITEM_WGHT ,C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AS B_NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,TO_CHAR(C.RA_ITEM_WGHT, '0.00') AS B_RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT G.RA_ID, G.CS_TYP_CD, G.RA_ITEM_CD FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT G ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT H.RA_ID ,H.CS_TYP_CD ,H.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,H.RA_ITEM_CD ,H.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT H WHERE H.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'A' ) B ON A.RA_ID = B.RA_ID AND A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT I.RA_ID ,I.CS_TYP_CD ,I.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,I.RA_ITEM_CD ,I.RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT I WHERE I.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'B' ) C ON A.RA_ID = C.RA_ID AND A.CS_TYP_CD = C.CS_TYP_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = C.RA_ITEM_CD INNER JOIN RA_ITEM D ON A.RA_ITEM_CD = D.RA_ITEM_CD AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ORDER BY A.CS_TYP_CD, B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_ITEM_CD

SELECT NVL((SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'M012' AND A.CNTNT = X.CS_TYP_CD), '전체') AS GUBN ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_TYP_CD IS NOT NULL THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_TYP_CD IS NOT NULL THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(E.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT E WHERE E.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS TOT_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS H_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(F.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT F WHERE F.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS H_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS M_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(G.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT G WHERE G.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS M_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS L_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(H.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT H WHERE H.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS L_RAT FROM ( SELECT * FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT B UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'01',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'02',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'03',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'04',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL ) X WHERE X.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((X.CS_TYP_CD), ()) ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(X.CS_TYP_CD)

SELECT NVL((SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'A030' AND A.CNTNT = X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD), '전체') AS GUBN ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD IS NOT NULL THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD IS NOT NULL THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(E.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT E WHERE E.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS TOT_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS H_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(F.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT F WHERE F.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS H_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS M_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(G.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT G WHERE G.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS M_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS L_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(H.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT H WHERE H.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS L_RAT FROM ( SELECT * FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT B UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},NULL,'A',NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},NULL,'B',NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL ) X WHERE X.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD), ()) ORDER BY X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD

SELECT NVL((SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'M012' AND A.CNTNT = X.CS_TYP_CD), '전체') AS GUBN ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_TYP_CD IS NOT NULL THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.CS_TYP_CD IS NOT NULL THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(E.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT E WHERE E.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS TOT_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS H_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(F.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT F WHERE F.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS H_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS M_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(G.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT G WHERE G.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS M_RAT ,SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) AS L_CNT ,ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN X.LST_RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN X.CS_CNT ELSE 0 END) / (SELECT SUM(H.CS_CNT) FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT H WHERE H.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ) ) * 100, 1) AS L_RAT FROM ( SELECT * FROM RA_SMUL_RSLT B UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'01',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'02',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'03',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL UNION SELECT #{RA_ID},'04',NULL,NULL, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM DUAL ) X WHERE X.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} GROUP BY X.CS_TYP_CD ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(X.CS_TYP_CD)

SELECT ROWNUM AS NUM_SQ ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = A.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC92B D WHERE D.CD = 'A038' AND D.CNTNT = A.SN_CCD ) AS SN_CCD_NM -- A038 결재상태코드 ,(SELECT E.USER_NM FROM C_USER E WHERE E.USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM ,A.RSN_CNTNT ,A.APP_NO ,B.SMUL_NM ,B.RA_ID FROM AML_APPR_HIST A INNER JOIN RA_WORK_INFO B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY NUM_SQ

SELECT A.RA_ID ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.RA_GRD_SCR -- 등급점수 ,A.RA_GRD_CD -- 위험등급 ,A.LST_RA_GRD_CD -- 최종등급 ,A.MINOR_YN -- 미성년자여부 ,A.NRES_YN -- 비거주자여부 ,A.NFTC_YN -- 비대면채널여부 ,A.NPRFT_GRP_YN -- 비영리단체여부 ,A.HNW_YN -- 고액자산가여부 ,A.HRSK_NTN_YN -- 고위험국가여부 ,A.REG_ID ,A.REG_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,A.UPD_DT ,B.RA_ITEM_CD -- 위험평가항목코드 ,C.RA_ITEM_NM -- 위험평가항목명 ,B.RA_ITEM_VAL -- 위험평가항목값 ,D.CD_NM AS RA_ITEM_VAL_NM ,C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,C.MISS_VAL_SCR ,B.RA_ITEM_SCR -- 위험평가항목점수 ,B.RA_ITEM_WGHT -- 위험평가항목가중치 ,B.RA_ITEM_LST_SCR -- 위험평가항목최종점수 FROM RA_CS_RA_RSLT A INNER JOIN RA_CS_RA_RSLT_DTL B ON A.RA_ID = B.RA_ID AND A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM C ON B.RA_ITEM_CD = C.RA_ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN NIC92B D ON C.REFF_COMN_CD = D.CD AND B.RA_ITEM_VAL = D.CNTNT WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} AND A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY B.CS_NM ) AS NU ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,7,2) AS CS_RGST_DT ,A.NTN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.NTN_CD) AS NTN_CD_NM ,A.AML_JOB_GUBN ,GET_CODE_NAME('M009', A.AML_JOB_GUBN) AS AML_JOB_GUBN_NM ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) AS INDST_RSK_DVD_CD_NM ,A.AGE ,A.FNDTN_PRD ,A.GDS_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', A.GDS_CD) AS GDS_CD_NM ,A.CHNNL_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.CHNNL_CD) AS CHNNL_CD_NM ,A.STR_RPR_CNT ,A.CTR_RPR_CNT ,A.DL_PRD ,B.CS_NM ,B.ENG_CS_NM ,B.RSDNC_F ,GET_CODE_NAME('M005', B.RSDNC_F) AS RSDNC_F_NM ,A.MINOR_YN ,A.NRES_YN ,A.NFTC_YN ,A.NPRFT_GRP_YN ,A.HNW_YN ,A.HRSK_NTN_YN ,D.AI_RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', D.AI_RA_GRD_CD) AS AI_RA_GRD_CD_NM ,CASE WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '03' THEN ( CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN '06' --상장여부:10영리법인(상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN '01' --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '03' --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '04' --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE '09' END ) WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '04' THEN '04' --비영리단체여부:04비영리법인 ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN --법인유형 ,CASE WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '03' THEN ( CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '06') --상장여부:01영리법인(상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '01') --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '03') --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '04') --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '09') END ) WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '04' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '04') --비영리단체여부:04비영리법인 ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN_NM --법인유형 FROM NIC01B_1 A LEFT JOIN NIC01B B ON A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID LEFT JOIN NIC03B C ON A.AML_CUST_ID = C.AML_CUST_ID LEFT JOIN AI_RA_RSLT D ON A.AML_CUST_ID = D.AML_CUST_ID INNER JOIN RA_CS_RA_RSLT E ON A.AML_CUST_ID = E.AML_CUST_ID AND E.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} WHERE 1=1
AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD}
AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
AND B.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND B.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%'
AND ( B.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%' OR B.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%')
OFFSET ((#{thisPage} - 1) * #{pageCount}) ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageCount} ROWS ONLY

SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_ITEM_NM ,A.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,A.REFF_COMN_CD ,(SELECT D.CD_NM FROM NIC91B D WHERE D.CD = A.REFF_COMN_CD) AS REFF_COMN_NM ,A.MISS_VAL_SCR ,A.INTV_VAL_YN ,A.USE_YN ,A.SRT_SQ ,A.LST_APP_NO ,B.SN_CCD ,A.REG_ID ,A.REG_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,A.UPD_DT ,'0' AS ROWBASE FROM RA_ITEM A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.LST_APP_NO = B.APP_NO ORDER BY A.SRT_SQ
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM RA_ITEM A WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}
mapper.select: SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.LST_WGHT_APP_NO ,A.LST_GRD_APP_NO ,A.LST_RA_ID ,A.REG_ID ,A.REG_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,A.UPD_DT ,'0' AS ROWBASE FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG A ORDER BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM RA_WORK_INFO A WHERE A.WORK_ST_CD IN '2'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ A UNION ALL SELECT B.RA_ITEM_CD FROM RA_ITEM_SCR B ) X WHERE X.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_REQ A UNION ALL SELECT B.CS_TYP_CD, B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT B UNION ALL SELECT C.CS_TYP_CD, C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ C UNION ALL SELECT D.CS_TYP_CD, D.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD D ) E WHERE E.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}

SELECT X.RA_ITEM_CD ,X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,X.RA_ITEM_NM ,X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM || ' ' || X.RA_ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM ,X.REFF_COMN_CD ,X.INTV_VAL_YN ,X.APP_NO ,X.SN_CCD ,X.SN_CCD_NM ,X.SN_CCD_NM_ING ,X.USE_YN ,X.SRT_SQ ,X.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,X.NUM_SQ ,X.APP_DT ,X.WLR_SQ ,X.SNO ,X.APPLY_FLAG FROM ( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', A.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_NM ,A.REFF_COMN_CD ,A.INTV_VAL_YN ,A.LST_APP_NO AS APP_NO ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN ' ' ELSE (GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N'))) END AS SN_CCD_NM_ING ,A.USE_YN ,A.SRT_SQ ,B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,B.NUM_SQ ,B.APP_DT ,B.WLR_SQ ,B.SNO ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN ' ' WHEN B.SN_CCD != 'E' THEN '적용중' ELSE '미적용' END AS APPLY_FLAG FROM RA_ITEM A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.LST_APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' ) X GROUP BY X.RA_ITEM_CD, X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD, X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM, X.RA_ITEM_NM, X.REFF_COMN_CD ,X.INTV_VAL_YN, X.APP_NO, X.SN_CCD, X.SN_CCD_NM, X.SN_CCD_NM_ING, X.USE_YN, X.SRT_SQ ,X.GYLJ_LINE_G_C, X.NUM_SQ, X.APP_DT, X.WLR_SQ, X.SNO, X.APPLY_FLAG ORDER BY DECODE(X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD, 'I', 1, 'B', 2), X.SRT_SQ

SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_ITEM_VAL ,A.RA_ITEM_VAL AS RA_ITEM_VAL_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,'0' AS ROWBASE FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ A WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(A.RA_ITEM_VAL)

SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_ITEM_VAL ,GET_CODE_NAME(#{REFF_COMN_CD}, A.RA_ITEM_VAL) AS RA_ITEM_VAL_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,'0' AS ROWBASE FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ A LEFT JOIN NIC92B B ON A.RA_ITEM_VAL = B.CNTNT WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND B.CD = #{REFF_COMN_CD} ORDER BY B.CD_RNK_SQ
SELECT A.CD ,A.CNTNT ,A.CD_NM ,A.USE_F FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = #{CD} AND (UPPER(A.CNTNT) LIKE UPPER(#{CDN}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.CD_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{CDN}) || '%' ) ORDER BY A.CD_RNK_SQ
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ A WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND A.RA_ITEM_VAL = #{RA_ITEM_VAL}
DELETE FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ A WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_APPR T USING DUAL ON ( T.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ,T.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} ,T.UPD_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.APP_NO ,T.RA_ITEM_CD ,T.REG_ID ,T.REG_DT ,T.UPD_ID ,T.UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{APP_NO} ,#{RA_ITEM_CD} ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,'' ,'' )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL A USING ( SELECT #{APP_NO} AS APP_NO ,R.RA_ITEM_VAL ,R.RA_ITEM_SCR ,R.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ R WHERE R.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) B ON ( A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND A.RA_ITEM_VAL = B.RA_ITEM_VAL ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.RA_ITEM_SCR = B.RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN = B.ABS_HRSK_YN ,A.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} ,A.UPD_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_VAL ,A.RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,A.REG_ID ,A.REG_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,A.UPD_DT ) VALUES ( B.APP_NO ,B.RA_ITEM_VAL ,B.RA_ITEM_SCR ,B.ABS_HRSK_YN ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,'' ,'' )
mapper.select: SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT FROM RA_ITEM_APPR A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.APP_NO DESC

SELECT '-' AS APP_NO ,RA_ITEM_CD ,NULL AS NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(MAX(UPD_DT),1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(MAX(UPD_DT), 5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(MAX(UPD_DT), 7,2) AS APP_DT ,NULL AS APPR_ROLE_ID ,NULL AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,'N' AS SN_CCD ,'미결재' AS SN_CCD_NM ,'' AS RSN_CNTNT FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} GROUP BY RA_ITEM_CD UNION ALL SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT FROM RA_ITEM_APPR A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY APP_DT DESC, NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT X.APP_NO ,X.RA_ITEM_CD ,X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM || ' ' || X.RA_ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM ,X.NUM_SQ ,X.APP_DT ,X.APPR_ROLE_ID ,X.APPR_ROLE_NM ,X.SN_CCD ,X.SN_CCD_NM FROM ( SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,C.RA_ITEM_NM ,C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,B.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT F.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE F WHERE F.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_APPR A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR_HIST B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM C ON A.RA_ITEM_CD = C.RA_ITEM_CD WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) X ORDER BY X.APP_NO, X.NUM_SQ ASC

SELECT A.APP_NO ,NVL(A.RA_ITEM_VAL,NULL) AS RA_ITEM_VAL ,NVL(B.RA_ITEM_VAL,NULL) AS BEFOR_RA_ITEM_VAL ,NVL(GET_CODE_NAME(#{REFF_COMN_CD}, A.RA_ITEM_VAL), B.RA_ITEM_VAL) AS RA_ITEM_VAL_NM ,CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR != B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN '변경' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR = B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN '유지' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NOT NULL AND B.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN B.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NULL THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END AS GUBUN ,NVL(A.RA_ITEM_SCR, NULL) AS RA_ITEM_SCR ,NVL(B.RA_ITEM_SCR, NULL) AS BEFOR_RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,NVL(B.ABS_HRSK_YN, '') AS BEFOR_ABS_HRSK_YN
FROM (SELECT T.*, '' AS APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ T WHERE T.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) A FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.APP_NO, D.RA_ITEM_VAL, D.RA_ITEM_SCR, D.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL D WHERE D.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(E.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL E LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM_APPR F ON E.APP_NO = F.APP_NO WHERE E.APP_NO = (SELECT MAX(APP_NO) FROM RA_ITEM_APPR WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}) AND F.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) ) B
FROM (SELECT * FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL T WHERE T.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) A FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.APP_NO, D.RA_ITEM_VAL, D.RA_ITEM_SCR, D.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL D WHERE D.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(E.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL E LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM_APPR F ON E.APP_NO = F.APP_NO WHERE E.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND F.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) ) B
ON A.RA_ITEM_VAL = B.RA_ITEM_VAL -- ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(RA_ITEM_VAL_NM)

SELECT A.APP_NO ,NVL(A.RA_ITEM_VAL, NULL) AS RA_ITEM_VAL ,NVL(B.RA_ITEM_VAL, NULL) AS BEFOR_RA_ITEM_VAL ,NVL(GET_CODE_NAME(#{REFF_COMN_CD}, A.RA_ITEM_VAL), B.RA_ITEM_VAL) AS RA_ITEM_VAL_NM ,CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR != B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN '변경' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR = B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN '유지' WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NOT NULL AND B.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN B.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_ITEM_SCR IS NULL THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END AS GUBUN ,NVL(A.RA_ITEM_SCR, NULL) AS RA_ITEM_SCR ,NVL(B.RA_ITEM_SCR, NULL) AS BEFOR_RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,NVL(B.ABS_HRSK_YN, '') AS BEFOR_ABS_HRSK_YN
FROM (SELECT T.*, '' AS APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ T WHERE T.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) A FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.APP_NO, D.RA_ITEM_VAL, D.RA_ITEM_SCR, D.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL D WHERE D.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(E.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL E LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM_APPR F ON E.APP_NO = F.APP_NO WHERE E.APP_NO = (SELECT MAX(APP_NO) FROM RA_ITEM_APPR WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}) AND F.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) ) B
FROM (SELECT * FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL T WHERE T.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) A FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.APP_NO, D.RA_ITEM_VAL, D.RA_ITEM_SCR, D.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL D WHERE D.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(E.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_APPR_DTL E LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM_APPR F ON E.APP_NO = F.APP_NO WHERE E.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND F.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) ) B
ON A.RA_ITEM_VAL = B.RA_ITEM_VAL LEFT JOIN NIC92B C ON A.RA_ITEM_VAL = C.CNTNT WHERE C.CD = #{REFF_COMN_CD} ORDER BY C.CD_RNK_SQ
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM RA_ITEM_SCR A WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_ITEM_SCR SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_VAL ,B.RA_ITEM_SCR ,B.ABS_HRSK_YN ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM RA_ITEM A LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ B ON A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}
mapper.select: SELECT '-' AS APP_NO ,T.RA_ITEM_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', R.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) || ' ' || R.RA_ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM ,NULL AS NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(MAX(T.UPD_DT),1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(MAX(T.UPD_DT), 5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(MAX(T.UPD_DT), 7,2) AS APP_DT ,NULL AS APPR_ROLE_ID ,NULL AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,'N' AS SN_CCD ,'미적용' AS SN_CCD_NM ,'' AS RSN_CNTNT ,'미적용' AS APPLY_FLAG FROM RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ T LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM R ON T.RA_ITEM_CD = R.RA_ITEM_CD WHERE T.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} GROUP BY T.RA_ITEM_CD, R.RA_MDL_GBN_CD, R.RA_ITEM_NM UNION ALL SELECT X.APP_NO ,X.RA_ITEM_CD ,X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM || ' ' || X.RA_ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM ,X.NUM_SQ ,X.APP_DT ,X.APPR_ROLE_ID ,X.APPR_ROLE_NM ,X.SN_CCD ,X.SN_CCD_NM ,X.RSN_CNTNT ,X.APPLY_FLAG FROM ( SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,C.RA_ITEM_NM ,C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,B.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT E.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE E WHERE E.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN '적용' WHEN B.SN_CCD != 'E' THEN '적용중' ELSE '미적용' END AS APPLY_FLAG FROM RA_ITEM_APPR A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR_HIST B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM C ON A.RA_ITEM_CD = C.RA_ITEM_CD WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND B.SN_CCD = 'E' ) X ORDER BY APP_DT DESC, NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT X.APP_NO ,X.RA_ITEM_CD ,X.RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM || ' ' || X.RA_ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM ,X.NUM_SQ ,X.APP_DT ,X.APPR_ROLE_ID ,X.APPR_ROLE_NM ,X.SN_CCD ,X.SN_CCD_NM ,X.RSN_CNTNT ,X.APPLY_FLAG FROM ( SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,C.RA_ITEM_NM ,C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,B.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.APPR_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT E.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE E WHERE E.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(B.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN '적용' WHEN B.SN_CCD != 'E' THEN '적용중' ELSE '미적용' END AS APPLY_FLAG FROM RA_ITEM_APPR A LEFT JOIN AML_APPR_HIST B ON A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM C ON A.RA_ITEM_CD = C.RA_ITEM_CD WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND B.SN_CCD = 'E' ) X ORDER BY X.APP_NO DESC
SELECT A.CNTNT AS CODE ,A.CD_NM AS NAME FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = #{REFF_COMN_CD}

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2)|| '-'||SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,(SELECT D.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE D WHERE D.ROLE_ID = B.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN '적용' WHEN B.SN_CCD != 'E' THEN '적용중' ELSE '미적용' END AS APPLY_FLAG FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR A ,AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.APP_NO DESC

SELECT X.* ,CASE WHEN X.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN '' ELSE X.SN_CCD_NM END AS SN_CCD_NM_ING ,CASE WHEN X.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN '' WHEN X.SN_CCD = 'N' THEN '미적용' ELSE '적용중' END AS APPLY_FLAG FROM ( SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,NVL(A.LST_WGHT_APP_NO, '0') AS LST_APP_NO --위험평가 가중치 결재번호 ,M.SNO ,M.APP_DT ,M.WLR_SQ ,M.REG_DT ,NVL(M.SN_CCD, 'N') AS SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(M.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재할사람 ,M.NUM_SQ ,M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,M.APP_NO ,('가중치 ' || GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) ) AS ITEM_NM , '1' AS ORDER_NO ,(GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD)) AS SUB_TITLE_NM FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG A ,AML_APPR M WHERE A.LST_WGHT_APP_NO = M.APP_NO(+) AND M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C(+) = 'RA3' UNION ALL SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,A.LST_GRD_APP_NO AS LST_APP_NO --위험등급 결재 번호 ,M.SNO ,M.APP_DT ,M.WLR_SQ ,M.REG_DT ,NVL(M.SN_CCD, 'N') AS SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(M.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재할사람 ,M.NUM_SQ ,M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,M.APP_NO ,('등급판정 ' || GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD)) AS ITEM_NM ,'2' AS ORDER_NO ,(GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) ||' '|| GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) ) AS SUB_TITLE_NM FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG A ,AML_APPR M WHERE A.LST_GRD_APP_NO = M.APP_NO(+) AND M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C(+) = 'RA1' ) X ORDER BY X.ORDER_NO, X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, X.CS_TYP_CD

SELECT (A.L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN * 10) AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , (A.L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX * 10) AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , (B.M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN * 10) AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , (B.M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX * 10) AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , (C.H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN * 10) AS H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ELSE 0 END AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ELSE 0 END AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE RA_GRD_CD = 'L' AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )A , ( SELECT CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ELSE 0 END AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ELSE 0 END AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE RA_GRD_CD = 'M' AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )B , ( SELECT CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ELSE 0 END AS H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE RA_GRD_CD = 'H' AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )C WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD

WITH GDS_SCR AS ( SELECT A.RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ||' <= AND < ' || A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX AS RA_GRD_SCR , A.RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_GRD_CD , B.APP_NO AS RA_APP_NO , B.APP_DT AS RA_APP_DT , B.LST_APP_NO AS RA_LST_APP_NO , B.LST_APP_DT AS RA_LST_APP_DT , B.STD_SN_CCD AS RA_SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.STD_SN_CCD) AS RA_SN_CCD_NM , B.STD_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , B.RA_REF_SN_CCD , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AS SIMULGUBUN , C.SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', C.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM , C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , C.APP_NO , C.APP_DT , C.SNO , C.PRV_APP_NO , C.RSN_CNTNT , C.TARGET_ROLE_ID , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = #{RANKID}) AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_GRD_STD A , RA_GRD_STD_REQ B , AML_APPR C WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND A.RA_GRD_CD = B.RA_GRD_CD AND B.APP_NO = C.APP_NO(+)
AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD}
AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
ORDER BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX DESC ), CUST_TOTAL_CNT AS ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/ CASE WHEN 'A' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END WHEN 'B' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END END AS RA_GRD_CD FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
) GROUP BY RA_GRD_CD ), CUST_STR_CTR_CNT AS ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/'L' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(A.STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(A.CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION ALL SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/'M' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(A.STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(A.CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION ALL SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/'H' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(A.STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(A.CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
)
SELECT RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_NM , RA_GRD_SCR , TOTAL_CNT , STR_CNT , STR_PER , CTR_CNT , CTR_PER , RA_APP_NO , RA_APP_DT , RA_LST_APP_NO , RA_LST_APP_DT , RA_SN_CCD , RA_SN_CCD_NM , RA_SEQ , RA_REF_SN_CCD , SN_CCD , SN_CCD_NM , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , APP_NO , APP_DT , SNO , PRV_APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , POSITION_NAME , SIMULGUBUN , TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_NM , RA_GRD_SCR , TOTAL_CNT , STR_CNT , CASE WHEN STR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((STR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS STR_PER , CTR_CNT , CASE WHEN CTR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((CTR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS CTR_PER , RA_APP_NO , RA_APP_DT , RA_LST_APP_NO , RA_LST_APP_DT , RA_SN_CCD , RA_SN_CCD_NM , RA_SEQ , RA_REF_SN_CCD , SN_CCD , SN_CCD_NM , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , APP_NO , APP_DT , SNO , PRV_APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , POSITION_NAME , SIMULGUBUN , TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '고위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '중위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN '저위험' ELSE '' END AS RA_GRD_NM , A.RA_GRD_SCR , A.RA_GRD_CD , NVL(B.CNT,0) AS TOTAL_CNT , NVL(C.STR_CNT,0) AS STR_CNT , NVL(C.CTR_CNT,0) AS CTR_CNT , A.RA_APP_NO , A.RA_APP_DT , A.RA_LST_APP_NO , A.RA_LST_APP_DT , A.RA_SN_CCD , A.RA_SN_CCD_NM , A.RA_SEQ , A.RA_REF_SN_CCD , A.SN_CCD , A.SN_CCD_NM , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , A.APP_NO , A.APP_DT , A.SNO , A.PRV_APP_NO , A.RSN_CNTNT , A.POSITION_NAME , A.SIMULGUBUN , A.TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM GDS_SCR A , CUST_TOTAL_CNT B , CUST_STR_CTR_CNT C WHERE A.RA_GRD_CD = B.RA_GRD_CD(+) AND A.RA_GRD_CD = C.RA_GRD_CD(+) ) )

WITH GDS_SCR AS ( SELECT RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ||' <= AND < ' || RA_GRD_SCR_MAX AS RA_GRD_SCR , RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_GRD_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE 1=1
AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD}
AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
ORDER BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_GRD_SCR_MAX DESC ), CUST_TOTAL_CNT AS ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/ CASE WHEN 'A' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END WHEN 'B' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END END AS RA_GRD_CD FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
) GROUP BY RA_GRD_CD ), CUST_STR_CTR_CNT AS ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/'L' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(A.STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(A.CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION ALL SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/'M' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(A.STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(A.CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION ALL SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) USE_HASH(A B) PARALLEL(8)*/'H' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(A.STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(A.CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
)
SELECT '[' || LISTAGG( '{"RA_GRD_CD":"' || RA_GRD_CD || '",' || '"TOTAL_CNT": ' || TOTAL_CNT || ',' || '"STR_PER":' || STR_PER2 || ',' || '"CTR_PER":' || CTR_PER2 || '}',',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY RA_GRD_SEQ) || ']' AS JSON_RESULT FROM ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '1' WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '2' ELSE '3' END RA_GRD_SEQ , RA_GRD_NM , RA_GRD_SCR , TOTAL_CNT , STR_CNT , CASE WHEN STR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((STR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS STR_PER , CASE WHEN STR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((STR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2) END AS STR_PER2 , CTR_CNT , CASE WHEN CTR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((CTR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS CTR_PER , CASE WHEN CTR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((CTR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2) END AS CTR_PER2 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '고위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '중위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN '저위험' ELSE '' END AS RA_GRD_NM , A.RA_GRD_SCR , A.RA_GRD_CD , NVL(B.CNT,0) AS TOTAL_CNT , NVL(C.STR_CNT,0) AS STR_CNT , NVL(C.CTR_CNT,0) AS CTR_CNT FROM GDS_SCR A , CUST_TOTAL_CNT B , CUST_STR_CTR_CNT C WHERE A.RA_GRD_CD = B.RA_GRD_CD(+) AND A.RA_GRD_CD = C.RA_GRD_CD(+) ) )

SELECT (A.L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN * 10) AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , (A.L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX * 10) AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , (B.M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN * 10) AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , (B.M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX * 10) AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , (C.H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN * 10) AS H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ELSE 0 END AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ELSE 0 END AS L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ WHERE RA_GRD_CD = 'L' AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )A , ( SELECT CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ELSE 0 END AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ELSE 0 END AS M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ WHERE RA_GRD_CD = 'M' AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )B , ( SELECT CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ELSE 0 END AS H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ WHERE RA_GRD_CD = 'H' AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )C WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD
mapper.update: UPDATE RA_GRD_STD_REQ SET GYLJ_LINE_G_C = '' , STD_SN_CCD = 'E' , STD_SEQ = '' , RA_REF_SN_CCD = '' WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
UPDATE RA_ITEM_WGHT_REQ SET WGHT_SN_CCD = 'E' , WGHT_SEQ = '' , GYLJ_LINE_G_C = '' , RA_REF_SN_CCD = '' WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
mapper.select:
WITH GRD_SCR AS ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */A.RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ||' <= AND < ' || A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX AS RA_GRD_SCR , A.RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_GRD_CD , A.APP_NO AS RA_APP_NO , A.APP_DT AS RA_APP_DT , A.LST_APP_NO AS RA_LST_APP_NO , A.LST_APP_DT AS RA_LST_APP_DT , A.STD_SN_CCD AS RA_SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.STD_SN_CCD) AS RA_SN_CCD_NM , A.STD_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , A.RA_REF_SN_CCD , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AS SIMULGUBUN , B.SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , B.APP_NO , B.APP_DT , B.SNO , B.PRV_APP_NO , B.RSN_CNTNT , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = #{RANKID}) AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+)
AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD}
AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
ORDER BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_GRD_SCR_MAX DESC
), CUST_TOTAL_CNT AS ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ CASE WHEN 'A' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END WHEN 'B' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END END AS RA_GRD_CD FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
) GROUP BY RA_GRD_CD ), CUST_STR_CTR_CNT AS ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */'L' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */'M' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */'H' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
) SELECT RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_NM , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN RA_GRD_SCR ELSE '' END AS RA_GRD_SCR , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN CASE WHEN SIMULGUBUN = 'S' THEN TOTAL_CNT ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS TOTAL_CNT , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN CASE WHEN SIMULGUBUN = 'S' THEN STR_CNT ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS STR_CNT , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN CASE WHEN SIMULGUBUN = 'S' THEN STR_PER ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS STR_PER , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN CASE WHEN SIMULGUBUN = 'S' THEN CTR_CNT ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS CTR_CNT , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN CASE WHEN SIMULGUBUN = 'S' THEN CTR_PER ELSE NULL END ELSE NULL END AS CTR_PER , RA_APP_NO , RA_APP_DT , RA_LST_APP_NO , RA_LST_APP_DT , RA_SN_CCD , RA_SN_CCD_NM , RA_SEQ , RA_REF_SN_CCD , SN_CCD , SN_CCD_NM , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , APP_NO , APP_DT , SNO , PRV_APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , POSITION_NAME , SIMULGUBUN FROM ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_NM , RA_GRD_SCR , TOTAL_CNT , STR_CNT , CASE WHEN STR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((STR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS STR_PER , CTR_CNT , CASE WHEN CTR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((CTR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS CTR_PER , RA_APP_NO , RA_APP_DT , RA_LST_APP_NO , RA_LST_APP_DT , RA_SN_CCD , RA_SN_CCD_NM , RA_SEQ , RA_REF_SN_CCD , SN_CCD , SN_CCD_NM , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , APP_NO , APP_DT , SNO , PRV_APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , POSITION_NAME , SIMULGUBUN FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '고위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '중위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN '저위험' ELSE '' END AS RA_GRD_NM , A.RA_GRD_CD , A.RA_GRD_SCR , NVL(B.CNT,0) AS TOTAL_CNT , NVL(C.STR_CNT,0) AS STR_CNT , NVL(C.CTR_CNT,0) AS CTR_CNT , A.RA_APP_NO , A.RA_APP_DT , A.RA_LST_APP_NO , A.RA_LST_APP_DT , A.RA_SN_CCD , A.RA_SN_CCD_NM , A.RA_SEQ , A.RA_REF_SN_CCD , A.SN_CCD , A.SN_CCD_NM , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , A.APP_NO , A.APP_DT , A.SNO , A.PRV_APP_NO , A.RSN_CNTNT , A.POSITION_NAME , A.SIMULGUBUN FROM GRD_SCR A , CUST_TOTAL_CNT B , CUST_STR_CTR_CNT C WHERE A.RA_GRD_CD = B.RA_GRD_CD(+) AND A.RA_GRD_CD = C.RA_GRD_CD(+) ) )

WITH GRD_SCR AS ( SELECT RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ||' <= AND < ' || RA_GRD_SCR_MAX AS RA_GRD_SCR , RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_GRD_CD , STD_SN_CCD AS RA_SN_CCD , GYLJ_LINE_G_C AS SIMULGUBUN FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ WHERE 1=1
AND CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD}
AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
ORDER BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_GRD_SCR_MAX DESC
), CUST_TOTAL_CNT AS ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */ CASE WHEN 'A' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END WHEN 'B' = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} THEN CASE WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'L' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} THEN 'M' WHEN B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} THEN 'H' ELSE '' END END AS RA_GRD_CD FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
) GROUP BY RA_GRD_CD ), CUST_STR_CTR_CNT AS ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */'L' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{L_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */'M' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >=#{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK < #{M_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
UNION SELECT /*+ FULL(A) PARALLEL(8) */'H' AS RA_GRD_CD , SUM(STR_RPR_TNO) AS STR_CNT , SUM(CTR_RPR_TNO) AS CTR_CNT FROM NIC35B A , NIC01B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO
AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.I_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.I_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK >= #{H_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN} AND A.B_CHECK_DAT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-12),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.B_RSK_GRD_MRK IS NOT NULL
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1'
AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '2'
) SELECT '[' || LISTAGG( '{"RA_GRD_CD":"' || RA_GRD_CD || '",' || '"TOTAL_CNT": ' || TOTAL_CNT || ',' || '"STR_PER":' || STR_PER2 || ',' || '"CTR_PER":' || CTR_PER2 || '}',',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY RA_GRD_SEQ) || ']' AS JSON_RESULT FROM ( SELECT RA_GRD_CD , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '1' WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '2' ELSE '3' END RA_GRD_SEQ , RA_GRD_NM , RA_GRD_SCR , TOTAL_CNT , STR_CNT , CASE WHEN STR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((STR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS STR_PER , CASE WHEN STR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((STR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2) END AS STR_PER2 , CTR_CNT , CASE WHEN CTR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN '0 %' ELSE TO_CHAR(ROUND((CTR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2),'FM99999990.00') || ' %' END AS CTR_PER , CASE WHEN CTR_CNT = 0 OR TOTAL_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((CTR_CNT/TOTAL_CNT)*100,2) END AS CTR_PER2 , RA_SN_CCD , SIMULGUBUN FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '고위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '중위험' WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD = 'L' THEN '저위험' ELSE '' END AS RA_GRD_NM , A.RA_GRD_CD , A.RA_GRD_SCR , NVL(B.CNT,0) AS TOTAL_CNT , NVL(C.STR_CNT,0) AS STR_CNT , NVL(C.CTR_CNT,0) AS CTR_CNT , A.RA_SN_CCD , A.SIMULGUBUN FROM GRD_SCR A , CUST_TOTAL_CNT B , CUST_STR_CTR_CNT C WHERE A.RA_GRD_CD = B.RA_GRD_CD(+) AND A.RA_GRD_CD = C.RA_GRD_CD(+) ) )

SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,B.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', B.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,B.INTV_VAL_YN ,B.REFF_COMN_CD ,C.APP_NO ,C.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', C.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_REQ A ,RA_ITEM B ,( SELECT F.APP_NO, F.SN_CCD, E.CS_TYP_CD, E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG E ,AML_APPR F WHERE E.LST_WGHT_APP_NO = F.APP_NO ) C WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.CS_TYP_CD = C.CS_TYP_CD(+) AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD(+) AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY B.SRT_SQ
SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD AS CODE ,A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAME FROM RA_ITEM A WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SRT_SQ

SELECT A.RA_ID ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,B.APPL_DT ,SUBSTR(B.APPL_DT,1,4)||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APPL_DT,5,2)||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APPL_DT,7,2) AS APPL_DT_CH FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT A ,RA_WORK_INFO B WHERE A.RA_ID = B.RA_ID AND B.APPL_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} GROUP BY A.RA_ID, A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, B.APPL_DT ORDER BY A.RA_ID DESC

SELECT A.RA_ID ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,B.SRT_SQ FROM RA_SMUL_WGHT A ,RA_ITEM B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND A.RA_ID = #{RA_ID} ORDER BY B.SRT_SQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_ITEM_WGHT SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG A ,RA_ITEM_WGHT_REQ B WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND A.LST_WGHT_APP_NO = #{APP_NO}
mapper.select: SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.APP_DT, 5,2)|| '-'|| SUBSTR(A.APP_DT, 7,2) AS APP_DT ,A.SNO ,A.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,A.APPR_ROLE_ID ,A.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = A.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,(SELECT D.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE D WHERE D.ROLE_ID = A.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM ,B.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', B.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A ,( SELECT E.LST_WGHT_APP_NO ,F.APP_NO ,F.CS_TYP_CD ,F.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG E ,RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR F WHERE E.CS_TYP_CD = F.CS_TYP_CD AND E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = F.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND E.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ) B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA3' AND B.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.APP_NO, A.HNDL_DY_TM
