SELECT K.APP_NO ,NVL(K.CS_TYP_CD, D.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD ,NVL(K.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, D.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,NVL(K.RA_ITEM_CD, D.RA_ITEM_CD) AS RA_ITEM_CD ,NVL(K.RA_ITEM_NM, D.RA_ITEM_NM) AS RA_ITEM_NM ,K.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,D.RA_ITEM_WGHT AS BEFOR_RA_ITEM_WGHT ,K.SRT_SQ ,CASE WHEN K.RA_ITEM_WGHT != D.RA_ITEM_WGHT THEN '변경' WHEN K.RA_ITEM_WGHT = D.RA_ITEM_WGHT THEN '유지' WHEN K.RA_ITEM_WGHT IS NOT NULL AND D.RA_ITEM_WGHT IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN D.RA_ITEM_WGHT IS NOT NULL AND K.RA_ITEM_WGHT IS NULL THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END AS GUBUN FROM ( SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', C.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,B.RA_ITEM_CD ,C.RA_ITEM_NM ,B.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,C.SRT_SQ FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR A ,RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR_DTL B ,RA_ITEM C WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.RA_ITEM_CD = C.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ) K FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT E.APP_NO ,E.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', E.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,G.RA_MDL_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A040', G.RA_MDL_GBN_CD) AS RA_MDL_GBN_CD_NM ,F.RA_ITEM_CD ,G.RA_ITEM_NM ,F.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,G.SRT_SQ FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR E ,RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR_DTL F ,RA_ITEM G WHERE E.APP_NO = F.APP_NO AND F.RA_ITEM_CD = G.RA_ITEM_CD AND E.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND E.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(H.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR H WHERE H.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND H.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND H.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ) ) D ON K.RA_ITEM_CD = D.RA_ITEM_CD ORDER BY K.SRT_SQ

SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,NVL(A.LST_GRD_APP_NO, '0') AS APP_NO -- 결재번호 ,NVL(P.SN_CCD, 'N') AS SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', NVL(P.SN_CCD, 'N')) AS SN_CCD_NM ,P.REG_DT AS APP_DT -- 결재일자 ,P.APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재한사람 ,P.TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재할사람 ,P.SNO ,P.NUM_SQ ,'RA1' AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,P.WLR_SQ FROM ( SELECT B.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', B.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,B.LST_GRD_APP_NO --위험등급 결재 번호 FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG B ) A , ( SELECT M.SNO ,M.APP_DT ,M.WLR_SQ ,M.REG_DT ,M.SN_CCD ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재한사람 ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재할사람 ,M.NUM_SQ ,M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,M.APP_NO FROM AML_APPR M WHERE M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA1' ) P WHERE A.LST_GRD_APP_NO = P.APP_NO(+) ORDER BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD

SELECT A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,A.RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RA_GRD_CD) AS RA_GRD_CD_NM ,C.APP_NO ,C.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', C.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ A ,( SELECT F.APP_NO, F.SN_CCD, E.CS_TYP_CD, E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG E ,AML_APPR F WHERE E.LST_GRD_APP_NO = F.APP_NO ) C WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = C.CS_TYP_CD(+) AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD(+) AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,SUBSTR(B.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 5,2)|| '-' || SUBSTR(B.APP_DT, 7, 2) AS APP_DT ,B.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = B.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,(SELECT D.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE D WHERE D.ROLE_ID = B.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM ,B.RSN_CNTNT ,CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'E' THEN '적용' WHEN B.SN_CCD != 'E' THEN '적용중' ELSE '미적용' END AS APPLY_FLAG FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR A ,AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.APP_NO DESC

SELECT A.APP_NO ,A.NUM_SQ ,SUBSTR(A.APP_DT,1,4) ||'-'|| SUBSTR(A.APP_DT, 5,2)|| '-' || SUBSTR(A.APP_DT, 7, 2) AS APP_DT ,A.SNO ,A.SN_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM ,A.APPR_ROLE_ID ,A.TARGET_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = A.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM ,(SELECT D.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE D WHERE D.ROLE_ID = A.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM ,B.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', B.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM FROM AML_APPR_HIST A ,( SELECT E.LST_GRD_APP_NO ,F.APP_NO ,F.CS_TYP_CD ,F.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG E ,RA_GRD_STD_APPR F WHERE E.CS_TYP_CD = F.CS_TYP_CD AND E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = F.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND E.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ) B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA1' AND B.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.APP_NO, A.HNDL_DY_TM

SELECT A.APP_NO ,NVL(A.CS_TYP_CD, D.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD ,NVL(A.CS_TYP_CD_NM, D.CS_TYP_CD_NM) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,NVL(A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, D.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,NVL(A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM, D.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,NVL(A.RA_GRD_CD, D.RA_GRD_CD) AS RA_GRD_CD ,NVL(A.RA_GRD_CD_NM, D.RA_GRD_CD_NM) AS RA_GRD_CD_NM ,D.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX AS BEFOR_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,CASE WHEN A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX != D.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX THEN '변경' WHEN A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX = D.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX THEN '유지' WHEN A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX IS NOT NULL AND D.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN D.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX IS NULL THEN '삭제' ELSE '' END GUBUN FROM ( SELECT E.APP_NO ,E.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', E.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,F.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,F.RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', F.RA_GRD_CD) AS RA_GRD_CD_NM FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR E ,RA_GRD_STD_APPR_DTL F WHERE E.APP_NO = F.APP_NO AND E.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} AND E.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND E.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ) A FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT G.APP_NO ,G.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', G.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,G.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', G.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,H.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,H.RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', H.RA_GRD_CD) AS RA_GRD_CD_NM FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR G ,RA_GRD_STD_APPR_DTL H WHERE G.APP_NO = H.APP_NO AND G.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND G.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND G.APP_NO IN ( SELECT NVL(MAX(R.APP_NO), 0) AS BEFOR_APP_NO FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR R WHERE R.APP_NO < #{APP_NO} AND R.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND R.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ) ) D ON A.RA_GRD_CD = D.RA_GRD_CD ORDER BY A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX
SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD AS CODE ,A.RA_ITEM_NM AS NAME ,A.RA_ITEM_CD AS CD FROM RA_ITEM A UNION ALL SELECT B.CNTNT AS CODE ,B.CD_NM AS NAME ,B.CD AS CD FROM NIC92B B WHERE B.CD IN ('A040', 'A004')

SELECT AML_APPR_HIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS NUM_SQ ,(SELECT NVL(MAX(B.SNO), 0) + 1 FROM AML_APPR B WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND B.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) AS SNO ,(SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD} = 'R' THEN A.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE A.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_D A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND A.SNO = #{SNO} ) AS TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AML_APPR ( GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,NUM_SQ ,SNO ,APP_DT ,WLR_SQ ,APP_NO ,REG_DT ,APPR_ROLE_ID ,TARGET_ROLE_ID ,SN_CCD ,BRN_CD ,HNDL_DY_TM ,HNDL_P_ENO ,RSN_CNTNT ,PRV_APP_NO ) VALUES ( #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } -- GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,#{NUM_SQ} -- NUM_SQ ,#{SNO} -- SNO ,REPLACE( #{APP_DT } , '-', '' ) -- APP_DT ,#{WLR_SQ } -- WLR_SQ ,#{APP_NO } -- APP_NO ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') -- REG_DT ,#{APPR_ROLE_ID } -- APPR_ROLE_ID 결재한사람 ,#{TARGET_ROLE_ID} -- TARGET_ROLE_ID 결제대상자 ,(SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD} = 'R' THEN 'R' WHEN A.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID = 0 THEN 'E' ELSE #{SN_CCD} END FROM C_GYLJ_D A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } AND A.SNO = #{SNO} ) -- SN_CCD ,#{BRN_CD} -- BRN_CD ,SYSDATE -- HNDL_DY_TM ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} -- HNDL_P_ENO ,#{RSN_CNTNT} ,#{PRV_APP_NO} )

INSERT INTO RA_GRD_STD SELECT B.CS_TYP_CD ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,B.RA_GRD_CD ,B.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM RA_CS_TYP_MNG A ,RA_GRD_STD_REQ B WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = B.CS_TYP_CD AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD AND A.LST_GRD_APP_NO = #{APP_NO}
mapper.select: SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD AS RA_ITEM_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_NM AS RA_ITEM_NM ,B.REFF_COMN_CD AS REFF_COMN_CD ,B.MISS_VAL_SCR AS MISS_VAL_SCR ,B.INTV_VAL_YN AS INTV_VAL_YN ,CASE WHEN B.REFF_COMN_CD IS NOT NULL THEN 'SEARCH' ELSE '' END COM_SEARCH ,A.RA_ITEM_WGHT AS RA3 ,B.RA_MDL_GBN_CD FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT A LEFT JOIN RA_ITEM B ON A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY B.SRT_SQ

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY B.CS_NM ) AS NU ,A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.CS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M012', A.CS_TYP_CD) AS CS_TYP_CD_NM ,A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A030', A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) AS NEW_OLD_GBN_CD_NM ,SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,1,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.CS_RGST_DT,7,2) AS CS_RGST_DT ,A.NTN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004', A.NTN_CD) AS NTN_CD_NM ,A.AML_JOB_GUBN ,GET_CODE_NAME('M009', A.AML_JOB_GUBN) AS AML_JOB_GUBN_NM ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M008', A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) AS INDST_RSK_DVD_CD_NM ,A.AGE ,A.FNDTN_PRD ,A.GDS_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M037', A.GDS_CD) AS GDS_CD_NM ,A.CHNNL_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044', A.CHNNL_CD) AS CHNNL_CD_NM ,A.STR_RPR_CNT ,A.CTR_RPR_CNT ,A.DL_PRD ,B.CS_NM ,B.ENG_CS_NM ,B.RSDNC_F ,GET_CODE_NAME('M005', B.RSDNC_F) AS RSDNC_F_NM ,A.MINOR_YN ,A.NRES_YN ,A.NFTC_YN ,A.NPRFT_GRP_YN ,A.HNW_YN ,A.HRSK_NTN_YN ,D.AI_RA_GRD_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', D.AI_RA_GRD_CD) AS AI_RA_GRD_CD_NM ,CASE WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '03' THEN ( CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN '06' --상장여부:10영리법인(상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN '01' --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '03' --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN '04' --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE '09' END ) WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '04' THEN '04' --비영리단체여부:04비영리법인 ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN --법인유형 ,CASE WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '03' THEN ( CASE WHEN C.LSTNG_F = 'Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '06') --상장여부:01영리법인(상장) WHEN C.FOGN_F = 'Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '01') --금융기관여부:20 WHEN C.NTN_PBLIC_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '03') --국가지방자치단체:30 WHEN C.NPRFT_GROUP_F ='Y' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '04') --비영리단체여부:50비영리법인 ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '09') END ) WHEN A.CS_TYP_CD = '04' THEN GET_CODE_NAME('C909', '04') --비영리단체여부:04비영리법인 ELSE '' END AS RSK_GUBUN_NM --법인유형 FROM NIC01B_1 A LEFT JOIN NIC01B B ON A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID LEFT JOIN NIC03B C ON A.AML_CUST_ID = C.AML_CUST_ID LEFT JOIN AI_RA_RSLT D ON A.AML_CUST_ID = D.AML_CUST_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD}
AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
AND B.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%'
AND B.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%'
AND ( B.CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} || '%' OR B.ENG_CS_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%')
OFFSET ((#{thisPage} - 1) * #{pageCount}) ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageCount} ROWS ONLY

SELECT A.RA_GRD_CD ,CASE WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD ='L' THEN 0 WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD ='M' THEN (SELECT MIN(A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX) FROM RA_GRD_STD A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ) WHEN A.RA_GRD_CD ='H' THEN (SELECT MAX(A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX) FROM RA_GRD_STD A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND A.RA_GRD_CD != 'H' ) END RA_GRD_SCR_MIN ,A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX FROM RA_GRD_STD A WHERE A.CS_TYP_CD =#{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD =#{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX

SELECT X.ORDER_COL ,X.CS_TYP_CD ,X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,X.RA_ITEM_CD ,X.RA_ITEM_VAL ,X.RA_ITEM_SCR ,X.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,X.RA_ITEM_SCR * X.RA_ITEM_WGHT AS RA_ITEM_LST_SCR ,X.ABS_HRSK_YN ,X.INTV_VAL_YN ,X.MISS_VAL_SCR FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ORDER_COL ,B.CS_TYP_CD ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_ITEM_VAL ,A.RA_ITEM_SCR ,B.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,E.INTV_VAL_YN ,E.MISS_VAL_SCR FROM RA_ITEM E ,RA_ITEM_SCR A ,RA_ITEM_WGHT B WHERE E.USE_YN ='Y' AND E.INTV_VAL_YN ='N' AND E.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND B.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND A.RA_ITEM_VAL = #{RA_VALUE, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION SELECT 2 AS ORDER_COL ,F.CS_TYP_CD ,F.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,F.RA_ITEM_CD ,#{RA_VALUE} AS RA_ITEM_VAL ,D.MISS_VAL_SCR AS RA_ITEM_SCR ,F.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,'' AS ABS_HRSK_YN ,D.INTV_VAL_YN ,D.MISS_VAL_SCR FROM RA_ITEM D ,RA_ITEM_WGHT F WHERE D.USE_YN ='Y' AND D.INTV_VAL_YN ='N' AND D.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND F.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND F.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} ) X WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY X.ORDER_COL ASC

SELECT X.ORDER_COL ,X.CS_TYP_CD ,X.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,X.RA_ITEM_CD ,X.RA_ITEM_VAL ,X.RA_ITEM_SCR ,X.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,X.RA_ITEM_SCR * X.RA_ITEM_WGHT AS RA_ITEM_LST_SCR ,X.ABS_HRSK_YN ,X.INTV_VAL_YN ,X.MISS_VAL_SCR FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ORDER_COL ,B.CS_TYP_CD ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,B.RA_ITEM_CD ,A.RA_ITEM_VAL AS RA_ITEM_VAL ,A.RA_ITEM_SCR ,B.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,A.ABS_HRSK_YN ,E.INTV_VAL_YN ,E.MISS_VAL_SCR FROM RA_ITEM E ,RA_ITEM_SCR A ,RA_ITEM_WGHT B WHERE E.USE_YN ='Y' AND E.INTV_VAL_YN ='Y' AND E.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND B.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND TO_NUMBER(A.RA_ITEM_VAL) = CASE WHEN (SELECT MIN(TO_NUMBER(F.RA_ITEM_VAL)) FROM RA_ITEM_SCR F WHERE F.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND TO_NUMBER(F.RA_ITEM_VAL) >= #{RA_VALUE} ) IS NULL THEN (SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(G.RA_ITEM_VAL)) FROM RA_ITEM_SCR G WHERE G.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND TO_NUMBER(G.RA_ITEM_VAL) <= #{RA_VALUE} ) ELSE (SELECT MIN(TO_NUMBER(H.RA_ITEM_VAL)) FROM RA_ITEM_SCR H WHERE H.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND TO_NUMBER(H.RA_ITEM_VAL) >= #{RA_VALUE} ) END
UNION SELECT 2 AS ORDER_COL ,C.CS_TYP_CD ,C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD ,C.RA_ITEM_CD ,TO_CHAR(#{RA_VALUE}) AS RA_ITEM_VALUE ,D.MISS_VAL_SCR AS RA_ITEM_SCR ,C.RA_ITEM_WGHT ,''AS ABS_HRSK_YN ,D.INTV_VAL_YN ,D.MISS_VAL_SCR FROM RA_ITEM D ,RA_ITEM_WGHT C WHERE D.USE_YN ='Y' AND D.INTV_VAL_YN ='Y' AND D.RA_ITEM_CD = C.RA_ITEM_CD AND C.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND D.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ) X WHERE ROWNUM =1 ORDER BY X.ORDER_COL ASC

SELECT C.CD ,C.CNTNT AS CODE ,C.CD_NM AS NAME ,B.RA_ITEM_SCR ,A.RA_ITEM_NM ,A.RA_ITEM_CD ,B.ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM A ,RA_ITEM_SCR B ,NIC92B C WHERE A.REFF_COMN_CD = #{CODE_VAL} AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND C.CD = #{CODE_VAL} AND C.CD = A.REFF_COMN_CD AND C.CNTNT = B.RA_ITEM_VAL AND C.USE_F ='Y' AND A.USE_YN ='Y'
AND C.CD_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CODE_NM} ||'%'
ORDER BY C.CD_RNK_SQ

SELECT C.CD ,C.CNTNT AS CODE ,C.CD_NM AS NAME ,'' RA_ITEM_SCR ,'' RA_ITEM_NM ,'' RA_ITEM_CD FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = #{CODE_VAL} AND C.USE_F ='Y'
AND C.CD_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CODE_NM} ||'%'

WITH AGE_VALUES AS ( SELECT MIN(CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(A.RA_ITEM_VAL) >= TO_NUMBER(#{NOWAGE}) THEN TO_NUMBER(A.RA_ITEM_VAL) END) AS MIN_AGE ,MAX(TO_NUMBER(A.RA_ITEM_VAL)) AS MAX_AGE FROM RA_ITEM_SCR A WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I005' ) SELECT #{NOWAGE} AS INSERT_AGE ,(SELECT C.RA_ITEM_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_SCR C WHERE C.RA_ITEM_CD = 'I005' AND TO_NUMBER(C.RA_ITEM_VAL) = ( SELECT NVL(B.MIN_AGE, B.MAX_AGE) FROM AGE_VALUES B ) ) AS RA_ITEM_SCR ,#{ROWINDEX} AS ROWINDEX FROM DUAL

SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT A.AML_CUST_ID ,A.AI_RA_GRD_CD --위험 분류 코드 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.AI_RA_GRD_CD) AS AI_RA_GRD_CD_NM ,B.AI_TYPE --변수 구분 코드 ,B.AI_FACTOR --변수ID ,B.AI_FACTOR_NM --변수 이름 ,B.AI_VALUE --변수값 ,B.AI_INF --영향도(%) ,B.AI_INF_D --영향도 방향 ,NVL((SELECT ( (B.AI_INF - MIN(C.AI_INF))/NULLIF((MAX(C.AI_INF) - MIN(C.AI_INF)), 0) * 100) FROM AI_RA_ITEM C WHERE C.AI_FACTOR = B.AI_FACTOR), 0) AS AI_INF_LO_V --상대영향도 FROM AI_RA_RSLT A ,AI_RA_ITEM B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND A.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} ORDER BY B.AI_INF DESC ) E
WHERE ROWNUM <= #{top_flag}

SELECT A.RA_GRD_CD ,A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX FROM RA_GRD_STD A WHERE (A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD) IN ( SELECT B.CS_TYP_CD ,B.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD FROM NIC01B_1 B WHERE B.AML_CUST_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} ) ORDER BY DECODE(A.RA_GRD_CD, 'L', 0, 'M', 1, 'H', 2)

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT NIC24.CRT_DT , NIC24.GDS_DIT_CD , NIC24.GDS_DIT_NM , NIC24.GDS_NO , NIC24.GDS_NM , NIC24.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR , NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD , CASE WHEN NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE ( SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A004' AND CNTNT = NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD ) END AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM , NIC24.BIZ_FELD , NIC24.STATE , CASE WHEN NIC24.STATE = 'E' THEN '평가완료' ELSE '평가필요' END AS STATE_NM , NIC24.EVL_DT , NIC24.APPV_REQE_DT , NIC24.APPV_REQE_ID , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = NIC24.APPV_REQE_ID) AS APPV_REQ_NM , NIC24.LAST_APP_DT , NIC24.LAST_APP_ID , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = NIC24.LAST_APP_ID ) AS LAST_APP_NM , NIC24.R_APP_DT , NIC24.R_APP_ID , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = NIC24.R_APP_ID ) AS R_APP_NM , 'RA' AS APP_GUBUN , P.APP_NO , P.APP_DT , P.WLR_SQ , P.REG_DT , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ( SELECT CNTNT FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A038' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN '미승인' ELSE ( SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A038' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD_NM , P.APPR_ROLE_NM , P.TARGET_ROLE_ID , P.TARGET_ROLE_NM , P.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , P.GYLJ_ROLE_NM , P.NUM_SQ , P.GYLJ_LINE_G_C FROM NIC24B NIC24 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.SNO , M.APP_DT , M.WLR_SQ , M.REG_DT , M.SN_CCD , ( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM , ( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID ) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM , S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , ( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = GYLJ_ROLE_ID ) AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM , M.NUM_SQ , M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , M.APP_NO , M.TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM AML_APPR M , C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND ( M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ ) IN ( SELECT /*+ IDEX(M PK_AML_APPR) */ T.APP_NO , MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD' GROUP BY T.APP_NO ) ) P ON ( NIC24.APP_NO = P.APP_NO ) ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.CRT_DT >= TO_CHAR( #{CRT_SD_DT} || '00000000') AND A.CRT_DT <= TO_CHAR( #{CRT_ED_DT} || '99999999')
AND A.EVL_DT >= TO_CHAR( #{EVL_SD_DT} || '00000000') AND A.EVL_DT <= TO_CHAR( #{EVL_ED_DT} || '99999999')
AND A.STATE = #{STATE_GUBUN}
AND ( A.STATE = 'S' OR A.STATE IS NULL OR A.STATE = '' )
ORDER BY A.CRT_DT

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT NIC24.CRT_DT , NIC24.GDS_DIT_CD , NIC24.GDS_DIT_NM , NIC24.GDS_NO , NIC24.GDS_NM , NIC24.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR , NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD , CASE WHEN NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE ( SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A004' AND CNTNT = NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD ) END AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM , NIC24.BIZ_FELD , NIC24.STATE , CASE WHEN NIC24.STATE = 'E' THEN '평가완료' ELSE '평가필요' END AS STATE_NM , NIC24.EVL_DT , NIC24.APPV_REQE_DT , NIC24.APPV_REQE_ID , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = NIC24.APPV_REQE_ID) AS APPV_REQ_NM , NIC24.LAST_APP_DT , NIC24.LAST_APP_ID , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = NIC24.LAST_APP_ID ) AS LAST_APP_NM , NIC24.R_APP_DT , NIC24.R_APP_ID , ( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = NIC24.R_APP_ID ) AS R_APP_NM , 'RA' AS APP_GUBUN , P.APP_NO , P.APP_DT , P.WLR_SQ , P.REG_DT , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ( SELECT CNTNT FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A038' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN '미승인' ELSE ( SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A038' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD_NM , P.APPR_ROLE_NM , P.TARGET_ROLE_ID , P.TARGET_ROLE_NM , P.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , P.GYLJ_ROLE_NM , P.NUM_SQ , P.GYLJ_LINE_G_C FROM NIC24B NIC24 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.SNO , M.APP_DT , M.WLR_SQ , M.REG_DT , M.SN_CCD , ( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID ) AS APPR_ROLE_NM , ( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID ) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM , S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , ( SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = GYLJ_ROLE_ID ) AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM , M.NUM_SQ , M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , M.APP_NO , M.TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM AML_APPR M , C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND ( M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ ) IN ( SELECT /*+ IDEX(M PK_AML_APPR) */ T.APP_NO , MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD' GROUP BY T.APP_NO ) ) P ON ( NIC24.APP_NO = P.APP_NO ) ) A WHERE 1=1 AND A.GDS_DIT_CD = #{GDS_DIT_CD} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO}

SELECT NIC24.PRD_WRNG_DT -- 상품 및 서비스 전담부서 작성일자 , NIC24.PRD_PSCH_NM -- 상품 및 서비스 전담부서 담당자 , NIC24.AML_WRNG_DT -- AML전담부서 작성일자 , NIC24.AML_PSCH_NM -- AML전담부서 담당자 , NIC24.RPOT_WRNG_DT -- 보고책임자 작성일자 , NIC24.RPOT_PSCH_NM -- 보고책임명 , NIC24.GDS_DIT_NM -- 상품종류명 , NIC24.GDS_DIT_CD -- 상품종류코드 , NIC24.GDS_NM -- 상품명 , NIC24.GDS_NO -- 상품번호 , NIC24.BIZ_FELD -- 업무영역(수신/여신) , NIC24.BIZ_DV_DETL -- 업무구분 상세 , NIC24.ENTR_TRG -- 가입대상 , NIC24.ENTR_CHNL -- 가입채널 , NIC24.ESSN_BILN_PPRS -- 필수징구서류 , NIC24.PRD_SRVC_NM -- 유사상품/서비스명칭 , NIC24.PRD_SRVC_CD -- 유사상품/서비스코드 , NIC24.PRD_CNTN -- 상품내용 , PRD_YN01, PRD_YN02, PRD_YN03, PRD_YN04, PRD_YN05, PRD_YN06, PRD_YN07, PRD_YN08, PRD_YN09, PRD_YN10 , PRD_YN11, PRD_YN12, PRD_YN13, PRD_YN14, PRD_YN15, PRD_YN16, PRD_YN17, PRD_YN18, PRD_YN19, PRD_YN20 , PRD_YN21, PRD_YN22, PRD_YN23, PRD_YN24, PRD_YN25, PRD_YN26, PRD_YN27, PRD_YN28, PRD_YN29, PRD_YN30 , PRD_YN31, PRD_YN32 , PRD_YN01_RMK, PRD_YN02_RMK, PRD_YN03_RMK, PRD_YN04_RMK, PRD_YN05_RMK, PRD_YN06_RMK, PRD_YN07_RMK, PRD_YN08_RMK, PRD_YN09_RMK, PRD_YN10_RMK , PRD_YN11_RMK, PRD_YN12_RMK, PRD_YN13_RMK, PRD_YN14_RMK, PRD_YN15_RMK, PRD_YN16_RMK, PRD_YN17_RMK, PRD_YN18_RMK, PRD_YN19_RMK, PRD_YN20_RMK , PRD_YN21_RMK, PRD_YN22_RMK, PRD_YN23_RMK, PRD_YN24_RMK, PRD_YN25_RMK, PRD_YN26_RMK, PRD_YN27_RMK, PRD_YN28_RMK, PRD_YN29_RMK, PRD_YN30_RMK , PRD_YN31_RMK, PRD_YN32_RMK , NIC24.LST_RSK_EAL_SOR -- 위험점수 , NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD -- 위험등급코드 , ( SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A004' AND CNTNT = NIC24.RSK_GRD_CD ) AS RSK_GRD_NM , NIC24.UNQ_RSK_GNL_OPNN -- 고유위험종합의견 , NIC24.CTL_RSK_GNL_OPNN -- 통제위험종합의견 , NIC24.AML_CRT_DT -- AML 생성일자 , NIC24.CRT_DT -- 생성일자 , NIC24.EVL_DT -- 평가일자 , NIC24.STATE -- 상태 , P.SNO , P.APP_NO , P.APP_DT , P.WLR_SQ , P.REG_DT , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ( SELECT CNTNT FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A038' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD -- 결재상태코드 , CASE WHEN P.SN_CCD IS NULL THEN '미승인' ELSE ( SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'A038' AND CNTNT = P.SN_CCD ) END AS SN_CCD_NM -- 결재상태 , P.APPR_ROLE_NM , P.TARGET_ROLE_NM , P.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , P.GYLJ_ROLE_NM , P.NUM_SQ , P.GYLJ_LINE_G_C FROM NIC24B NIC24 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT M.SNO , M.APP_DT , M.WLR_SQ , M.REG_DT , M.SN_CCD , (SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.APPR_ROLE_ID) AS APPR_ROLE_NM -- 결재한사람 , (SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = M.TARGET_ROLE_ID) AS TARGET_ROLE_NM -- 결재할사람 , S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID -- 결재한 사람ID , (SELECT C.ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE C WHERE C.ROLE_ID = S.GYLJ_ROLE_ID) AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM , M.NUM_SQ , M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , M.APP_NO FROM AML_APPR M , C_GYLJ_D S WHERE S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD' AND S.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = M.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND S.SNO = M.SNO AND (M.APP_NO, M.NUM_SQ) IN (SELECT /*+ INDEX(T PK_AML_APPR)*/ T.APP_NO , MAX(T.NUM_SQ) FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.APP_NO = M.APP_NO AND T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD' GROUP BY T.APP_NO )
) P ON NIC24.APP_NO = P.APP_NO WHERE NIC24.GDS_DIT_CD = #{GDS_DIT_CD} AND NIC24.CRT_DT = #{CRT_DT}
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC24B SET LST_RSK_EAL_SOR = ( SELECT (( SUM( CNT1 + CNT2 + CNT3 + CNT4 + CNT5 + CNT6 + CNT7 + CNT8 + CNT9 + CNT10 + CNT11 + CNT12 + CNT13 + CNT14 + CNT15 + CNT16 + CNT17 + CNT18 + CNT19 + CNT20) / 20 ) * 100 ) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(PRD_YN03, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT1 , DECODE(PRD_YN04, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT2 , DECODE(PRD_YN05, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT3 , DECODE(PRD_YN06, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT4 , DECODE(PRD_YN07, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT5 , DECODE(PRD_YN08, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT6 , DECODE(PRD_YN09, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT7 , DECODE(PRD_YN10, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT8 , DECODE(PRD_YN11, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT9 , DECODE(PRD_YN12, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT10 , DECODE(PRD_YN13, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT11 , DECODE(PRD_YN14, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT12 , DECODE(PRD_YN15, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT13 , DECODE(PRD_YN16, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT14 , DECODE(PRD_YN17, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT15 , DECODE(PRD_YN18, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT16 , DECODE(PRD_YN19, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT17 , DECODE(PRD_YN20, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT18 , DECODE(PRD_YN21, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT19 , DECODE(PRD_YN22, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT20 FROM NIC24B WHERE GDS_DIT_CD = #{GDS_DIT_CD} ) ) WHERE GDS_DIT_CD = #{GDS_DIT_CD} AND CRT_DT = #{CRT_DT}

UPDATE NIC24B SET LST_RSK_EAL_SOR = ( SELECT (( SUM( CNT1 + CNT2 + CNT3 + CNT4 + CNT5 + CNT6 + CNT7 + CNT8 + CNT9 + CNT10 + CNT11 + CNT12 + CNT13 + CNT14 + CNT15 + CNT16 + CNT17 + CNT18 + CNT19 ) / 19 ) * 100 ) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(PRD_YN03, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT1 , DECODE(PRD_YN04, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT2 , DECODE(PRD_YN05, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT3 , DECODE(PRD_YN06, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT4 , DECODE(PRD_YN07, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT5 , DECODE(PRD_YN08, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT6 , DECODE(PRD_YN09, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT7 , DECODE(PRD_YN10, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT8 , DECODE(PRD_YN11, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT9 , DECODE(PRD_YN12, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT10 , DECODE(PRD_YN13, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT11 , DECODE(PRD_YN14, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT12 , DECODE(PRD_YN15, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT13 , DECODE(PRD_YN16, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT14 , DECODE(PRD_YN17, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT15 , DECODE(PRD_YN18, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT16 , DECODE(PRD_YN19, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT17 , DECODE(PRD_YN20, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT18 , DECODE(PRD_YN21, 'Y', 1, 0) AS CNT19 FROM NIC24B WHERE GDS_DIT_CD = #{GDS_DIT_CD} ) ) WHERE GDS_DIT_CD = #{GDS_DIT_CD} AND CRT_DT = #{CRT_DT}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO NIC92B A USING DUAL ON ( A.CD = 'M037' AND A.CNTNT = #{CNTNT} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CD_NM = #{CD_NM} , HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CD , CNTNT , CD_NM , USE_F , CD_RNK_SQ , GRP_CD , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( 'M037' , #{CNTNT} , #{CD_NM} , #{USE_F} , (SELECT MAX(CD_RNK_SQ)+1 FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M037') , '' , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_SCR_REQ A USING DUAL ON ( A.RA_ITEM_CD = 'A060' AND A.RA_ITEM_VAL = #{CNTNT} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET RA_ITEM_SCR = #{RA_ITEM_SCR} , UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , UPD_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_VAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN , REG_ID , REG_DT , UPD_ID , UPD_DT ) VALUES ( 'A060' , #{CNTNT} , #{RA_ITEM_SCR} , 'N' , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , '' , '' )
mapper.select: SELECT 'CDD_100' AS CODE , 'CDD_100 : 1XX 전체' AS NAME , 'CDD_010' AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'CDD_200' AS CODE , 'CDD_200 : 2XX 전체' AS NAME , 'CDD_020' AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '-------' AS CODE , '------- : ---------------------------------------------------' AS NAME , 'CDD_000' AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '-------' AS CODE , '------- : ---------------------------------------------------' AS NAME , 'CDD_099' AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '-------' AS CODE , '------- : ---------------------------------------------------' AS NAME , 'CDD_199' AS ORDERBY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT MNTN_STNR_CODE AS CODE , MNTN_STNR_CODE || ' : ' || MNTN_STNR_NAME AS NAME , MNTN_STNR_CODE AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_MSTR WHERE MNTN_STNR_CODE NOT LIKE 'CDD_3%' AND MNTN_STNR_CODE NOT IN ('CDD_214') ORDER BY 3
mapper.update: UPDATE SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD SET ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE = #{ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE}, ACTN_CTNT = #{ACTN_CTNT}, ACTN_EMPY_NO = #{ACTN_EMPY_NO}, ACTN_DATE_TIME = SYSDATE, CDD_DUTY_FLFL_TAGT_YN = #{CDD_DUTY_FLFL_TAGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CDD_RESN_CODE = CASE WHEN 'Y' = #{CDD_DUTY_FLFL_TAGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} THEN '2' ELSE '' END WHERE MNTN_DATE = REPLACE(#{MNTN_DATE},'/') AND MNTN_STNR_CODE = #{MNTN_STNR_CODE} AND CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = #{CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT MNTN_STNR_CODE AS CODE , MNTN_STNR_CODE || ' : ' || MNTN_STNR_NAME AS NAME FROM SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_MSTR WHERE MNTN_STNR_CODE LIKE 'CDD_3%' ORDER BY MNTN_STNR_CODE
mapper.update: UPDATE SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD SET ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE = #{ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE}, ACTN_CTNT = #{ACTN_CTNT}, ACTN_EMPY_NO = #{ACTN_EMPY_NO}, ACTN_DATE_TIME = SYSDATE, CDD_DUTY_FLFL_TAGT_YN = #{CDD_DUTY_FLFL_TAGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CDD_RESN_CODE = CASE WHEN 'Y' = #{CDD_DUTY_FLFL_TAGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} THEN '2' ELSE '' END WHERE MNTN_DATE = REPLACE(#{MNTN_DATE},'/') AND MNTN_STNR_CODE = #{MNTN_STNR_CODE} AND CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = #{CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.RNMCNO -- 고객ID , A.INDV_CORP_CCD -- 개인법인구분 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , A.CS_NM -- 고객명 , A.ENG_CS_NM -- 고객명(영문) , GET_CODE_NAME('M002',A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_CCD -- 실명구분 , A.CS_NO AS CS_NO_VIEW -- 실명번호 , CASE WHEN NVL(B.SEX_CD, '') = '1' THEN '남' WHEN NVL(B.SEX_CD, '') = '2' THEN '여' WHEN NVL(B.SEX_CD, '') = '9' THEN '알수없음' ELSE NVL(B.SEX_CD, '') END AS GENDER -- 성별 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- --, GET_CODE_NAME('S004',A.NTN_CD) AS NTN_CD -- 소속국가 --, GET_CODE_NAME('S004',A.RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD ) AS RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD -- 거주국가 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(I.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(I.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(J.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS NTN_CD -- 소속국가 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(K.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(K.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(L.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD -- 거주국가 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.BRTDY, '') AS BRTDY -- 생년월일 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.BRTDY)) = 8 THEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(A.BRTDY, 'YYYYMMDD')) /12)) ELSE '' END AS AGE -- 연령 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN X WHERE 1 = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN Y WHERE Y.ENTY_ID = X.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND Y.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND Y.VLD_YN = 'Y' ) AND X.CLNT_ENTY_ID = TO_NUMBER(A.RNMCNO)), 'N (CDD만 존재)') AS SS_CLNT_YN -- 당사고객여부 , GET_CODE_NAME('M001',A.CS_ST_CD) AS CS_ST_CD -- 고객상태 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',A.CS_RGST_DT,'') AS CS_RGST_DT -- 고객등록일자 , A.LG_AMT_ASTS_F -- 고액자산가여부 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN)) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN) || '] ' || CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 1, 1) = '0' THEN '미제공' WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 1, 1) = '1' THEN '근로소득자' WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 1, 1) = '2' THEN '자영업자' WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 1, 1) = '3' THEN '전문직' WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 1, 1) = '4' THEN '기타금융업' WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 1, 1) = '9' THEN '기타' ELSE SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 1, 1) END || '-' || CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 2, 1) = '9' THEN '기타' ELSE NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '01437' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN)), '미정의값') END || CASE WHEN NVL(CDD.JOB_CODE, '') = TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN) AND SUBSTR(TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN), 2, 1) = '9' AND LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(CDD.JOB_NAME, ''))) > 0 THEN '(' || TRIM(CDD.JOB_NAME) || ')' ELSE '' END ELSE TRIM(A.AML_JOB_GUBN) END AS JOB_NAME -- 직업 , A.EMAIL_ID -- EMAIL , A.EMAIL_HOST_NAME -- EMAIL --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , TRIM(NVL(TEL_1.CNTY_NATI_CRYP, '')) AS TEL1_0_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(TEL_1.CNTY_AREA_CRYP, '')) AS TEL1_1_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(TEL_1.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, '')) AS TEL1_2_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(TEL_1.CNTY_NO_CRYP, '')) AS TEL1_3_CRYP
, TRIM(NVL(TEL_2.CNTY_NATI_CRYP, '')) AS TEL2_0_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(TEL_2.CNTY_AREA_CRYP, '')) AS TEL2_1_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(TEL_2.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, '')) AS TEL2_2_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(TEL_2.CNTY_NO_CRYP, '')) AS TEL2_3_CRYP
, TRIM(NVL(MOB.CNTY_NATI_CRYP, '')) AS MOB_0_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(MOB.CNTY_AREA_CRYP, '')) AS MOB_1_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(MOB.CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, '')) AS MOB_2_CRYP , TRIM(NVL(MOB.CNTY_NO_CRYP, '')) AS MOB_3_CRYP
, TRIM(NVL(ADDR_1.PST_NO, '')) AS ADDR_PS_PST_NO , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_1.BSC_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_PS_BSC , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_1.DNG_FLWG_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_PS_DTL
, TRIM(NVL(ADDR_2.PST_NO, '')) AS ADDR_OF_PST_NO , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_2.BSC_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_OF_BSC , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_2.DNG_FLWG_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_OF_DTL
, TRIM(NVL(ADDR_1.PST_NO, '')) AS ADDR_HQ_PST_NO , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_1.BSC_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_HQ_BSC , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_1.DNG_FLWG_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_HQ_DTL
, TRIM(NVL(ADDR_2.PST_NO, '')) AS ADDR_BN_PST_NO , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_2.BSC_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_BN_BSC , TRIM(NVL(ADDR_2.DNG_FLWG_ADDR, '')) AS ADDR_BN_DTL --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT J WHERE ACNT_OWNR_ID = TO_NUMBER(A.RNMCNO) AND ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE = 'AC' AND ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC','FOAC','FPAC','SVAC')), 0) AS ACNT_AC_CNT -- 정상계좌건수 , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT J WHERE ACNT_OWNR_ID = TO_NUMBER(A.RNMCNO) AND ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC','FOAC','FPAC','SVAC')), 0) AS ACNT_TOT -- 총계좌건수 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL((SELECT MAX(OPNG_DATE) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT WHERE ACNT_OWNR_ID = TO_NUMBER(A.RNMCNO) AND ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC','FOAC','FPAC','SVAC')), ''), '') AS LAST_ACNT_OPNG_DATE -- 최종계좌개설일자 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL(F_ACNT.FIRST_OPNG_DATE, ''), '') AS FIRST_OPNG_DATE , NVL(F_ACNT.FIRST_DTBR_NAME, '') AS FIRST_DTBR_NAME , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL(L_ACNT.LAST_OPNG_DATE, ''), '') AS LAST_OPNG_DATE , NVL(L_ACNT.LAST_DTBR_NAME, '') AS LAST_DTBR_NAME --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(MD.DTBR_CODE, ''))) = 5 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(MD.DTBR_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(MD.DTBR_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS MGR_MD_DTBR , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(MGR.MAIN_MNGR_EMPY_NO, ''))) = 6 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(MGR.MAIN_MNGR_EMPY_NO, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(MU.USER_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS MGR_MU_EMPY --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , A.NPRFT_GROUP_F -- 비영리단체여부 , CASE WHEN A.NPRFT_GROUP_F = 'Y' THEN '비영리법인' ELSE '영리법인' END AS INSN_SECT -- 법인구분 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',TRIM(NVL(C.FNDTN_DT, '')),'') AS FNDTN_DT -- 설립일자(법인) , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(C.FNDTN_DT, ''))) = 8 THEN TO_CHAR(TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE), TO_DATE(TRIM(NVL(C.FNDTN_DT, '')), 'YYYYMMDD')) /12)) || '년' ELSE '' END AS ENTY_AGE -- 존속기간 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD)) > 0 THEN '[' || TRIM(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '00631' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = TRIM(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD)), '미정의값') || CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(CDD.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE)) > 0 AND TRIM(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD) <> TRIM(CDD.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) THEN ' (CDD : [' || TRIM(CDD.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(J.NOTE_CTNT) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN J WHERE J.RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND J.RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'INKN' AND RISK_DTLS_CODE = CDD.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) , '미정의값') || ')' ELSE '' END ELSE '' END AS STND_INDY_CLSN_NAME -- 업종
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(CDD.REL_OWNR_WRIT_NAME,''))) > 0 THEN TRIM(NVL(CDD.REL_OWNR_WRIT_NAME,'')) || CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(CDD.REL_OWNR_WRIT_FNCL_ROLE_NAME,''))) > 0 THEN '(' || TRIM(NVL(CDD.REL_OWNR_WRIT_FNCL_ROLE_NAME,'')) || ')' ELSE '' END ELSE '' END AS WRIT_NAME -- 작성자 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , C.RPRST_P_NM1 -- 대표자1성명 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',C.RPRST_P_BRDY1,'') AS RPRST_P_BRDY1 -- 대표자1생년월일 , GET_CODE_NAME('S004',C.RPRST_P_NTNLT1) AS RPRST_P_NTNLT1 -- 대표자1국가 , C.RPRST_P_NM2 -- 대표자2성명 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',C.RPRST_P_BRDY2,'') AS RPRST_P_BRDY2 -- 대표자2생년월일 , GET_CODE_NAME('S004',C.RPRST_P_NTNLT2) AS RPRST_P_NTNLT2 -- 대표자2국가 , C.RPRST_P_NM3 -- 대표자3성명 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',C.RPRST_P_BRDY3,'') AS RPRST_P_BRDY3 -- 대표자3생년월일 , GET_CODE_NAME('S004',C.RPRST_P_NTNLT3) AS RPRST_P_NTNLT3 -- 대표자3국가 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FROM NIC01B A -- 마스터 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD CDD -- CDD마스터(only for 직업기타내용) ON A.RNMCNO = CDD.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC02B B -- 개인 ON A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC03B C -- 법인 ON A.RNMCNO = C.RNMCNO
LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC04B TEL_1 -- 개인 : 자택전화, 법인 : 본점전화 ON A.RNMCNO = TEL_1.RNMCNO AND TEL_1.CNTC_TYP_CD = '1' LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC04B TEL_2 -- 개인 : 직장전화, 법인 : 사업장전화 ON A.RNMCNO = TEL_2.RNMCNO AND TEL_2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '2' LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC04B MOB -- 휴대폰번호 ON A.RNMCNO = MOB.RNMCNO AND MOB.CNTC_TYP_CD = '3'
LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC05B ADDR_1 -- 개인 : 자택주소, 법인 : 본점주소 ON A.RNMCNO = ADDR_1.RNMCNO AND ADDR_1.ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC05B ADDR_2 -- 법인 : 직장주소, 법인 : 사업장주소 ON A.RNMCNO = ADDR_2.RNMCNO AND ADDR_2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '2'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_IRA_CUST_MGR MGR ON A.RNMCNO = MGR.CLNT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT MD ON MGR.DTLS_MNBR_ENTY_ID = MD.ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWA_USER MU ON MGR.MAIN_MNGR_EMPY_NO = MU.USER_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT FIRST_ACNT.ACNT_OWNR_ID , FIRST_ACNT.ACNT_ID , FIRST_ACNT.FIRST_OPNG_DATE AS FIRST_OPNG_DATE , M3.DTBR_NAME AS FIRST_DTBR_NAME FROM ( SELECT ACNT_OWNR_ID , ACNT_ID , FIRST_OPNG_DATE FROM ( SELECT M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID , M1.ACNT_ID , M1.OPNG_DATE FIRST_OPNG_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID ORDER BY M1.OPNG_DATE ASC, M1.ACNT_ID ASC) AS RNK FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT M1
WHERE M1.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC','FOAC','FPAC','SVAC')
AND M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO = #{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO = #{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
) WHERE RNK = 1 ) FIRST_ACNT , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT M3 , SID.IDO_A_UUN_OPNG_DTLS M4 , SID.IDO_A_UUD_ORGZ_BSC C WHERE M4.ACNT_ID = FIRST_ACNT.ACNT_ID AND M4.OPNG_BRNH_CODE = C.NEW_ORGZ_CODE /* 개설점 */ AND C.ENTY_ID = M3.ENTY_ID ) F_ACNT ON A.RNMCNO = F_ACNT.ACNT_OWNR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT LAST_ACNT.ACNT_OWNR_ID , LAST_ACNT.ACNT_ID , LAST_ACNT.LAST_OPNG_DATE AS LAST_OPNG_DATE , M3.DTBR_NAME AS LAST_DTBR_NAME FROM ( SELECT ACNT_OWNR_ID , ACNT_ID , LAST_OPNG_DATE FROM ( SELECT M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID , M1.ACNT_ID , M1.OPNG_DATE LAST_OPNG_DATE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID ORDER BY M1.OPNG_DATE DESC, M1.ACNT_ID DESC) AS RNK FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT M1
WHERE M1.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC','FOAC','FPAC','SVAC')
AND M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO = #{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND M1.ACNT_OWNR_ID = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO = #{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
) WHERE RNK = 1 ) LAST_ACNT , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT M3 , SID.IDO_A_UUN_OPNG_DTLS M4 , SID.IDO_A_UUD_ORGZ_BSC C WHERE M4.ACNT_ID = LAST_ACNT.ACNT_ID AND M4.OPNG_BRNH_CODE = C.NEW_ORGZ_CODE /* 개설점 */ AND C.ENTY_ID = M3.ENTY_ID ) L_ACNT ON A.RNMCNO = L_ACNT.ACNT_OWNR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY I ON I.CNTY_CODE = A.NTN_CD -- 소속국가 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME J ON I.CNTY_ID = J.CNTY_ID AND J.LANG_CODE = 'KO' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY K ON K.CNTY_CODE = A.RSDNC_PLC_NTN_CD -- 거주국가 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME L ON K.CNTY_ID = L.CNTY_ID AND L.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.RNMCNO NOT IN ( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT DL_P_RNMCNO , MAX(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) AS LAST_SSPS_DT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND DL_P_RNMCNO IN ( SELECT ENTY_ID FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND A.VLD_YN = 'Y' ) GROUP BY DL_P_RNMCNO ) T WHERE T.LAST_SSPS_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-90, 'YYYYMMDD') )
AND A.CS_NO = #{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO = #{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND A.INDV_CORP_CCD = #{INDV_CORP_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.CS_CDD_REG_DT, '') AS CS_CDD_REG_DT -- CDD수행일자 , A.RSK_GRD_CD -- 위험등급 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', A.CS_REQ_DT, '') AS CS_REQ_DT -- 재수행예정일자 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, ''))) > 0 THEN '[' || B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE || '] ' || TRIM(D.CHNL_SECT_NAME) ELSE '' END AS CDD_CHNL_NAME -- CDD수행채널 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) CTR_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= '20190201' --AND CTR_FWRD_TP_CODE = '1' -- 전송성공건 AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR'
AND DL_P_RNMCNO= (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND DL_P_RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
), 0) AS CTR_TOTAL -- CTR보고횟수 , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) CTR_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYYMMDD') --AND CTR_FWRD_TP_CODE = '1' -- 전송성공건 AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR'
AND DL_P_RNMCNO= (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND DL_P_RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
), 0) AS CTR_YEAR -- 최근CTR보고횟수 , NVL((SELECT SUM(STR_CNT) AS STR_CNT /*--------------------202411 관련인 건수 합산-------------------------------*/ FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) STR_CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= '20190201' AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' -- 파일생성건 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC')
AND DL_P_RNMCNO= (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1)
AND DL_P_RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SSQ.NIC102B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= '20190201' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC')
AND AFPR_RNMCNO= (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1)
AND AFPR_RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
) ), 0) AS STR_TOTAL , NVL((SELECT SUM(STR_CNT) AS STR_CNT /*--------------------202411 관련인 건수 합산-------------------------------*/ FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) STR_CNT -- STR보고횟수 FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' -- 파일생성건 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC')
AND DL_P_RNMCNO= (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1)
AND DL_P_RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SSQ.NIC102B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYYMMDD') AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC')
AND AFPR_RNMCNO= (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1)
AND AFPR_RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
) ), 0) AS STR_YEAR -- 최근STR보고횟수 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) || '] ' || CASE WHEN C.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE <> '99' THEN NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06738' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE), '') ELSE '기타(' || TRIM(C.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_NAME ) || ')' END ELSE '' END AS NDVL_TRDG_PRPS -- 개인거래목적
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) || '] ' || CASE WHEN C.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE <> '99' THEN NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06740' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE), '') ELSE '기타(' || TRIM(C.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_NAME ) || ')' END ELSE '' END AS NDVL_FUNS_ORIG -- 개인자금원천및출처
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) || '] ' || CASE WHEN C.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE <> '99' THEN NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06739' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE), '') ELSE '기타(' || TRIM(C.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_NAME ) || ')' END ELSE '' END AS INSN_TRDG_PRPS -- 법인거래목적
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) || '] ' || CASE WHEN C.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE <> '99' THEN NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06741' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE), '') ELSE '기타(' || TRIM(C.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_NAME ) || ')' END ELSE '' END AS INSN_FUNS_ORIG -- 법인자금원천및출처
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06744' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT -- 개인예상거래횟수
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06743' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL -- 개인예상거래규모
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06744' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT -- 법인예상거래횟수
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06743' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL -- 법인예상거래규모
, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06745' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS INSN_SCL_SECT --법인규모구분 , NVL(C.SITE_NAME, '') AS SITE_NAME -- 직장명 , NVL(C.BUSN_ENTP_NAME, '') AS BUSN_ENTP_NAME -- 사업체명 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(I.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(I.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(J.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS SITE_NTNY -- 직장소속국가 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(K.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(K.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(L.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS BUSN_ENTP_NTNY -- 사업업체소속국가 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(C.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(C.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06746' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = C.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS INSN_LSTG_MRKT -- 법인상장정보 , NVL(TRIM(C.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_NAME), '') INSN_LSTG_MRKT_NAME -- 법인상장시장명 , NVL(H.URL_ADRS, '') URL_ADRS -- 법인홈페이지(이메일) , NVL(INSN_EMPY_CONT, 0) INSN_EMPY_CONT -- 법인종업원수 , NVL(TRIM(C.INSN_MJOR_PRDT_NAME), '') INSN_MJOR_PRDT_NAME -- 법인주요상품및서비스 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(E.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(E.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(F.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS INSN_MJOR_ACTI_CNTY -- 법인주요활동국가 , NVL(INSN_ORGZ_MBR_CONT, 0) INSN_ORGZ_MBR_CONT -- 법인조직구성원수 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL(TO_CHAR(S1.REL_OWNR_SQNO), '') AS REL_OWNR_SQNO1 -- 실제소유자1 순번 , NVL(S1.REL_OWNR_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_NAME1 -- 실제소유자1 성명 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(M1.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(M1.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(N1.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_NTNY1 -- 실제소유자1 소속국적 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL(S1.REL_OWNR_BRDT, ''), '') AS REL_OWNR_BRDT1 -- 실제소유자1 생년월일 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S1.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE)) = 1 THEN '[' || TRIM(S1.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06085' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S1.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE1 -- 실제소유자1 확인단계 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S1.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(S1.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06759' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S1.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE1 -- 실제소유자1 확인방법 , NVL(S1.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_NAME1 -- 실제소유자1 확인방법(기타) , NVL(TO_CHAR(S1.REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH), '') AS REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH1 -- 실제소유자1 지분율 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL(TO_CHAR(S2.REL_OWNR_SQNO), '') AS REL_OWNR_SQNO2 -- 실제소유자2 순번 , NVL(S2.REL_OWNR_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_NAME2 -- 실제소유자2 성명 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(M2.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(M2.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(N2.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_NTNY2 -- 실제소유자2 소속국적 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL(S2.REL_OWNR_BRDT, ''), '') AS REL_OWNR_BRDT2 -- 실제소유자2 생년월일 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S2.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE)) = 1 THEN '[' || TRIM(S2.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06085' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S2.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE2 -- 실제소유자2 확인단계 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S2.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(S2.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06759' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S2.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE2 -- 실제소유자2 확인방법 , NVL(S2.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_NAME2 -- 실제소유자2 확인방법(기타) , NVL(TO_CHAR(S2.REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH), '') AS REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH2 -- 실제소유자2 지분율 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL(TO_CHAR(S3.REL_OWNR_SQNO), '') AS REL_OWNR_SQNO3 -- 실제소유자3 순번 , NVL(S3.REL_OWNR_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_NAME3 -- 실제소유자3 성명 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(M3.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(M3.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(N3.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_NTNY3 -- 실제소유자3 소속국적 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL(S3.REL_OWNR_BRDT, ''), '') AS REL_OWNR_BRDT3 -- 실제소유자3 생년월일 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S3.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE)) = 1 THEN '[' || TRIM(S3.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06085' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S3.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE3 -- 실제소유자3 확인단계 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S3.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(S3.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06759' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S3.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE3 -- 실제소유자3 확인방법 , NVL(S3.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_NAME3 -- 실제소유자3 확인방법(기타) , NVL(TO_CHAR(S3.REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH), '') AS REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH3 -- 실제소유자3 지분율 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL(TO_CHAR(S4.REL_OWNR_SQNO), '') AS REL_OWNR_SQNO4 -- 실제소유자4 순번 , NVL(S4.REL_OWNR_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_NAME4 -- 실제소유자4 성명 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(M4.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(M4.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(N4.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_NTNY4 -- 실제소유자4 소속국적 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL(S4.REL_OWNR_BRDT, ''), '') AS REL_OWNR_BRDT4 -- 실제소유자4 생년월일 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S4.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE)) = 1 THEN '[' || TRIM(S4.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06085' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S4.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE4 -- 실제소유자4 확인단계 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S4.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(S4.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06759' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S4.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE4 -- 실제소유자4 확인방법 , NVL(S4.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_NAME4 -- 실제소유자4 확인방법(기타) , NVL(TO_CHAR(S4.REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH), '') AS REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH4 -- 실제소유자4 지분율 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- , NVL(TO_CHAR(S5.REL_OWNR_SQNO), '') AS REL_OWNR_SQNO5 -- 실제소유자5 순번 , NVL(S5.REL_OWNR_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_NAME5 -- 실제소유자5 성명 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(NVL(M5.CNTY_NO_CODE, ''))) = 3 THEN '[' || TRIM(NVL(M5.CNTY_NO_CODE, '')) || '] ' || TRIM(NVL(N5.CNTY_NAME, '')) ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_NTNY5 -- 실제소유자5 소속국적 , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT', NVL(S5.REL_OWNR_BRDT, ''), '') AS REL_OWNR_BRDT5 -- 실제소유자5 생년월일 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S5.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE)) = 1 THEN '[' || TRIM(S5.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06085' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S5.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE5 -- 실제소유자5 확인단계 , CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(S5.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE)) = 2 THEN '[' || TRIM(S5.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || '] ' || NVL((SELECT T.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06759' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.CMN_CDVL = S5.REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE), '') ELSE '' END AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_CODE5 -- 실제소유자5 확인방법 , NVL(S5.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_NAME, '') AS REL_OWNR_CNFM_TKN_NAME5 -- 실제소유자5 확인방법(기타) , NVL(TO_CHAR(S5.REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH), '') AS REL_PSSN_PRS_POSH5 -- 실제소유자5 지분율 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FROM SSQ.NIC35B A INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B ON A.RNMCNO = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD C ON A.RNMCNO = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_CHANNEL_CD D ON B.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE = D.CHNL_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY E ON E.CNTY_ID = C.INSN_MJOR_ACTI_CNTY_ID -- 법인주요활동국가ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME F ON E.CNTY_ID = F.CNTY_ID AND F.LANG_CODE = 'KO' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF G ON B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = G.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = G.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND G.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '23' -- 법인EDD-공통 AND G.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'URL' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_URL H ON H.CNTT_ADDR_ID = G.CNTT_ADDR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY I ON I.CNTY_ID = C.SITE_NTNY_ID -- 직장소속국가ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME J ON I.CNTY_ID = J.CNTY_ID AND J.LANG_CODE = 'KO' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY K ON K.CNTY_ID = C.BUSN_ENTP_NTNY_ID -- 사업업체소속국가ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME L ON K.CNTY_ID = L.CNTY_ID AND L.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN S1 ON S1.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND S1.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND S1.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY M1 ON S1.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = M1.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME N1 ON M1.CNTY_ID = N1.CNTY_ID AND N1.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN S2 ON S2.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND S2.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND S2.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 2 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY M2 ON S2.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = M2.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME N2 ON M2.CNTY_ID = N2.CNTY_ID AND N2.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN S3 ON S3.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND S3.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND S3.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 3 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY M3 ON S3.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = M3.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME N3 ON M3.CNTY_ID = N3.CNTY_ID AND N3.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN S4 ON S4.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND S4.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND S4.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 4 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY M4 ON S4.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = M4.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME N4 ON M4.CNTY_ID = N4.CNTY_ID AND N4.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN S5 ON S5.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND S5.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND S5.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 5 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY M5 ON S5.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = M5.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME N5 ON M5.CNTY_ID = N5.CNTY_ID AND N5.LANG_CODE = 'KO' WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{CS_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND A.RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO=#{AML_CUST_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CS_ST_CD = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1)
AND A.RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE INDV_CORP_CCD=#{INDV_CORP_CCD} AND RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

WITH REPORT AS ( SELECT B.CD_NM AS CATEGORY, A.ACTIVE_CNT, A.INACTIVE_CNT, A.T_CNT, A.SEQ FROM NIC19B_STAT_REPORT A , NIC92B B WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset2' AND A.SEQ BETWEEN 1 AND 10 AND B.CD = 'A003' AND A.CATEGORY = B.CNTNT ) SELECT CATEGORY , TO_CHAR(ACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS ACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(INACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS INACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(T_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS TOTAL_CNT , SEQ FROM ( SELECT CATEGORY, ACTIVE_CNT, INACTIVE_CNT, T_CNT , SEQ FROM REPORT UNION SELECT 'Total' AS CATEGORY, SUM(ACTIVE_CNT)AS ACTIVE_CNT, SUM(INACTIVE_CNT) AS INACTIVE_CNT, SUM(T_CNT) AS T_CNT, 11 AS SEQ FROM REPORT ) ORDER BY SEQ

WITH REPORT AS ( SELECT B.CD_NM AS CATEGORY, A.ACTIVE_CNT, A.INACTIVE_CNT, A.TOTAL_CNT, A.SQ FROM NIC19B_REPORT A , NIC92B B WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset1' --AND A.SEQ BETWEEN 1 AND 10 AND B.CD = 'A003' AND A.CATEGORY = B.CNTNT ) SELECT CATEGORY , TO_CHAR(ACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS ACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(INACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS INACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(TOTAL_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS TOTAL_CNT , SQ FROM ( SELECT CATEGORY, ACTIVE_CNT, INACTIVE_CNT, TOTAL_CNT , SQ FROM REPORT UNION SELECT 'Total' AS CATEGORY, SUM(ACTIVE_CNT)AS ACTIVE_CNT, SUM(INACTIVE_CNT) AS INACTIVE_CNT, SUM(TOTAL_CNT) AS TOTAL_CNT, 11 AS SEQ FROM REPORT ) ORDER BY SQ

SELECT CATEGORY , TO_CHAR(ACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS ACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(INACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS INACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(T_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS TOTAL_CNT , SEQ FROM ( SELECT B.CD_NM AS CATEGORY, A.ACTIVE_CNT, A.INACTIVE_CNT, A.T_CNT , A.SEQ FROM NIC19B_STAT_REPORT A , NIC92B B WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset2' AND A.SEQ BETWEEN 20 AND 30 AND B.CD = 'A003' AND A.CATEGORY = B.CNTNT UNION ALL SELECT 'Total' AS CATEGORY, SUM(A.ACTIVE_CNT)AS ACTIVE_CNT, SUM(A.INACTIVE_CNT) AS INACTIVE_CNT, SUM(A.T_CNT) AS T_CNT, 11 AS SEQ FROM NIC19B_STAT_REPORT A , NIC92B B WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset2' AND A.SEQ BETWEEN 20 AND 30 AND B.CD = 'A003' AND A.CATEGORY = B.CNTNT ) ORDER BY SEQ DESC

SELECT CATEGORY , TO_CHAR(ACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS ACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(INACTIVE_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS INACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(TOTAL_CNT, '999,999,999,999,999') AS TOTAL_CNT , SQ FROM ( SELECT B.CD_NM AS CATEGORY, A.ACTIVE_CNT, A.INACTIVE_CNT, A.TOTAL_CNT , A.SQ FROM NIC19B_REPORT A , NIC92B B WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset1' --AND A.SEQ BETWEEN 20 AND 30 AND B.CD = 'A003' AND A.CATEGORY = B.CNTNT UNION ALL SELECT 'Total' AS CATEGORY, SUM(A.ACTIVE_CNT)AS ACTIVE_CNT, SUM(A.INACTIVE_CNT) AS INACTIVE_CNT, SUM(A.TOTAL_CNT) AS TOTAL_CNT, 11 AS SQ FROM NIC19B_REPORT A , NIC92B B WHERE A.TYPE = 'Dataset1' --AND A.SEQ BETWEEN 20 AND 30 AND B.CD = 'A003' AND A.CATEGORY = B.CNTNT ) ORDER BY SQ ASC

SELECT WLF_BAS_SEQ , WLF_TYPE , FILE_NAME , ACTION_TYPE , DECODE(STATUS, 1, '성공', '실패') STATUS , STATUS , UPLOAD_CNT , ADD_CNT , CHG_CNT , DEL_CNT , ACTIVE_CNT , INACTIVE_CNT , TO_CHAR(HNDL_DY_TM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') HNDL_DY_TM , FAC_REG_DT FROM WAL_BATCH_LOG WHERE WLF_TYPE = #{WLF_TYPE} AND TO_CHAR(HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_SD} AND #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_ED} ORDER BY HNDL_DY_TM DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(REG_LOG_DT,0,8) AS REG_LOG_DT , SUM(HNDL_P_ENO) AS CNT FROM NIC19B_LOG WHERE SUBSTR(REG_LOG_DT,0,8) BETWEEN #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_SD} AND #{RSK_GRD_RGST_DT_ED} GROUP BY SUBSTR(REG_LOG_DT,0,8) ORDER BY SUBSTR(REG_LOG_DT,0,8) DESC

SELECT MNG_SNO , WLF_BAS_SEQ , WC_LIST_CCD , DECODE(INDV_CORP_CCD, 1, '개인', '법인') INDV_CORP_CCD , CS_NM , NTN_CD , NTN_NM , ADDR , WL_BIRTHDAY , HNDL_DY_TM , DECODE(ACTION_TYPE, 'add', '추가', DECODE(ACTION_TYPE, 'chg' , '수정', '삭제')) ACTION_TYPE , DECODE(ACTIVE, 'Y', '활성', '비활성') ACTIVE FROM WAL_BAS_HISTORY WHERE WLF_BAS_SEQ = #{WLF_BAS_SEQ} ORDER BY INDV_CORP_CCD, MNG_SNO

SELECT SUBSTR(REG_LOG_DT,0,8) AS REG_LOG_DT ,WC_LIST_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A003',WC_LIST_CCD) AS WC_LIST_NAME , HNDL_P_ENO AS CNT FROM NIC19B_LOG WHERE SUBSTR(REG_LOG_DT,0,8) = #{WLF_BAS_SEQ} ORDER BY SUBSTR(REG_LOG_DT,0,8),WC_LIST_CCD

SELECT T.ITEM_NM , T.CNTNT FROM ( SELECT JOB_NM AS ITEM_NM , '수행시간 : ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || ' ~ ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '1' THEN '(완료)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '2' THEN '(진행중)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '9' THEN '(오류)' END AS CNTNT , '01' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC93B WHERE JOB_ID = 'B10000' AND TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
UNION ALL
SELECT JOB_NM AS ITEM_NM , '수행시간 : ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || ' ~ ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '1' THEN '(완료)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '2' THEN '(진행중)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '9' THEN '(오류)' END AS CNTNT , '02' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC93B WHERE JOB_ID = 'B70001' AND TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
UNION ALL
SELECT JOB_NM AS ITEM_NM , '수행시간 : ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || ' ~ ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '1' THEN '(완료)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '2' THEN '(진행중)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '9' THEN '(오류)' END AS CNTNT , '03' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC93B WHERE JOB_ID = 'B70002' AND TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
UNION ALL
SELECT JOB_NM AS ITEM_NM , '수행시간 : ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || ' ~ ' || CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '1' THEN '(완료)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '2' THEN '(진행중)' WHEN JOB_ST_CD = '9' THEN '(오류)' END AS CNTNT , '04' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC93B WHERE JOB_ID = 'CDD000' AND TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT '신규 채널코드 존재' AS ITEM_NM , '채널코드 : ' || CD_VL9 || ', 채널명 : ' || TRIM(CD_VL_NM) AS CNTNT , '11' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD = 'M044' AND USE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CD_VL9 ) Z
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT '신규 거래코드 존재' AS ITEM_NM , '거래코드 : ' || N.TRDG_CODE || ', 거래명 : ' || TRIM(N.TRDG_NAME) || ' > ' || TRIM(N.DTLS_TRDG_NAME) || ', 업무 : ' || TRIM(T.BSWR_NAME) AS CNTNT , '12' AS ORDERBY
, t.* FROM SSQ.NIC81B_1 N , SID.IDO_A_UWB_TRD_CD T WHERE 1 = 1 AND N.TRDG_CODE = T.TRDG_CODE AND N.USE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY N.TRDG_CODE ) Z
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT '신규 상품코드 존재' AS ITEM_NM , '표준상품분류코드 : ' || GDS_NO || ', 표준상품분류코드명 : ' || TRIM(GDS_NM) AS CNTNT , '13' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC45B WHERE USE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY GDS_NO ) Z
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT '신규 지점코드 존재' AS ITEM_NM , '지점코드 : ' || DPRT_CD || ', 지점명 : ' || TRIM(DPRT_NM) || ', KoFIU지점코드 : ' || KFTC_BRHN_CODE AS CNTNT , '14' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC41B WHERE KOFIU_RGSN_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DPRT_CD ) Z
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT '신규 은행코드 존재' AS ITEM_NM , '은행코드 : ' || A.BANK_CODE || ', 은행명 : ' || TRIM(A.BANK_NAME) AS CNTNT , '15' AS ORDERBY FROM SID.IDO_A_UUS_BANK A LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.NIC95B B ON B.CD = 'L188' AND TRIM(B.CD_VL9) = TRIM(A.BANK_CODE) WHERE 1 = 1 AND NVL(B.CD_VL9, 'X') = 'X' ORDER BY A.BANK_CODE ) Z
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT 'CTR 추출건수 차이 [건수]' AS ITEM_NM , '거래일자 : ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TAGT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ', TMS : ' || CNT_TMS || '건, #10064 : ' || CNT_10064 || '건' AS CNTNT , '21' AS ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.TAGT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS TAGT_DATE , NVL(B.CNT_TMS , 0) AS CNT_TMS , NVL(C.CNT_10064, 0) AS CNT_10064 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS TAGT_DATE , COUNT(*) AS CNT_TMS FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 14, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) B ON A.TAGT_DATE = B.TAGT_DATE LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT RPRG_DATE AS TAGT_DATE , COUNT(*) AS CNT_10064 FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_CTR_DTDL_DAY WHERE 1 = 1 AND RPRG_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 15, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY RPRG_DATE ) C ON A.TAGT_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.TAGT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.ENTY_ID = 1 AND A.TAGT_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 14, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY A.TAGT_DATE ) X WHERE 1 = 1 AND X.CNT_TMS - X.CNT_10064 <> 0 ORDER BY X.TAGT_DATE ) Z
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM (
SELECT 'CTR 추출건수 차이 [상세]' AS ITEM_NM , '거래일자 : ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(Y.TAGT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ', 구분 : ' || Y.EX || ', 건수 : ' || Y.CNT || '건, ' || Y.RNMCNO || '(' || Y.CS_NM || ')' AS CNTNT , '22' AS ORDERBY FROM ( WITH TEMP_CAL AS ( SELECT TAGT_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TAGT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') TAGT_DATE_TMS FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.TAGT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS TAGT_DATE , NVL(B.CNT_TMS , 0) AS CNT_TMS , NVL(C.CNT_10064, 0) AS CNT_10064 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS TAGT_DATE , COUNT(*) AS CNT_TMS FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 14, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ) B ON A.TAGT_DATE = B.TAGT_DATE LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT RPRG_DATE AS TAGT_DATE , COUNT(*) AS CNT_10064 FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_CTR_DTDL_DAY WHERE 1 = 1 AND RPRG_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 15, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY RPRG_DATE ) C ON A.TAGT_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.TAGT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.ENTY_ID = 1 AND A.TAGT_DATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 14, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY A.TAGT_DATE ) X WHERE 1 = 1 AND X.CNT_TMS - X.CNT_10064 <> 0 AND X.CNT_TMS > 0 AND X.CNT_10064 > 0
)
SELECT T.EX , T.TAGT_DATE , T.RNMCNO , T.CNT , NVL((SELECT TRIM(CS_NM) FROM SSQ.NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = T.RNMCNO), '') AS CS_NM FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) PARALLEL(A 4) PARALLEL(B 4) */ 'TMS(O) / #10064(X)' AS EX , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS TAGT_DATE , A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC01B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IN (SELECT TAGT_DATE_TMS FROM TEMP_CAL) GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.DL_P_RNMCNO
MINUS
SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) PARALLEL(A 4) PARALLEL(B 4) */ 'TMS(O) / #10064(X)' AS EX , A.RPRG_DATE AS TAGT_DATE , B.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_CTR_DTDL_DAY A , SSQ.NIC01B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND RTRIM(A.TRDR_RNNO_CRYP) = B.CS_NO AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN T WHERE T.ENTY_ID = B.RNMCNO AND T.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND T.VLD_YN = 'Y' ) AND A.RPRG_DATE IN (SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM TEMP_CAL) GROUP BY A.RPRG_DATE, B.RNMCNO
UNION ALL
SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) PARALLEL(A 4) PARALLEL(B 4) */ 'TMS(X) / #10064(O)' AS EX , A.RPRG_DATE AS TAGT_DATE , B.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MBA_CTR_DTDL_DAY A , SSQ.NIC01B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND RTRIM(A.TRDR_RNNO_CRYP) = B.CS_NO AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_BYBS_CLNT_CLSN T WHERE T.ENTY_ID = B.RNMCNO AND T.BYBS_CLNT_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'CL' AND T.VLD_YN = 'Y' ) AND A.RPRG_DATE IN (SELECT TAGT_DATE FROM TEMP_CAL) GROUP BY A.RPRG_DATE, B.RNMCNO
MINUS
SELECT /*+ FULL(A) FULL(B) PARALLEL(A 4) PARALLEL(B 4) */ 'TMS(X) / #10064(O)' AS EX , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS TAGT_DATE , A.DL_P_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , SSQ.NIC01B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IN (SELECT TAGT_DATE_TMS FROM TEMP_CAL) GROUP BY A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.DL_P_RNMCNO ) T ORDER BY T.TAGT_DATE, T.EX, T.RNMCNO ) Y ) Z
/* UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT 'STR 혐의거래자/거래내역 매핑오류' AS ITEM_NM , '추출일자 : ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ', 시나리오 : ' || SSPS_TYP_CD || ', 고객ID : ' || DL_P_RNMCNO AS CNTNT , '31' AS ORDERBY FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT >= '20210101' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR' AND INST_ID IS NULL AND DL_P_RNMCNO NOT IN ('2002502211', '1003599108', '2002529377', '1003313578', '2002578536', '1006102069', '2000368694') ORDER BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_TYP_CD, DL_P_RNMCNO ) Z */
UNION ALL
SELECT Z.ITEM_NM , Z.CNTNT , Z.ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT 'CDD모니터링' AS ITEM_NM , '수행일자 : ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T.MNTN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ', ' || T.CNT || '건' AS CNTNT , '41' AS ORDERBY FROM ( SELECT MNTN_DATE , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD WHERE MNTN_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 7, 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY MNTN_DATE ) T ORDER BY T.MNTN_DATE DESC ) Z
) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.ORDERBY, T.CNTNT

SELECT DECODE(ACTIVE_STATUS,'Y','Active','Inactive') AS ACTION ,NM_TYPE AS TYPE ,DECODE(INDV_CORP_CCD,2,ENTITY_NM,FIRST_NM ||' '|| MIDDLE_NM ||' '|| SUR_NM) AS CS_NM , FIRST_NM AS CS_NM_FIRST , MIDDLE_NM AS CS_NM_MIDDLE , SUR_NM AS CS_NM_LAST , FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT FROM WAL_NM WHERE DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT A.DJ_UID , A.PLACE_OF_BIRTH AS BIRTHPLACE , B.ADDR_LINE , B.ADDR_CITY AS RESIDENCE , B.ADDR_COUNTRY AS NATIONALITY , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WAL_DT WHERE DATE_DAY IS NOT NULL AND DATE_MONTH IS NOT NULL AND DJ_UID = #{WC_UID}) != 0 THEN C.DATE_DAY||'-'||C.DATE_MONTH||'-'||C.DATE_YEAR WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WAL_DT WHERE DATE_DAY IS NULL AND DATE_MONTH IS NOT NULL AND DJ_UID = #{WC_UID}) != 0 THEN C.DATE_MONTH||'-'||C.DATE_YEAR ELSE C.DATE_YEAR END AS BIRTHDATE , D.PLACE_NM , PROFILE AS FURTHER_INFORMATION1 FROM WAL_BAS A LEFT JOIN WAL_ADDR B ON (A.DJ_UID = B.DJ_UID) LEFT JOIN WAL_DT C ON (A.DJ_UID = C.DJ_UID) LEFT JOIN WAL_POB D ON (A.DJ_UID = D.DJ_UID) WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND C.DATE_TYPE = 'Date of Birth'
SELECT DECODE(M.ACTIVE_STATUS,'Y','Active','Inactive') AS ACTION , M.ROLE_TYPE AS TYPE , M.OCC_TITLE AS JOB_NM , M.FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT FROM WAL_ROLE M WHERE 1=1 AND M.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT ASSOCIATE_ID AS FAM_UID ,(SELECT CNTNT_NM FROM WAL_CD_BODY A WHERE A.CNTNT = M.ASSOCIATE_CD AND CD ='W003') AS TYPE , FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT , CS_NM AS FAM_NM FROM WAL_RELATION M, (SELECT MAX(SQ) AS SQ, MAX(CS_NM) AS CS_NM,MNG_SNO FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA GROUP BY MNG_SNO ) A WHERE M.ASSOCIATE_ID = A.MNG_SNO(+) AND DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY SEQ
SELECT DISTINCT B.CD_NM AS CATEGORY ,'WPEP01' AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.MNG_SNO AS WC_UID FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA A , NIC92B B WHERE A.MNG_SNO = #{WC_UID} AND B.CD = 'A003' AND A.WC_LIST_CCD = B.CNTNT

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY DATE_TYPE, SEQ) AS FIELD_SEQ , DATE_TYPE AS FIELD_DESC , EU_DATE_FORM AS FIELD_VALUE FROM WAL_DT WHERE DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND DATE_TYPE NOT IN ('Date of Birth') ORDER BY DATE_TYPE, SEQ

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NTN_TYPE, SEQ) AS FIELD_SEQ , NTN_TYPE AS FIELD_DESC , NTN_CODE AS FIELD_VALUE FROM WAL_NATION WHERE DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND NTN_TYPE NOT IN ('Citizenship', 'Resident of', 'BirthPlace') ORDER BY NTN_TYPE, SEQ

SELECT A.DTL_C AS RA_ITEM_CD, A.DTL_C_NM || ' 위험요소' AS ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD_NM_ING = 'S' THEN '결재중' ELSE '' END AS SN_CCD_NM , B.SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM SRBA_DTL_C A , ( SELECT RISK_CATG1_C, SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM ( SELECT B.RISK_CATG1_C , B.RISK_ELMT_C , A.APP_NO , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'S' OR A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'S' ELSE '' END AS SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM AML_APPR A , RA_RISK_FACTOR_REQ B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA1' AND A.SN_CCD NOT IN ('E') ) GROUP BY RISK_CATG1_C, SN_CCD_NM_ING ) B WHERE A.DTL_C = B.RISK_CATG1_C(+) AND GRP_C = 'S001' AND DTL_C != 'R3' ORDER BY A.DTL_C
SELECT DTL_C AS CODE, DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R342' AND HGRK_DTL_C != 'R3' ORDER BY HGRK_DTL_C

SELECT A.RISK_CATG1_C -- 위험요소대분류 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RISK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001') AS RISK_CATG1_C_NM , A.RISK_CATG2_C -- 위험요소중분류 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RISK_CATG2_C AND GRP_C = 'S002') AS RISK_CATG2_C_NM , A.RISK_ELMT_C -- 위험요소소분류 , A.RISK_ELMT_NM -- 위험요소명 , A.RISK_VAL_ITEM -- 평가항목 , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RISK_VAL_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RISK_VAL_ITEM_NM , A.RISK_INDI -- 개인여부 , A.RISK_CORP -- 법인여부 , A.RISK_SCR -- 위험점수 , A.RISK_HRSK_YN -- 당연EDD여부 , A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_I -- I모델적용여부 , A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_B -- B모델적용여부 , A.RISK_RSN_DESC -- 위험사유 , A.RISK_RMRK -- 비고(메모) , A.RISK_SN_CCD AS RA_SN_CCD -- 결재상태 , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.RISK_SN_CCD) AS RA_SN_CCD_NM , A.APP_NO AS RA_APP_NO -- 결재번호 , A.APP_DT AS RA_APP_DT -- 결재일자 , A.LST_APP_NO AS RA_LST_APP_NO -- 최종결재번호 , A.LST_APP_DT AS RA_LST_APP_DT -- 최종결재일자 , A.RISK_APPL_YN -- 적용여부 , A.RA_REF_SN_CCD -- 반려여부 , A.FACT_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , B.APP_NO -- 결재번호 , B.SN_CCD -- 결재상태코드 , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM -- 결재상태코드명 , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , B.APP_DT , B.SNO , B.PRV_APP_NO , B.RSN_CNTNT , B.APPR_ROLE_ID , B.TARGET_ROLE_ID , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = #{RANKID}) AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND RISK_CATG1_C = #{RISK_CATG1_C} AND RISK_ELMT_C = #{RISK_ELMT_C}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RA_RISK_FACTOR_APPR T USING ( SELECT RISK_ELMT_C , RISK_CATG1_C , RISK_CATG2_C , RISK_ELMT_NM , RISK_SCR , RISK_INDI , RISK_CORP , RISK_VAL_ITEM , RISK_APPL_YN , RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , RISK_HRSK_YN FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR_REQ WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = #{RISK_ELMT_C} )A ON ( T.FACT_SEQ = #{FACT_SEQ} AND T.RISK_ELMT_C = #{RISK_ELMT_C} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RISK_RSN_DESC = #{RISK_RSN_DESC} , T.RISK_RMRK = #{RISK_RMRK} , T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'SS' , T.RISK_SN_CCD = 'E' , T.RISK_REG_DT = SYSDATE , T.RISK_REG_ID = #{RISK_UPD_ID} , T.RISK_UPD_DT = SYSDATE , T.RISK_UPD_ID = #{RISK_UPD_ID} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.FACT_SEQ , T.RISK_ELMT_C , T.RISK_CATG1_C , T.RISK_CATG2_C , T.RISK_ELMT_NM , T.RISK_SCR , T.RISK_INDI , T.RISK_CORP , T.RISK_VAL_ITEM , T.RISK_APPL_YN , T.RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , T.RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , T.RISK_HRSK_YN , T.RISK_RSN_DESC , T.RISK_RMRK , T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , T.RISK_SN_CCD , T.RISK_REG_DT , T.RISK_REG_ID , T.RISK_UPD_DT , T.RISK_UPD_ID ) VALUES ( #{FACT_SEQ} , A.RISK_ELMT_C , A.RISK_CATG1_C , A.RISK_CATG2_C , A.RISK_ELMT_NM , A.RISK_SCR , A.RISK_INDI , A.RISK_CORP , A.RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RISK_APPL_YN , A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , A.RISK_HRSK_YN , #{RISK_RSN_DESC} , #{RISK_RMRK} , 'SS' , 'E' , SYSDATE , #{RISK_UPD_ID} , SYSDATE , #{RISK_UPD_ID} )
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO RA_RISK_FACTOR T USING ( SELECT RISK_CATG1_C , RISK_CATG2_C , RISK_ELMT_C , RISK_ELMT_NM , RISK_INDI , RISK_CORP , RISK_VAL_ITEM , RISK_APPL_YN , RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , RISK_HRSK_YN , RISK_SCR , RISK_RSN_DESC , RISK_RMRK FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR_REQ WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = #{RISK_ELMT_C} )A ON ( T.RISK_CATG1_C = A.RISK_CATG1_C AND T.RISK_CATG2_C = A.RISK_CATG2_C AND T.RISK_ELMT_C = A.RISK_ELMT_C ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RISK_ELMT_NM = A.RISK_ELMT_NM , T.RISK_SCR = A.RISK_SCR , T.RISK_INDI = A.RISK_INDI , T.RISK_CORP = A.RISK_CORP , T.RISK_VAL_ITEM = A.RISK_VAL_ITEM , T.RISK_APPL_YN = A.RISK_APPL_YN , T.RISK_APPL_MODEL_I = A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , T.RISK_APPL_MODEL_B = A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , T.RISK_HRSK_YN = A.RISK_HRSK_YN , T.RISK_RSN_DESC = A.RISK_RSN_DESC , T.RISK_RMRK = A.RISK_RMRK , T.RISK_UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.RISK_UPD_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RISK_CATG1_C , T.RISK_CATG2_C , T.RISK_ELMT_C , T.RISK_ELMT_NM , T.RISK_SCR , T.RISK_INDI , T.RISK_CORP , T.RISK_VAL_ITEM , T.RISK_APPL_YN , T.RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , T.RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , T.RISK_HRSK_YN , T.RISK_RSN_DESC , T.RISK_RMRK , T.RISK_REG_ID , T.RISK_REG_DT , T.RISK_UPD_ID , T.RISK_UPD_DT ) VALUES ( A.RISK_CATG1_C , A.RISK_CATG2_C , A.RISK_ELMT_C , A.RISK_ELMT_NM , A.RISK_SCR , A.RISK_INDI , A.RISK_CORP , A.RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RISK_APPL_YN , A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , A.RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , A.RISK_HRSK_YN , A.RISK_RSN_DESC , A.RISK_RMRK , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE )
