mapper.select: SELECT #{APP_NO} AS APP_NO -- APP_NO ,#{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C -- GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,( AML_APPR_HIST_SEQ.NEXTVAL ) AS NUM_SQ -- NUM_SQ ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APP_DT -- APP_DT ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT -- REG_DT ,CASE WHEN #{FIRST_SNO} IS NOT NULL THEN #{FIRST_SNO} ELSE ( SELECT NVL(MAX(A.SNO), 0) + 1 ||'' FROM AML_APPR A WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) END AS SNO -- SNO END ,( SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD} = 'R' THEN 'R' WHEN B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID = 0 THEN 'E' ELSE #{SN_CCD} END FROM C_GYLJ_D B WHERE B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND B.SNO = CASE WHEN #{FIRST_SNO} IS NOT NULL THEN #{FIRST_SNO} ELSE ( SELECT NVL(MAX(C.SNO), 0) + 1 ||'' FROM AML_APPR C WHERE C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND C.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) END ) AS SN_CCD ,#{BRN_CD} AS BRN_CD -- BRN_CD ,#{APPR_ROLE_ID} AS APPR_ROLE_ID -- APPR_ROLE_ID ,( SELECT CASE WHEN #{SN_CCD } = 'R' THEN D.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE D.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_D D WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C } AND D.SNO = CASE WHEN #{FIRST_SNO} IS NOT NULL THEN #{FIRST_SNO} ELSE ( SELECT NVL(MAX(E.SNO), 0) + 1 ||'' FROM AML_APPR E WHERE E.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND E.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ) END ) AS TARGET_ROLE_ID -- TARGET_ROLE_ID ,#{RSN_CNTNT} AS RSN_CNTNT -- RSN_CNTNT ,#{PRV_APP_NO} AS PRV_APP_NO -- PRV_APP_NO ,#{HNDL_P_ENO} AS HNDL_P_ENO -- HNDL_P_ENO FROM DUAL

SELECT SEQ , RISK_REG_ID , HNDL_P_NM , CASE WHEN GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'SS' THEN RISK_UPD_DT ELSE HNDL_DY_TM END AS HNDL_DY_TM , CASE WHEN GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'SS' THEN '위험사유/비고 수정' ELSE RSN_CNTNT END AS RSN_CNTNT , SN_CCD , CASE WHEN GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'SS' THEN '결재완료' ELSE SN_CCD_NM END AS SN_CCD_NM , GYLJ_LINE_G_C FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.FACT_SEQ AS SEQ , A.RISK_REG_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.RISK_REG_ID) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.RISK_UPD_DT , CASE WHEN A.RISK_SN_CCD = 'E' THEN RISK_UPD_DT ELSE NULL END AS HNDL_DY_TM , B.RSN_CNTNT , A.RISK_SN_CCD AS SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.RISK_SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR_APPR A , ( SELECT APP_NO, RSN_CNTNT FROM ( SELECT APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY APP_NO ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC) AS RN FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE SN_CCD = 'S' AND APPR_ROLE_ID = '4' ) WHERE RN = 1 )B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND TRIM(A.RISK_SN_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND A.RISK_ELMT_C = #{RISK_ELMT_C} ORDER BY A.FACT_SEQ DESC )

SELECT RISK_ELMT_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RISK_CATG1_C AND GRP_C = 'S001') AS RISK_CATG1_C_NM , RISK_CATG1_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RISK_CATG2_C AND GRP_C = 'S002') AS RISK_CATG2_C_NM , RISK_CATG2_C , RISK_ELMT_NM , RISK_SCR , RISK_INDI , RISK_CORP , RISK_VAL_ITEM , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = RISK_VAL_ITEM AND GRP_C = 'R342' ) AS RISK_VAL_ITEM_NM , RISK_APPL_YN , RISK_APPL_MODEL_I , RISK_APPL_MODEL_B , RISK_HRSK_YN , RISK_RSN_DESC , RISK_RMRK , RISK_SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', RISK_SN_CCD) AS RA_SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR_APPR WHERE FACT_SEQ = #{FACT_SEQ}

SELECT DISTINCT A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.BRN_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'Y' ELSE ' ' END AS SN_CCD_YN , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A , C_USER B , RA_RISK_FACTOR_APPR C WHERE A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID AND A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO AND C.RISK_ELMT_C = #{RISK_ELMT_C} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.RA_ITEM_NM || '별 평가 관리' AS ITEM_NM , A.INTV_VAL_YN , B.SN_CCD_NM_ING , CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD_NM_ING = 'S' THEN '결재중' WHEN B.SN_CCD_NM_ING = 'R' THEN '반려중' ELSE '' END AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM A , ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM ( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , B.APP_NO , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'S' THEN 'S' WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'R' ELSE '' END AS SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA2' AND B.SN_CCD NOT IN 'E' UNION ALL SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , B.APP_NO , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'S' THEN 'S' WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'R' ELSE '' END AS SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA2' AND B.SN_CCD NOT IN 'E' UNION ALL SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , B.APP_NO , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'S' THEN 'S' WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'R' ELSE '' END AS SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA2' AND B.SN_CCD NOT IN 'E' UNION ALL SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , B.APP_NO , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , CASE WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'S' THEN 'S' WHEN B.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'R' ELSE '' END AS SN_CCD_NM_ING FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'RA2' AND B.SN_CCD NOT IN 'E' ) GROUP BY RA_ITEM_CD, SN_CCD_NM_ING ) B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD(+) AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SRT_SQ

SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN TRIM(ABS_HRSK_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(ABS_HRSK_YN) END AS ABS_HRSK_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN) END AS FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(FATF_GREY_LIST_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(FATF_GREY_LIST_YN) END AS FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(FINCEN_LIST_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(FINCEN_LIST_YN) END AS FINCEN_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(UN_SANTIONS_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(UN_SANTIONS_YN) END AS UN_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(OFAC_SANTIONS_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(OFAC_SANTIONS_YN) END AS OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(OECD_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(OECD_YN) END AS OECD_YN , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , CASE WHEN TRIM(INCRS_PROD_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(INCRS_PROD_YN) END AS INCRS_PROD_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(INCRS_CHEM_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(INCRS_CHEM_YN) END AS INCRS_CHEM_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(EU_SANTIONS_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(EU_SANTIONS_YN) END AS EU_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(EU_HRT_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(EU_HRT_YN) END AS EU_HRT_YN , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , NTN_SN_CCD FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND RA_ITEM_CODE = #{RA_ITEM_CODE}

SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN TRIM(ABS_HRSK_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(ABS_HRSK_YN) END AS ABS_HRSK_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN) END AS FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(FATF_GREY_LIST_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(FATF_GREY_LIST_YN) END AS FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(FINCEN_LIST_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(FINCEN_LIST_YN) END AS FINCEN_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(UN_SANTIONS_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(UN_SANTIONS_YN) END AS UN_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(OFAC_SANTIONS_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(OFAC_SANTIONS_YN) END AS OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(OECD_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(OECD_YN) END AS OECD_YN , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , CASE WHEN TRIM(INCRS_PROD_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(INCRS_PROD_YN) END AS INCRS_PROD_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(INCRS_CHEM_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(INCRS_CHEM_YN) END AS INCRS_CHEM_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(EU_SANTIONS_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(EU_SANTIONS_YN) END AS EU_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(EU_HRT_YN) IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE TRIM(EU_HRT_YN) END AS EU_HRT_YN , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND RA_ITEM_CODE = #{RA_ITEM_CODE}

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10101' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM1 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10101' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10101') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM1 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10102' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM2 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10102' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10102') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM2 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10201' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM3 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10201' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10201') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM3 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10301' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM4 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10301' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10301') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM4 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10401' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM5 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10401' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10401') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM5 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10501' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM6 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10501' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10501') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM6 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10601' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM7 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10601' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10601') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM7 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10701' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM8 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10701' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10701') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM8 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10702' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM9 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10702' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10702') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM9 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10801' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM10 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10801' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10801') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM10 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10802' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM11 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10802' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10802') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM11 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10901' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM12 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10901' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10901') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM12 FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R1' ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C
mapper.update: UPDATE RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ SET NTN_SN_CCD = 'C'
mapper.select: WITH RECAL_HRSKYN AS ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'H' WHEN FATF_GREY_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'H' WHEN FINCEN_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN UN_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN OFAC_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN OECD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN EU_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN EU_HRT_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN INCRS_PROD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN INCRS_CHEM_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ABS_HRSK_RESULT FROM ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN FATF_BLACK_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN FATF_GREY_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND FATF_GREY_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN FINCEN_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND FINCEN_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FINCEN_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN UN_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND UN_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS UN_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN OFAC_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND OFAC_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN OECD_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND OECD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OECD_YN , CASE WHEN EU_SANTIONS_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND EU_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EU_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN EU_HRT_EDD_YN = 'Y' AND EU_HRT_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EU_HRT_YN , CASE WHEN INCRS_PROD_STA = 'Y' AND INCRS_PROD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INCRS_PROD_YN , CASE WHEN INCRS_CHEM_STA = 'Y' AND INCRS_CHEM_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INCRS_CHEM_YN FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL -- WHERE TICPI_CPI_IDX NOT IN ('000','999','998') ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ) ), AVG_STDDEV AS ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , AVG(TICPI_CPI_IDX) AS AVG_TICPI_CPI_IDX , AVG(BASEL_RIK_IDX) AS AVG_BASEL_RIK_IDX , STDDEV_POP(TICPI_CPI_IDX) AS STDDEV_TICPI_CPI_IDX , STDDEV_POP(BASEL_RIK_IDX) AS STDDEV_BASEL_RIK_IDX FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL WHERE TICPI_CPI_IDX NOT IN ('000','998','999') GROUP BY RA_ITEM_CD ) SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , ABS_HRSK_RESULT , CASE WHEN ABS_HRSK_RESULT_SCORE = 10 THEN 10 ELSE NVL(TI_RESULT,0) + NVL(INCRS_PROD_SCORE,0) + NVL(INCRS_CHEM_SCORE,0) + NVL(BASEL_RESULT,0) + NVL(EU_SANTIONS_SCORE,0) + NVL(EU_HRT_SCROE,0) END AS RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL_RESULT , NVL(TI_RESULT,0) AS TI_RESULT , NVL(BASEL_RESULT,0) AS BASEL_RESULT FROM ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , ABS_HRSK_RESULT , CASE WHEN ABS_HRSK_RESULT = 'Y' OR ABS_HRSK_RESULT = 'H' THEN 10 WHEN RA_ITEM_CODE IN ('000','998','999') THEN 10 ELSE 0 END ABS_HRSK_RESULT_SCORE , CASE WHEN RA_ITEM_CODE IN ('000','998','999') THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((1 - SSQ.NORMDIST(TICPI_CPI_IDX, AVG_TICPI_CPI_IDX, STDDEV_TICPI_CPI_IDX)) * TICPI_CPI_STA, 2) END AS TI_RESULT , CASE WHEN EU_SANTIONS_EDD_YN NOT IN ('Y','N') AND EU_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(EU_SANTIONS_EDD_YN) ELSE 0 END EU_SANTIONS_SCORE , CASE WHEN EU_HRT_EDD_YN NOT IN ('Y','N') AND EU_HRT_YN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(EU_HRT_EDD_YN) ELSE 0 END EU_HRT_SCROE , CASE WHEN INCRS_PROD_STA NOT IN ('Y','N') AND INCRS_PROD_YN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(INCRS_PROD_STA) ELSE 0 END INCRS_PROD_SCORE , CASE WHEN INCRS_CHEM_STA NOT IN ('Y','N') AND INCRS_CHEM_YN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(INCRS_CHEM_STA) ELSE 0 END INCRS_CHEM_SCORE , ROUND((SSQ.NORMDIST(BASEL_RIK_IDX, AVG_BASEL_RIK_IDX, STDDEV_BASEL_RIK_IDX)) * BASEL_RIK_STA, 2) AS BASEL_RESULT FROM ( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , C.ABS_HRSK_RESULT , A.EU_SANTIONS_YN , A.EU_SANTIONS_EDD_YN , A.EU_HRT_YN , A.EU_HRT_EDD_YN , A.INCRS_PROD_YN , A.INCRS_PROD_STA , A.INCRS_CHEM_YN , A.INCRS_CHEM_STA , A.TICPI_CPI_STA , A.TICPI_CPI_IDX , B.AVG_TICPI_CPI_IDX , B.STDDEV_TICPI_CPI_IDX , A.BASEL_RIK_STA , A.BASEL_RIK_IDX , B.AVG_BASEL_RIK_IDX , B.STDDEV_BASEL_RIK_IDX FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL A , AVG_STDDEV B , RECAL_HRSKYN C WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.RA_ITEM_CODE ORDER BY A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) )

WITH AVG_STDDEV2 AS ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , AVG(RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL) AS AVG_RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , STDDEV_POP(RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL) AS STDDEV_RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL GROUP BY RA_ITEM_CD ) SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , ROUND((SSQ.NORMDIST(A.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL, B.AVG_RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL, B.STDDEV_RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL)) * 10, 2) AS RA_ITEM_SCR_RESULT FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL A , AVG_STDDEV2 B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD ORDER BY A.RA_ITEM_CODE

WITH RECAL_HRSKYN AS ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ABS_HRSK_RESULT FROM ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA1 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA2 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA3 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA4 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA5 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA6 = 'Y' AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA6 FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ) ) , RECAL_STR AS ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_STA1) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_STA1_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_STA2) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_STA2_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_STA3) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_STA3_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_STA4) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_STA4_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_STA5) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_STA5_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA6 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_IDJOB_STA6) ELSE NULL END AS RA_IDJOB_STA6_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA6 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN_RESULT FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ) SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.ABS_HRSK_RESULT , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CODE = '000' THEN 10 WHEN B.ABS_HRSK_RESULT = 'Y' THEN 10 WHEN C.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN_RESULT = 'Y' THEN (NVL(C.RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN1_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN2_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN3_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN4_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN5_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN6_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_IDJOB_EDD_YN7_RESULT,0) + NVL(RA_IDJOB_STA1_RESULT,0) + NVL(RA_IDJOB_STA2_RESULT,0) + NVL(RA_IDJOB_STA3_RESULT,0) + NVL(RA_IDJOB_STA4_RESULT,0) + NVL(RA_IDJOB_STA5_RESULT,0) + NVL(RA_IDJOB_STA6_RESULT,0)) ELSE 3.33 END AS RA_ITEM_SCR_RESULT FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL A , RECAL_HRSKYN B , RECAL_STR C WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CODE = B.RA_ITEM_CODE AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.RA_ITEM_CODE

WITH RECAL_HRSKYN AS ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ABS_HRSK_RESULT FROM ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_YN8 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA1 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA1 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA2 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA2 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA3 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA3 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA4 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA4 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA5 = 'Y' AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA5 FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ) ) , RECAL_STR AS ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CODE , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN8 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_STA1) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_STA1_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_STA2) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_STA2_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_STA3) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_STA3_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_STA4) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_STA4_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(RA_CORJOB_STA5) ELSE NULL END AS RA_CORJOB_STA5_RESULT , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_YN8 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA1 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA2 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA3 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA4 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA5 NOT IN ('Y','N') AND RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN_RESULT FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ) SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , B.ABS_HRSK_RESULT , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_CODE = 'ZZZZZ' THEN 10 WHEN B.ABS_HRSK_RESULT = 'Y' THEN 10 WHEN C.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN_RESULT = 'Y' THEN (NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN1_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN2_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN3_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN4_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN5_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN6_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN7_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_EDD_YN8_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_STA1_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_STA2_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_STA3_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_STA4_RESULT,0) + NVL(C.RA_CORJOB_STA5_RESULT,0)) ELSE 3.33 END AS RA_ITEM_SCR_RESULT FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL A , RECAL_HRSKYN B , RECAL_STR C WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CODE = B.RA_ITEM_CODE AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = C.RA_ITEM_CODE
SELECT RA_RISK_FACTOR_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS FACT_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT RA_ITEM_NTN_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS NTN_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS INJOB_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS CORJOB_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT RA_ITEM_COMMON_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS COMMON_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT RA_ITEM_WGHT_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS WGHT_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT RA_ITEM_STD_REQ.NEXTVAL AS STD_SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_APPR ( NTN_SEQ , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , FINCEN_LIST_YN , UN_SANTIONS_YN , OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , OECD_EOIR_RANK , OECD_YN , EU_SANTIONS_YN , EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , MODI_RA_ITEM_NM , MODI_ABS_HRSK_YN , MODI_RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , MODI_RA_ITEM_SCR , MODI_FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , MODI_FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , MODI_FINCEN_LIST_YN , MODI_UN_SANTIONS_YN , MODI_OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , MODI_OECD_EOIR_RANK , MODI_OECD_YN , MODI_EU_SANTIONS_YN , MODI_EU_HRT_YN , MODI_TICPI_CPI_STA , MODI_TICPI_CPI_IDX , MODI_TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , MODI_INCRS_PROD_STA , MODI_INCRS_PROD_YN , MODI_INCRS_CHEM_STA , MODI_INCRS_CHEM_YN , MODI_BASEL_RIK_STA , MODI_BASEL_RIK_IDX , MODI_BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , HNDL_REG_DT , HNDL_REG_ID , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , NTN_SN_CCD ) ( SELECT #{NTN_SEQ} , A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , A.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , A.FINCEN_LIST_YN , A.UN_SANTIONS_YN , A.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , A.OECD_EOIR_RANK , A.OECD_YN , A.EU_SANTIONS_YN , A.EU_HRT_YN , A.TICPI_CPI_STA , A.TICPI_CPI_IDX , A.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , A.INCRS_PROD_STA , A.INCRS_PROD_YN , A.INCRS_CHEM_STA , A.INCRS_CHEM_YN , A.BASEL_RIK_STA , A.BASEL_RIK_IDX , A.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , B.RA_ITEM_NM , B.ABS_HRSK_YN , B.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , B.RA_ITEM_SCR , B.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , B.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , B.FINCEN_LIST_YN , B.UN_SANTIONS_YN , B.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , B.OECD_EOIR_RANK , B.OECD_YN , B.EU_SANTIONS_YN , B.EU_HRT_YN , B.TICPI_CPI_STA , B.TICPI_CPI_IDX , B.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , B.INCRS_PROD_STA , B.INCRS_PROD_YN , B.INCRS_CHEM_STA , B.INCRS_CHEM_YN , B.BASEL_RIK_STA , B.BASEL_RIK_IDX , B.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , B.HNDL_DY_TM AS HNDL_REG_DT , B.HNDL_P_ENO AS HNDL_REG_ID , B.HNDL_DY_TM , B.HNDL_P_ENO , A.NTN_SN_CCD FROM ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , FINCEN_LIST_YN , UN_SANTIONS_YN , OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , OECD_EOIR_RANK , OECD_YN , EU_SANTIONS_YN , EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , 'N' AS NTN_SN_CCD FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ )A , ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , FINCEN_LIST_YN , UN_SANTIONS_YN , OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , OECD_EOIR_RANK , OECD_YN , EU_SANTIONS_YN , EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , SYSDATE AS HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL )B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = B.RA_ITEM_CODE )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_APPR T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , FINCEN_LIST_YN , UN_SANTIONS_YN , OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , OECD_EOIR_RANK , OECD_YN , EU_SANTIONS_YN , EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE AND T.NTN_SEQ = #{NTN_SEQ} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MODI_RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.MODI_ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.MODI_RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL = A.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , T.MODI_RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.MODI_FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN = A.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , T.MODI_FATF_GREY_LIST_YN = A.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , T.MODI_FINCEN_LIST_YN = A.FINCEN_LIST_YN , T.MODI_UN_SANTIONS_YN = A.UN_SANTIONS_YN , T.MODI_OFAC_SANTIONS_YN = A.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , T.MODI_OECD_EOIR_RANK = A.OECD_EOIR_RANK , T.MODI_OECD_YN = A.OECD_YN , T.MODI_EU_SANTIONS_YN = A.EU_SANTIONS_YN , T.MODI_EU_HRT_YN = A.EU_HRT_YN , T.MODI_TICPI_CPI_STA = A.TICPI_CPI_STA , T.MODI_TICPI_CPI_IDX = A.TICPI_CPI_IDX , T.MODI_TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR = A.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , T.MODI_INCRS_PROD_STA = A.INCRS_PROD_STA , T.MODI_INCRS_PROD_YN = A.INCRS_PROD_YN , T.MODI_INCRS_CHEM_STA = A.INCRS_CHEM_STA , T.MODI_INCRS_CHEM_YN = A.INCRS_CHEM_YN , T.MODI_BASEL_RIK_STA = A.BASEL_RIK_STA , T.MODI_BASEL_RIK_IDX = A.BASEL_RIK_IDX , T.MODI_BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR = A.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , T.NTN_SN_CCD = 'N' , T.HNDL_REG_DT = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_REG_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO}

mapper.update: MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_APPR_ONE T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE AND T.NTN_SEQ = #{NTN_SEQ} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL = A.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , T.HNDL_REG_DT = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_REG_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.NTN_SEQ , T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_CODE , MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN5 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN6 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN7 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN8 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA1 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA2 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA3 , #{CORJOB_SEQ} , A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_CORJOB_YN1 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN2 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN3 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN4 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN5 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN6 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN7 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN8 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA1 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA2 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA3 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA4 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA5 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 , B.RA_ITEM_NM , B.ABS_HRSK_YN , B.RA_ITEM_SCR , B.RA_CORJOB_YN1 , B.RA_CORJOB_YN2 , B.RA_CORJOB_YN3 , B.RA_CORJOB_YN4 , B.RA_CORJOB_YN5 , B.RA_CORJOB_YN6 , B.RA_CORJOB_YN7 , B.RA_CORJOB_YN8 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA1 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA2 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA3 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA4 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA5 , B.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 , B.HNDL_DY_TM AS HNDL_REG_DT , B.HNDL_P_ENO AS HNDL_REG_ID , B.HNDL_DY_TM , B.HNDL_P_ENO , A.CORJOB_SN_CCD FROM ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_CORJOB_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_YN5 , RA_CORJOB_YN6 , RA_CORJOB_YN7 , RA_CORJOB_YN8 , RA_CORJOB_STA1 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_STA2 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_STA3 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_STA4 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_STA5 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 , 'N' AS CORJOB_SN_CCD FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_REQ )A , ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_CORJOB_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_YN5 , RA_CORJOB_YN6 , RA_CORJOB_YN7 , RA_CORJOB_YN8 , RA_CORJOB_STA1 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_STA2 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_STA3 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_STA4 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_STA5 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 , SYSDATE AS HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL )B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = B.RA_ITEM_CODE )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_APPR T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_CORJOB_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_YN5 , RA_CORJOB_YN6 , RA_CORJOB_YN7 , RA_CORJOB_YN8 , RA_CORJOB_STA1 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_STA2 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_STA3 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_STA4 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_STA5 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE AND T.CORJOB_SEQ = #{CORJOB_SEQ} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MODI_RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.MODI_ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.MODI_RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN1 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN1 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN2 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN2 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN3 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN3 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN4 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN4 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN5 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN5 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN6 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN6 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN7 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN7 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_YN8 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN8 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA1 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA1 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA2 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA2 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA3 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA3 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA4 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA4 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA5 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA5 , T.MODI_RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 , T.CORJOB_SN_CCD = 'N' , T.HNDL_REG_DT = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_REG_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO}
mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM AS C_RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN AS C_ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR AS C_RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , RA_RMRK , RA_APP_NO , RA_APP_DT , RA_LST_APP_NO , RA_LST_APP_DT , RA_SN_CCD , RA_SN_CCD_NM , RA_REF_SN_CCD , RA_SEQ , SN_CCD , SN_CCD_NM , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , APP_DT , SNO , PRV_APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , POSITION_NAME , '이상' AS GUGAN1 , '미만' AS GUGAN2 FROM ( SELECT A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_ST_INTV_VAL , A.RA_ET_INTV_VAL , A.RA_RMRK , A.APP_NO AS RA_APP_NO , A.APP_DT AS RA_APP_DT , A.LST_APP_NO AS RA_LST_APP_NO , A.LST_APP_DT AS RA_LST_APP_DT , A.COMMON_SN_CCD AS RA_SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.COMMON_SN_CCD) AS RA_SN_CCD_NM , A.RA_REF_SN_CCD , A.COMMON_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , B.SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , B.APP_DT , B.SNO , B.PRV_APP_NO , B.RSN_CNTNT , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = #{RANKID}) AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHERE 1=1 AND RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD}

SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN ABS_HRSK_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN6 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN7 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_REQ WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND RA_ITEM_CODE = #{RA_ITEM_CODE}

SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN ABS_HRSK_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN6 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN7 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND RA_ITEM_CODE = #{RA_ITEM_CODE}

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20701' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM1 -- 법률, 회계, 세무 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20701' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20701') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM1 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20702' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM2 -- 투자자문 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20702' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20702') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM2 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM3 -- 부동산 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM3 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM4 -- 오락, 도박, 스포츠 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM4 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM5 -- 대부업자, 환전상, 소액해외송급업자 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM5 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM6 -- 귀금속, 예술품, 골동품 판매상 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM6 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM7 -- 주류 도소매업, 유흥주점업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM7 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM8 -- 의료, 제약 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM8 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM9 -- 건설 산업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM9 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM10 -- 무기, 방위산업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM10 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM11 -- 채광, 금속, 고물상 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM11 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM12 -- 가상자산사업 의심업종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM12 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21001' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM13 -- 무직자 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21001' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21001') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM13 FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R2' ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C

SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , CASE WHEN ABS_HRSK_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN6 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN7 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN8 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN8 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_REQ WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND RA_ITEM_CODE = #{RA_ITEM_CODE}

, MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM3 -- 부동산 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM3 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM4 -- 오락, 도박, 스포츠 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM4 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21402' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM5 -- 카지노 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21402' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21402') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM5 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM6 -- 대부업자, 환전상, 소액해외송급업자 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM6 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM7 -- 귀금속, 예술품, 골동품 판매상 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM7 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM8 -- 주류 도소매업, 유흥주점업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM8 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM9 -- 의료, 제약 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM9 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM10 -- 건설 산업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM10 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM11 -- 무기, 방위산업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM11 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM12 -- 채광, 금속, 고물상 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM12 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM13 -- 가상자산사업 의심업종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN '당연EDD' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM13 FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R2' ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C

SELECT CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_RISK_CATG ELSE NULL END AS RA_RISK_CATG , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY RA_SQ

SELECT RA_RISK_CATG , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , RA_RISK_CATG2 , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN RA_ITEM_B_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , CASE WHEN RA_SN_CCD IN ('N','S','R') THEN RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT , RA_APP_NO , RA_APP_DT , RA_LST_APP_NO , RA_LST_APP_DT , RA_SN_CCD , RA_SN_CCD_NM , RA_SEQ , RA_REF_SN_CCD , WGHT_LINE_G_C , SN_CCD , SN_CCD_NM , GYLJ_LINE_G_C , APP_NO , APP_DT , SNO , PRV_APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , POSITION_NAME , APPR_ROLE_ID , TARGET_ROLE_ID FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_RISK_CATG ELSE NULL END AS RA_RISK_CATG , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CS_TYP_CD, A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, A.RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY A.RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , A.RA_RISK_CATG AS RA_RISK_CATG2 , A.CS_TYP_CD , A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , A.RA_ITEM_WGHT , A.APP_NO AS RA_APP_NO , A.APP_DT AS RA_APP_DT , A.LST_APP_NO AS RA_LST_APP_NO , A.LST_APP_DT AS RA_LST_APP_DT , A.WGHT_SN_CCD AS RA_SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.WGHT_SN_CCD) AS RA_SN_CCD_NM , WGHT_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , A.RA_REF_SN_CCD , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AS WGHT_LINE_G_C , B.SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', B.SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM , B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , B.APP_NO , B.APP_DT , B.SNO , B.PRV_APP_NO , B.RSN_CNTNT , B.APPR_ROLE_ID , B.TARGET_ROLE_ID , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = '02') AS POSITION_NAME FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_REQ A , AML_APPR B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.RA_SQ )

SELECT DATE_TEX_CCD AS RA_GRD_NM , BIZ_RULE_CCD AS RA_GRD_CD , MAX(CASE WHEN CUST_CCD = 1 THEN BRN_CD END) AS TOTAL_CNT , MAX(CASE WHEN CUST_CCD = 2 THEN BRN_CD END) AS STR_CNT , MAX(CASE WHEN CUST_CCD = 3 THEN BRN_CD END) ||' %' AS STR_PER , MAX(CASE WHEN CUST_CCD = 4 THEN BRN_CD END) AS CTR_CNT , MAX(CASE WHEN CUST_CCD = 5 THEN BRN_CD END) ||' %' AS CTR_PER , DATA_DTIL_CCD AS RA_GRD_SEQ FROM NIC65B WHERE BAS_YYMM = 'RAWGHT' AND DATA_CCD = #{CS_TYP_CD} GROUP BY DATE_TEX_CCD, BIZ_RULE_CCD, DATA_DTIL_CCD ORDER BY DATA_DTIL_CCD
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , FINCEN_LIST_YN , UN_SANTIONS_YN , OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , OECD_YN , EU_SANTIONS_YN , EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL = A.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN = A.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , T.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN = A.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , T.FINCEN_LIST_YN = A.FINCEN_LIST_YN , T.UN_SANTIONS_YN = A.UN_SANTIONS_YN , T.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN = A.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , T.OECD_YN = A.OECD_YN , T.EU_SANTIONS_YN = A.EU_SANTIONS_YN , T.EU_HRT_YN = A.EU_HRT_YN , T.TICPI_CPI_STA = A.TICPI_CPI_STA , T.TICPI_CPI_IDX = A.TICPI_CPI_IDX , T.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR = A.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , T.INCRS_PROD_STA = A.INCRS_PROD_STA , T.INCRS_PROD_YN = A.INCRS_PROD_YN , T.INCRS_CHEM_STA = A.INCRS_CHEM_STA , T.INCRS_CHEM_YN = A.INCRS_CHEM_YN , T.BASEL_RIK_STA = A.BASEL_RIK_STA , T.BASEL_RIK_IDX = A.BASEL_RIK_IDX , T.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR = A.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_NTN T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , FINCEN_LIST_YN , UN_SANTIONS_YN , OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , OECD_YN , EU_SANTIONS_YN , EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL = A.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN = A.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , T.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN = A.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , T.FINCEN_LIST_YN = A.FINCEN_LIST_YN , T.UN_SANTIONS_YN = A.UN_SANTIONS_YN , T.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN = A.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , T.OECD_YN = A.OECD_YN , T.EU_SANTIONS_YN = A.EU_SANTIONS_YN , T.EU_HRT_YN = A.EU_HRT_YN , T.TICPI_CPI_STA = A.TICPI_CPI_STA , T.TICPI_CPI_IDX = A.TICPI_CPI_IDX , T.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR = A.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , T.INCRS_PROD_STA = A.INCRS_PROD_STA , T.INCRS_PROD_YN = A.INCRS_PROD_YN , T.INCRS_CHEM_STA = A.INCRS_CHEM_STA , T.INCRS_CHEM_YN = A.INCRS_CHEM_YN , T.BASEL_RIK_STA = A.BASEL_RIK_STA , T.BASEL_RIK_IDX = A.BASEL_RIK_IDX , T.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR = A.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , T.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_CODE , T.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , T.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , T.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , T.FINCEN_LIST_YN , T.UN_SANTIONS_YN , T.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , T.OECD_YN , T.EU_SANTIONS_YN , T.EU_HRT_YN , T.TICPI_CPI_STA , T.TICPI_CPI_IDX , T.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , T.INCRS_PROD_STA , T.INCRS_PROD_YN , T.INCRS_CHEM_STA , T.INCRS_CHEM_YN , T.BASEL_RIK_STA , T.BASEL_RIK_IDX , T.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , T.HNDL_DY_TM , T.HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , A.FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , A.FINCEN_LIST_YN , A.UN_SANTIONS_YN , A.OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , A.OECD_YN , A.EU_SANTIONS_YN , A.EU_HRT_YN , A.TICPI_CPI_STA , A.TICPI_CPI_IDX , A.TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , A.INCRS_PROD_STA , A.INCRS_PROD_YN , A.INCRS_CHEM_STA , A.INCRS_CHEM_YN , A.BASEL_RIK_STA , A.BASEL_RIK_IDX , A.BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_REQ T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_IDJOB_YN1 , RA_IDJOB_YN2 , RA_IDJOB_YN3 , RA_IDJOB_YN4 , RA_IDJOB_YN5 , RA_IDJOB_YN6 , RA_IDJOB_YN7 , RA_IDJOB_STA1 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_IDJOB_STA2 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_IDJOB_STA3 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_IDJOB_STA4 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_IDJOB_STA5 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , RA_IDJOB_STA6 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL ) A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.RA_IDJOB_YN1 = A.RA_IDJOB_YN1 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN2 = A.RA_IDJOB_YN2 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN3 = A.RA_IDJOB_YN3 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN4 = A.RA_IDJOB_YN4 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN5 = A.RA_IDJOB_YN5 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN6 = A.RA_IDJOB_YN6 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN7 = A.RA_IDJOB_YN7 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA1 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA1 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA2 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA2 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA3 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA3 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA4 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA4 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA5 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA5 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA6 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA6 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6

, T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_CODE , T.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.RA_IDJOB_YN1 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN2 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN3 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN4 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN5 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN6 , T.RA_IDJOB_YN7 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA1 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA2 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA3 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA4 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA5 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA6 , T.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 , T.HNDL_DY_TM , T.HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_IDJOB_YN1 , A.RA_IDJOB_YN2 , A.RA_IDJOB_YN3 , A.RA_IDJOB_YN4 , A.RA_IDJOB_YN5 , A.RA_IDJOB_YN6 , A.RA_IDJOB_YN7 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA1 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA2 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA3 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA4 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA5 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA6 , A.RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_SCR T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_VAL = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.UPD_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_VAL , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.REG_ID , T.REG_DT , T.UPD_ID , T.UPD_DT ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_SCR T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_VAL = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.UPD_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_VAL , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.REG_ID , T.REG_DT , T.UPD_ID , T.UPD_DT ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_SCR T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_VAL = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.UPD_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_VAL , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.REG_ID , T.REG_DT , T.UPD_ID , T.UPD_DT ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_SCR T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , CASE WHEN RA_ITEM_CD IN ('I004','I007','B001','B002','B003','B004','B005','B006','B007','B008','B009','B010','B011','B012','B013','B014','B015','B016','B017','B018') THEN TO_CHAR(RA_ET_INTV_VAL) ELSE RA_ITEM_CODE END AS RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_SCR , ABS_HRSK_YN FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON_REQ )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_VAL = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.UPD_ID = #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T.UPD_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_VAL , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.REG_ID , T.REG_DT , T.UPD_ID , T.UPD_DT ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_REQ T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_CORJOB_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_YN5 , RA_CORJOB_YN6 , RA_CORJOB_YN7 , RA_CORJOB_YN8 , RA_CORJOB_STA1 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_STA2 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_STA3 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_STA4 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_STA5 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL ) A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.RA_CORJOB_YN1 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN1 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN2 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN2 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN3 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN3 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN4 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN4 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN5 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN5 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN6 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN6 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN7 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN7 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN8 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN8 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA1 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA1 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA2 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA2 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA3 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA3 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA4 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA4 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA5 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA5 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_CORJOB T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_CORJOB_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_YN5 , RA_CORJOB_YN6 , RA_CORJOB_YN7 , RA_CORJOB_YN8 , RA_CORJOB_STA1 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_STA2 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_STA3 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_STA4 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.RA_CORJOB_YN1 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN1 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN2 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN2 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN3 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN3 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN4 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN4 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN5 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN5 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN6 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN6 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN7 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN7 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN8 = A.RA_CORJOB_YN8 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA1 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA1 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA2 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA2 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA3 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA3 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA4 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA4 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA5 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA5 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = A.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 , T.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_CODE , T.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.RA_CORJOB_YN1 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN2 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN3 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN4 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN5 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN6 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN7 , T.RA_CORJOB_YN8 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA1 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA2 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA3 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA4 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA5 , T.RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 , T.HNDL_DY_TM , T.HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_CORJOB_YN1 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN2 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN3 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN4 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN5 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN6 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN7 , A.RA_CORJOB_YN8 , A.RA_CORJOB_STA1 ,
