#{HNDL_P_ENO} )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_COMMON T USING ( SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , RA_RMRK FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON_REQ WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} )A ON ( T.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} AND T.RA_ITEM_CODE = A.RA_ITEM_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_NM = A.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN = A.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SCR = A.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.RA_ST_INTV_VAL = A.RA_ST_INTV_VAL , T.RA_ET_INTV_VAL = A.RA_ET_INTV_VAL , T.RA_RMRK = A.RA_RMRK , T.HNDL_DY_TM = SYSDATE , T.HNDL_P_ENO = #{HNDL_P_ENO} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.RA_ITEM_CD , T.RA_ITEM_CODE , T.RA_ITEM_NM , T.ABS_HRSK_YN , T.RA_ITEM_SCR , T.RA_ST_INTV_VAL , T.RA_ET_INTV_VAL , T.RA_RMRK , T.HNDL_DY_TM , T.HNDL_P_ENO ) VALUES ( A.RA_ITEM_CD , A.RA_ITEM_CODE , A.RA_ITEM_NM , A.ABS_HRSK_YN , A.RA_ITEM_SCR , A.RA_ST_INTV_VAL , A.RA_ET_INTV_VAL , A.RA_RMRK , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} )

MERGE INTO RA_ITEM_WGHT T USING ( SELECT CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT , UPD_ID FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_REQ WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )A
ON ( T.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND T.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND T.RA_ITEM_CD = A.RA_ITEM_CD ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_ITEM_A_WGHT = A.RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , T.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT = A.RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , T.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT = A.RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , T.RA_ITEM_WGHT = A.RA_ITEM_WGHT , T.UPD_ID = A.UPD_ID , T.UPD_DT = SYSDATE

MERGE INTO RA_GRD_STD T USING ( SELECT CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , UPD_ID FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} )A ON ( T.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND T.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} AND T.RA_GRD_CD = A.RA_GRD_CD ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RA_GRD_SCR_MIN = A.RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , T.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX = A.RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , T.UPD_ID = A.UPD_ID , T.UPD_DT = SYSDATE
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.NTN_SEQ AS SEQ , A.HNDL_REG_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_REG_ID) AS HNDL_P_NM , CASE WHEN A.NTN_SN_CCD = 'E' THEN HNDL_DY_TM ELSE NULL END AS HNDL_DY_TM , B.RSN_CNTNT , A.NTN_SN_CCD AS SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.NTN_SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_APPR A , ( SELECT APP_NO, RSN_CNTNT FROM ( SELECT APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY APP_NO ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC) AS RN FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE SN_CCD = 'S' AND APPR_ROLE_ID = '4' ) WHERE RN = 1 )B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND TRIM(A.NTN_SN_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.NTN_SEQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.INJOB_SEQ AS SEQ , A.HNDL_REG_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_REG_ID) AS HNDL_P_NM , CASE WHEN A.IDJOB_SN_CCD = 'E' THEN HNDL_DY_TM ELSE NULL END AS HNDL_DY_TM , B.RSN_CNTNT , A.IDJOB_SN_CCD AS SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.IDJOB_SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_APPR A , ( SELECT APP_NO, RSN_CNTNT FROM ( SELECT APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY APP_NO ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC) AS RN FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE SN_CCD = 'S' AND APPR_ROLE_ID = '4' ) WHERE RN = 1 )B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND TRIM(A.IDJOB_SN_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.INJOB_SEQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.CORJOB_SEQ AS SEQ , A.HNDL_REG_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_REG_ID) AS HNDL_P_NM , CASE WHEN A.CORJOB_SN_CCD = 'E' THEN HNDL_DY_TM ELSE NULL END AS HNDL_DY_TM , B.RSN_CNTNT , A.CORJOB_SN_CCD AS SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.CORJOB_SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_APPR A , ( SELECT APP_NO, RSN_CNTNT FROM ( SELECT APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY APP_NO ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC) AS RN FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE SN_CCD = 'S' AND APPR_ROLE_ID = '4' ) WHERE RN = 1 )B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND TRIM(A.CORJOB_SN_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.CORJOB_SEQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.COMMON_SEQ AS SEQ , A.HNDL_REG_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_REG_ID) AS HNDL_P_NM , CASE WHEN A.COMMON_SN_CCD = 'E' THEN HNDL_DY_TM ELSE NULL END AS HNDL_DY_TM , B.RSN_CNTNT , A.COMMON_SN_CCD AS SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.COMMON_SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON_APPR A , ( SELECT APP_NO, RSN_CNTNT FROM ( SELECT APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY APP_NO ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC) AS RN FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE SN_CCD = 'S' AND APPR_ROLE_ID = '4' ) WHERE RN = 1 )B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND TRIM(A.COMMON_SN_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND A.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.COMMON_SEQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.WGHT_SEQ AS SEQ , A.REG_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.REG_ID) AS HNDL_P_NM , CASE WHEN A.WGHT_SN_CCD = 'E' THEN REG_DT ELSE NULL END AS HNDL_DY_TM , B.RSN_CNTNT , A.WGHT_SN_CCD AS SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.WGHT_SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR A , ( SELECT APP_NO, RSN_CNTNT FROM ( SELECT APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY APP_NO ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC) AS RN FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE SN_CCD = 'S' AND APPR_ROLE_ID = '4' ) WHERE RN = 1 )B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND TRIM(A.WGHT_SN_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.WGHT_SEQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.STD_SEQ AS SEQ , A.REG_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.REG_ID) AS HNDL_P_NM , CASE WHEN A.STD_SN_CCD = 'E' THEN REG_DT ELSE NULL END AS HNDL_DY_TM , B.RSN_CNTNT , A.STD_SN_CCD AS SN_CCD , GET_CODE_NAME('A038', A.STD_SN_CCD) AS SN_CCD_NM FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR A , ( SELECT APP_NO, RSN_CNTNT FROM ( SELECT APP_NO , RSN_CNTNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY APP_NO ORDER BY NUM_SQ DESC) AS RN FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE SN_CCD = 'S' AND APPR_ROLE_ID = '4' ) WHERE RN = 1 )B WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO(+) AND TRIM(A.STD_SN_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND A.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND A.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.STD_SEQ DESC

SELECT NTN_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NTN_CD , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SIM_TOTAL , RA_ITEM_SCR , FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , FINCEN_LIST_YN , UN_SANTIONS_YN , OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , OECD_EOIR_RANK , OECD_YN , EU_SANTIONS_YN , EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_APPR_ONE WHERE NTN_SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT INJOB_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_IDJOB_YN1 , RA_IDJOB_YN2 , RA_IDJOB_YN3 , RA_IDJOB_YN4 , RA_IDJOB_YN5 , RA_IDJOB_YN6 , RA_IDJOB_YN7 , RA_IDJOB_STA1 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_IDJOB_STA2 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_IDJOB_STA3 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_IDJOB_STA4 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_IDJOB_STA5 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , RA_IDJOB_STA6 , RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_APPR_ONE WHERE INJOB_SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT CORJOB_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_CORJOB_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_YN5 , RA_CORJOB_YN6 , RA_CORJOB_YN7 , RA_CORJOB_YN8 , RA_CORJOB_STA1 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_STA2 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_STA3 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_STA4 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_STA5 , RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_APPR_ONE WHERE CORJOB_SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT COMMON_SEQ AS RA_SEQ , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , '이상' AS GUGAN1 , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , '미만' AS GUGAN2 , RA_RMRK , MODI_RA_ITEM_NM , MODI_ABS_HRSK_YN , MODI_RA_ITEM_SCR , MODI_RA_ST_INTV_VAL , '이상' AS GUGAN3 , MODI_RA_ET_INTV_VAL , '미만' AS GUGAN4 , MODI_RA_RMRK FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON_APPR WHERE COMMON_SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_RISK_CATG ELSE NULL END AS RA_RISK_CATG , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY RA_SQ) = 1 THEN RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CS_TYP_CD, NEW_OLD_GBN_CD, RA_RISK_CATG ORDER BY RA_SQ) = 1 THEN MODI_RA_ITEM_A_WGHT ELSE NULL END AS MODI_RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , WGHT_SEQ , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_SQ , RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , MODI_RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , MODI_RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR WHERE WGHT_SEQ = #{WGHT_SEQ} ORDER BY RA_SQ

SELECT STD_SEQ , CS_TYP_CD , CASE WHEN CS_TYP_CD = '01' THEN '개인' ELSE '법인' END AS CS_TYP_NM , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , CASE WHEN NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = 'A' THEN 'I모델' ELSE 'B모델' END AS NEW_OLD_GBN_NM , RA_GRD_CD , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '고위험' WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '중위험' ELSE '저위험' END AS RA_GRD_NM , RA_GRD_SCR_MIN || ' <= AND < '|| RA_GRD_SCR_MAX AS RA_GRD_SCR , MODI_RA_GRD_SCR_MIN || ' <= AND < '|| MODI_RA_GRD_SCR_MAX AS MODI_RA_GRD_SCR FROM RA_GRD_STD_APPR WHERE STD_SEQ = #{STD_SEQ} ORDER BY RA_GRD_SCR_MAX DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.BRN_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'Y' ELSE ' ' END AS SN_CCD_YN , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A , C_USER B , RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_APPR C WHERE A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID AND A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO AND C.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.BRN_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'Y' ELSE ' ' END AS SN_CCD_YN , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A , C_USER B , RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_APPR C WHERE A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID AND A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO AND C.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.BRN_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'Y' ELSE ' ' END AS SN_CCD_YN , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A , C_USER B , RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_APPR C WHERE A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID AND A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO AND C.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.BRN_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'Y' ELSE ' ' END AS SN_CCD_YN , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A , C_USER B , RA_ITEM_COMMON_APPR C WHERE A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID AND A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO AND C.RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.BRN_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'Y' ELSE ' ' END AS SN_CCD_YN , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A , C_USER B , RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR C WHERE A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID AND A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO AND C.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_NM , A.BRN_CD , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.BRN_CD) AS BRN_NM , B.POSITION_CODE , (SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND CD_ID = B.POSITION_CODE) AS POSITION_NAME , A.HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , CASE WHEN A.SN_CCD = 'R' THEN 'Y' ELSE ' ' END AS SN_CCD_YN , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A , C_USER B , RA_GRD_STD_APPR C WHERE A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID AND A.APP_NO = C.APP_NO AND C.CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND C.NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_ITEM_COMMON_APPR ( COMMON_SEQ , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , RA_RMRK ) ( SELECT #{COMMON_SEQ} , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , RA_ST_INTV_VAL , RA_ET_INTV_VAL , RA_RMRK FROM RA_ITEM_COMMON WHERE RA_ITEM_CD = #{RA_ITEM_CD} )
mapper.select: SELECT RISK_ELMT_C AS CODE , RISK_ELMT_NM AS NAME FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R1' ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C

SELECT RISK_ELMT_C AS CODE , RISK_ELMT_NM AS NAME FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R2' AND RISK_ELMT_C IN ('R20701','R20702','R20703','R21401','R21403','R21404','R21405','R20601','R20602','R20603','R20604','R20101','R21001') ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C

SELECT RISK_ELMT_C AS CODE , RISK_ELMT_NM AS NAME FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R2' AND RISK_ELMT_C IN ('R20701','R20702','R20703','R21401','R21402','R21403','R21404','R21405','R20601','R20602','R20603','R20604','R20101') ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C

SELECT CASE WHEN TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TO_NUMBER(TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR) END AS CD , CASE WHEN TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TO_NUMBER(TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR) END AS CD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ

SELECT CASE WHEN BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TO_NUMBER(BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR) END AS CD , CASE WHEN BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TO_NUMBER(BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR) END AS CD_NM FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ
SELECT CNTNT AS CD , CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = #{CD} ORDER BY CD_RNK_SQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_ITEM_WGHT_APPR ( WGHT_SEQ , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_SQ , RA_RISK_CATG , RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT ) SELECT #{WGHT_SEQ} , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_ITEM_CD , RA_SQ , RA_RISK_CATG , RA_RISK_VAL_ITEM , RA_ITEM_A_WGHT , RA_ITEM_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_A_B_WGHT , RA_ITEM_WGHT FROM RA_ITEM_WGHT WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC65B SET BRN_CD = '0' , CNT = '0' WHERE BAS_YYMM = 'RAWGHT' AND DATA_CCD = #{CS_TYP_CD}
mapper.select: SELECT CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , CASE WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'H' THEN '고위험' WHEN RA_GRD_CD = 'M' THEN '중위험' ELSE '저위험' END AS RA_GRD_NM , RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , '이상' AS GUGAN1 , RA_GRD_SCR_MAX , '미만' AS GUGAN2 , RA_REF_SN_CCD , STD_SN_CCD AS RA_SN_CCD , STD_SEQ AS RA_SEQ FROM RA_GRD_STD_REQ WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD} ORDER BY RA_GRD_SCR_MAX DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_GRD_STD_APPR ( STD_SEQ , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , RA_GRD_SCR_MAX ) SELECT #{STD_SEQ} , CS_TYP_CD , NEW_OLD_GBN_CD , RA_GRD_CD , RA_GRD_SCR_MIN , RA_GRD_SCR_MAX FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE CS_TYP_CD = #{CS_TYP_CD} AND NEW_OLD_GBN_CD = #{NEW_OLD_GBN_CD}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM KYC_PRD_CK WHERE PRD_CK_ID = #{PRD_CK_ID}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.PRD_CK_ID , NULL AS VERSION_ID , NULL AS TITLE , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY B.LV1, B.LV2) AS GR , B.LV1 , B.LV2 , B.LV3 , B.LV3 AS SRT_ORDR , B.RISK_TP_CD , REPLACE(REPLACE(B.EVLTN_ITEM, CHR(13), '
  '), CHR(10), '
  ') AS EVLTN_ITEM , B.EVLTN_STND , B.EVLTN_RMRK , B.RSNB_HRSK_RLVN_YN , B.DEP_TP_CD , B.REG_DT FROM ( SELECT A.PRD_CK_ID FROM KYC_PRD_CK A , AML_APPR B , ( SELECT MAX(T.NUM_SQ) AS NUM_SQ FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD01' AND T.SN_CCD = 'E' ) C WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD01' AND B.NUM_SQ = C.NUM_SQ AND B.SN_CCD = 'E' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_CK_LST B ON A.PRD_CK_ID = B.PRD_CK_ID ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(B.LV1), TO_NUMBER(B.LV2), TO_NUMBER(B.LV3)

SELECT A.PRD_CK_ID , A.VERSION_ID , A.TITLE , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY B.LV1, B.LV2) AS GR , B.LV1 , B.LV2 , B.LV3 , B.LV3 AS SRT_ORDR , B.RISK_TP_CD , REPLACE(REPLACE(B.EVLTN_ITEM, CHR(13), '
  '), CHR(10), '
  ') AS EVLTN_ITEM , B.EVLTN_STND , B.EVLTN_RMRK , B.RSNB_HRSK_RLVN_YN , B.DEP_TP_CD , B.REG_DT , '' AS UPDATEGUBUN FROM KYC_PRD_CK A LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_CK_LST B ON A.PRD_CK_ID = B.PRD_CK_ID WHERE A.PRD_CK_ID = #{PRD_CK_ID} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(B.LV1), TO_NUMBER(B.LV2), TO_NUMBER(B.LV3)
SELECT SSQ.KYC_PRD_CK_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS PRD_CK_SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM KYC_PRD_CK_LST WHERE PRD_CK_ID = #{PRD_CK_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT A.APP_NO , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , B.LOGIN_ID , B.USER_NM , A.BRN_CD , C.DPRT_NM , A.APPR_ROLE_ID , D.ROLE_NM , TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , ( SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'P001' AND C.CNTNT = A.SN_CCD ) AS SN_CCD_NM , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER B ON A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B C ON A.BRN_CD = C.DPRT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN C_ROLE D ON A.APPR_ROLE_ID = D.ROLE_ID WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD01' AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC
SELECT CNTNT AS CD , CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = #{CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY CNTNT
SELECT CNTNT AS CD , CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = #{CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CNTNT NOT IN ('EEMP','ACNT') ORDER BY CNTNT
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN WHERE PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID}
DELETE FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN_RSLT WHERE PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID}
DELETE FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN_ATTACH WHERE PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID}
DELETE FROM AML_APPR WHERE APP_NO = #{APP_NO}
DELETE FROM AML_APPR_HIST WHERE APP_NO = #{APP_NO}
mapper.select: SELECT A.APP_NO , A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C , A.NUM_SQ , A.HNDL_P_ENO , B.LOGIN_ID , B.USER_NM , A.BRN_CD , C.DPRT_NM , A.APPR_ROLE_ID , D.ROLE_NM , TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS HNDL_DY_TM , A.SN_CCD , ( SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'P002' AND C.CNTNT = A.SN_CCD ) AS SN_CCD_NM , A.RSN_CNTNT FROM AML_APPR_HIST A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER B ON A.HNDL_P_ENO = B.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC41B C ON A.BRN_CD = C.DPRT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN C_ROLE D ON A.APPR_ROLE_ID = D.ROLE_ID WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C IN ('PRD02', 'RA5') AND A.APP_NO = #{APP_NO} ORDER BY A.NUM_SQ DESC

SELECT A.PRD_CK_ID , A.VERSION_ID , A.TITLE , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY B.LV1, B.LV2) AS GR , B.LV1 , B.LV2 , B.LV3 , B.LV3 AS SRT_ORDR , B.RISK_TP_CD , REPLACE(REPLACE(B.EVLTN_ITEM, CHR(13), '
  '), CHR(10), '
  ') AS EVLTN_ITEM , B.EVLTN_STND , B.EVLTN_RMRK , B.RSNB_HRSK_RLVN_YN , B.DEP_TP_CD , B.REG_DT FROM ( SELECT A.PRD_CK_ID , A.VERSION_ID , A.TITLE FROM KYC_PRD_CK A , AML_APPR B , ( SELECT MAX(T.NUM_SQ) AS NUM_SQ FROM AML_APPR T WHERE T.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD01' AND T.SN_CCD = 'E' ) C WHERE A.APP_NO = B.APP_NO AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'PRD01' AND B.NUM_SQ = C.NUM_SQ AND B.SN_CCD = 'E' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_CK_LST B ON A.PRD_CK_ID = B.PRD_CK_ID ORDER BY TO_NUMBER( B.LV1 ),TO_NUMBER( B.LV2 ), TO_NUMBER(B.LV3 )

SELECT A.PRD_EVLTN_ID , A.PRD_CK_ID , A.PRD_CTGR_CD , A.PRD_TP_CD , A.PRD_NM , A.EVLTN_DEPT_ID , E.DEP_TITLE AS EVLTN_DEPT_NM , A.EVLTN_USER_ID , F.USER_NM AS EVLTN_USER_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.RLS_EXPCT_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RLS_EXPCT_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.EVLTN_PRF_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EVLTN_PRF_DT , A.PRD_RMRK , A.SMRY_OPNN , A.PRD_CD , A.RSK_GRD , A.CNTRL_RVW_YN , A.RSNB_EDD_YN , A.EVLTN_STATE , A.APP_NO , B.VERSION_ID , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.LV1, C.LV2) AS GR , C.LV1 , C.LV2 , C.LV3 , C.LV3 AS SRT_ORDR , C.RISK_TP_CD , REPLACE(REPLACE(C.EVLTN_ITEM, CHR(13), '
  '), CHR(10), '
  ') AS EVLTN_ITEM , C.EVLTN_STND , C.EVLTN_RMRK , C.RSNB_HRSK_RLVN_YN , C.DEP_TP_CD , CASE WHEN C.LV1 = '3' THEN '' ELSE D.EVLTN_RSLT END AS EVLTN_RSLT , D.EVLTN_RSLT_RMRK , A.EVLTN_STATE FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN A LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_CK B ON A.PRD_CK_ID = B.PRD_CK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_CK_LST C ON A.PRD_CK_ID = C.PRD_CK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_EVLTN_RSLT D ON A.PRD_EVLTN_ID = D.PRD_EVLTN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN C_DEP_INFO E ON A.EVLTN_DEPT_ID = E.DEP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER F ON A.EVLTN_USER_ID = F.LOGIN_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID} AND C.LV1 = D.LV1 AND C.LV2 = D.LV2 AND C.LV3 = D.LV3 ORDER BY TO_NUMBER( C.LV1 ),TO_NUMBER( C.LV2 ), TO_NUMBER( C.LV3 )

SELECT A.PRD_EVLTN_ID , A.PRD_CK_ID , A.PRD_CTGR_CD , ( SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'P201' AND C.CNTNT = A.PRD_CTGR_CD ) AS PRD_CTGR_CD_NM , A.PRD_TP_CD , CASE WHEN A.PRD_CTGR_CD = '20102' THEN ( SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'P203' AND C.CNTNT = A.PRD_TP_CD ) ELSE ( SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'P202' AND C.CNTNT = A.PRD_TP_CD ) END AS PRD_TP_CD_NM , A.PRD_NM , A.EVLTN_DEPT_ID , E.DEP_TITLE AS EVLTN_DEPT_NM , A.EVLTN_USER_ID , F.USER_NM AS EVLTN_USER_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.RLS_EXPCT_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RLS_EXPCT_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.EVLTN_PRF_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EVLTN_PRF_DT , A.PRD_RMRK , A.SMRY_OPNN , A.PRD_CD , A.RSK_GRD , ( SELECT C.CD_NM FROM NIC92B C WHERE C.CD = 'P301' AND C.CNTNT = A.RSK_GRD ) AS RSK_GRD_NM , A.CNTRL_RVW_YN , A.RSNB_EDD_YN , A.EVLTN_STATE , A.APP_NO , B.VERSION_ID , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.LV1, C.LV2) AS GR , C.LV1 , C.LV2 , C.LV3 , C.LV3 AS SRT_ORDR , C.RISK_TP_CD , CASE WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.LV1, C.LV2) = '1' THEN ( SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'P101' AND A.CNTNT = C.RISK_TP_CD ) WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.LV1, C.LV2) = '2' THEN ( SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'P102' AND A.CNTNT = C.RISK_TP_CD ) WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.LV1, C.LV2) = '3' THEN ( SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'P103' AND A.CNTNT = C.RISK_TP_CD ) WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.LV1, C.LV2) = '4' THEN ( SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'P104' AND A.CNTNT = C.RISK_TP_CD ) WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY C.LV1, C.LV2) = '5' THEN ( SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'P105' AND A.CNTNT = C.RISK_TP_CD ) ELSE ( SELECT A.CD_NM FROM NIC92B A WHERE A.CD = 'P106' AND A.CNTNT = C.RISK_TP_CD ) END AS RISK_TP_CD_NM , C.EVLTN_ITEM , C.EVLTN_STND , C.EVLTN_RMRK , C.RSNB_HRSK_RLVN_YN , C.DEP_TP_CD , D.EVLTN_RSLT , D.EVLTN_RSLT_RMRK FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN A LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_CK B ON A.PRD_CK_ID = B.PRD_CK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_CK_LST C ON A.PRD_CK_ID = C.PRD_CK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN KYC_PRD_EVLTN_RSLT D ON A.PRD_EVLTN_ID = D.PRD_EVLTN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN C_DEP_INFO E ON A.EVLTN_DEPT_ID = E.DEP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER F ON A.EVLTN_USER_ID = F.LOGIN_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID} AND C.LV1 = D.LV1 AND C.LV2 = D.LV2 AND C.LV3 = D.LV3 ORDER BY TO_NUMBER( C.LV1 ),TO_NUMBER( C.LV2 ), TO_NUMBER( C.LV3 )

SELECT PRD_EVLTN_ID , ATTACH_SEQ AS FILE_SER , ATTACH_PATH AS FILE_POS , ATTACH_NAME AS LOSC_FILE_NM , ATTACH_TEMP_NAME AS PHSC_FILE_NM , ATTACH_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE , REG_DT FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN_ATTACH WHERE PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID} ORDER BY ATTACH_SEQ
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN_RSLT WHERE PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID}
DELETE FROM KYC_PRD_EVLTN_ATTACH WHERE PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRD_EVLTN_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FATF_BLACK_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN FATF_GREY_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FATF_GREY_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN FINCEN_LIST_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FINCEN_LIST_YN , CASE WHEN UN_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS UN_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN OFAC_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OFAC_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN OECD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OECD_YN , CASE WHEN EU_SANTIONS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EU_SANTIONS_YN , CASE WHEN EU_HRT_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EU_HRT_YN , TICPI_CPI_STA , TICPI_CPI_IDX , TICPI_CPI_IDX_SCR , INCRS_PROD_STA , CASE WHEN INCRS_PROD_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INCRS_PROD_YN , INCRS_CHEM_STA , CASE WHEN INCRS_CHEM_YN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INCRS_CHEM_YN , BASEL_RIK_STA , BASEL_RIK_IDX , BASEL_RIK_IDX_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_NTN ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ASC

SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN6 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_YN7 , RA_IDJOB_STA1 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_IDJOB_STA2 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_IDJOB_STA3 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_IDJOB_STA4 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_IDJOB_STA5 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN5 , RA_IDJOB_STA6 , CASE WHEN RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_IDJOB_STA_YN6 FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ASC

SELECT RA_ITEM_CD , RA_ITEM_CODE , RA_ITEM_NM , ABS_HRSK_YN , RA_ITEM_SCR , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN1 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN2 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN3 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN4 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN5 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN6 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN7 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_YN8 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_YN8 , RA_CORJOB_STA1 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN1 , RA_CORJOB_STA2 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN2 , RA_CORJOB_STA3 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN3 , RA_CORJOB_STA4 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN4 , RA_CORJOB_STA5 , CASE WHEN RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RA_CORJOB_STA_YN5 FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB ORDER BY RA_ITEM_CODE ASC

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10101' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM1 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10101' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10101') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM1 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10102' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM2 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10102' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10102') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM2 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10201' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM3 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10201' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10201') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM3 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10301' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM4 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10301' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10301') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM4 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10401' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM5 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10401' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10401') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM5 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10501' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM6 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10501' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10501') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM6 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10601' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM7 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10601' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10601') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM7 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10701' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM8 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10701' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10701') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM8 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10702' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM9 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10702' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10702') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM9 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10801' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM10 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10801' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10801') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM10 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10802' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM11 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10802' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10802') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM11 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10901' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM12 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10901' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R10901') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM12 FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R1' ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C

DELETE FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL

mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20701' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM1 -- 법률, 회계, 세무 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20701' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20701') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM1 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20702' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM2 -- 투자자문 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20702' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20702') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM2 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM3 -- 부동산 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20703') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM3 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM4 -- 오락, 도박, 스포츠 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21401') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM4 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM5 -- 대부업자, 환전상, 소액해외송급업자 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21403') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM5 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM6 -- 귀금속, 예술품, 골동품 판매상 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21404') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM6 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM7 -- 주류 도소매업, 유흥주점업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21405') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM7 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM8 -- 의료, 제약 관련 산업/직종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20601') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM8 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM9 -- 건설 산업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20602') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM9 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM10 -- 무기, 방위산업 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20603') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM10 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM11 -- 채광, 금속, 고물상 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20604') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM11 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM12 -- 가상자산사업 의심업종 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R20101') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM12 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21001' THEN RISK_ELMT_NM ELSE '' END) AS RISK_ELMT_NM13 -- 무직자 , MAX(CASE WHEN RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21001' AND TRIM(RISK_HRSK_YN) IN ('H','Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE (SELECT TRIM(RISK_SCR) FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_ELMT_C = 'R21001') END) AS RISK_SCR_NM13 FROM RA_RISK_FACTOR WHERE RISK_CATG1_C = 'R2' ORDER BY RISK_CATG2_C

SELECT 1 AS SEQ , SUM(ABS_HRSK_YN) AS CNT1 , SUM(RA_ITEM_SCR) AS CNT2 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.ABS_HRSK_YN != B.ABS_HRSK_YN THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ABS_HRSK_YN , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR != B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END RA_ITEM_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_REQ A , RA_ITEM_NTN_SCR_RE_CAL B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = B.RA_ITEM_CODE )

SELECT 1 AS SEQ , SUM(ABS_HRSK_YN) AS CNT1 , SUM(RA_ITEM_SCR) AS CNT2 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.ABS_HRSK_YN != B.ABS_HRSK_YN THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ABS_HRSK_YN , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR != B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END RA_ITEM_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_REQ A , RA_ITEM_IDJOB_SCR_RE_CAL B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = B.RA_ITEM_CODE )

SELECT 1 AS SEQ , SUM(ABS_HRSK_YN) AS CNT1 , SUM(RA_ITEM_SCR) AS CNT2 FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN A.ABS_HRSK_YN != B.ABS_HRSK_YN THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ABS_HRSK_YN , CASE WHEN A.RA_ITEM_SCR != B.RA_ITEM_SCR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END RA_ITEM_SCR FROM RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_REQ A , RA_ITEM_CORJOB_SCR_RE_CAL B WHERE A.RA_ITEM_CD = B.RA_ITEM_CD AND A.RA_ITEM_CODE = B.RA_ITEM_CODE )

MERGE INTO ORIGINAL_PRODUCT T USING DUAL ON (T.PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRDT_ALIS}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CONFIRM_YN = 'E' , T.CONFIRM_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.PRD_EVLTN_ID , T.CONFIRM_YN , T.CONFIRM_DT ) VALUES ( #{PRDT_ALIS} , 'E' , SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO DERIVED_PRODUCT T USING DUAL ON (T.PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRDT_ALIS}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CONFIRM_YN = 'E' , T.CONFIRM_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.PRD_EVLTN_ID , T.CONFIRM_YN , T.CONFIRM_DT ) VALUES ( #{PRDT_ALIS} , 'E' , SYSDATE )

MERGE INTO ORIGINAL_PRODUCT T USING DUAL ON (T.PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRDT_ALIS}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CONFIRM_YN = 'N' , T.CONFIRM_DT = '' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.PRD_EVLTN_ID , T.CONFIRM_YN , T.CONFIRM_DT ) VALUES ( #{PRDT_ALIS} , 'N' , '' )

MERGE INTO DERIVED_PRODUCT T USING DUAL ON (T.PRD_EVLTN_ID = #{PRDT_ALIS}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CONFIRM_YN = 'N' , T.CONFIRM_DT = '' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( T.PRD_EVLTN_ID , T.CONFIRM_YN , T.CONFIRM_DT ) VALUES ( #{PRDT_ALIS} , 'N' , '' )
